Affordable, reliable, and easy to install, the THU500S provides outstanding value for its cost. You're getting your money’s worth, making it a smart investment for homeowners and professionals alike.

Final Verdict

If you’re looking for a durable, effective, and affordable toilet flapper, the Toto THU500S Universal Flapper is an excellent choice. Whether you're tackling a DIY plumbing project or stocking up on replacements as a professional plumber, this product won't let you down.

Pro Tip: Be sure to double-check the package to find your specific toilet model and check compatibility before trying to install it.

Happy Flushing!

Why Choose the TOTO THU500S Universal Flapper

Introducing the TOTO THU500S Universal Flapper the perfect solution for your TOTO toilet! Designed to fit a wide range of TOTO toilets, this universal flapper offers hassle-free replacement and ensures a reliable seal to prevent any leaks. With improved flush efficiency, it helps conserve water while providing optimal performance. Plus, installation is a breeze with no need for complex tools. Upgrade your toilet effortlessly with the TOTO THU500S Universal Flapper and enjoy the benefits of a high-quality, reliable flapper that guarantees your toilet operates at its absolute best!


Want to learn more about this toilet flapper? Check out our article comparing the Toto Universal Flapper and Korky Universal Flapper here and our article on locating your toilet model number at our Resource Center.


Want to learn more about this product? Read about it in our article on How to Install

description.en:
Upgrade Your Bathroom with the Toto Aquia IV Two Piece Elongated Toilet with SS124 SoftClose Seat in Cotton White

By choosing the Toto Aquia IV Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Toilet with CEFIONTECT Dual Flush 0.9 and 1.28 GPF, homeowners can enjoy a combination of advanced technology, superior performance, and elegant design. This toilet is an excellent investment for those looking to upgrade their bathroom with a reliable and efficient fixture.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS446124CEMGN#01
  • Series: Aquia IV
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Configuration: Two-Piece
  • Installation Type: Floor mounted
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 / 0.9 GPF
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Flush System: Dynamax Tornado Flush
  • Trap Diameter: 2-1/4 inches
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty

DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH System

The DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH system uses a powerful, dual-nozzle flushing mechanism that creates a centrifugal rinsing action, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean with every flush. This system is both powerful and quiet, providing optimal performance while conserving water.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

The CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze is an ultra-smooth coating that prevents waste from sticking to the bowl, making it easier to clean and maintain. This feature helps keep the toilet cleaner for longer periods, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

Dual Flush Efficiency

With dual flush options of 0.9 and 1.28 gallons per flush, this toilet allows users to choose the appropriate flush volume, conserving water without compromising performance. This makes it an eco-friendly choice that helps reduce water usage.

Auto Flush and Washlet+ Ready

This model is designed to be compatible with Toto's Washlet+ bidet seats, allowing for seamless integration and enhanced hygiene. The auto flush feature adds convenience by automatically flushing the toilet after use, ensuring a hands-free experience.

Universal Height

The universal height design makes this toilet comfortable for a wide range of users, including those with mobility issues.

SoftClose Seat

The included SS124 SoftClose seat provides a quiet, gentle closing action. This feature enhances the overall user experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bathroom.

Sleek Design

The skirted design of the Aquia IV not only enhances its aesthetic appeal but also makes cleaning easier by eliminating hard-to-reach areas. Its modern look complements a variety of bathroom styles.

Brand Notoriety

Toto is a highly respected brand in the bathroom fixtures industry, known for its innovative and high-quality products. The Toto Aquia IV Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Toilet with CEFIONTECT Dual Flush 0.9 and 1.28 GPF is a prime example of their commitment to excellence. This model combines advanced technology with practical features, making it an ideal choice for homeowners seeking a reliable and efficient toilet.

Additional Features

  • Concealed supply connection for seamless installation
  • DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH utilizes 360º cleaning power to reach every part of the bowl
  • Ultra high-efficiency dual flush 1.28 GPF / 0.9 GPF
  • CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze minimizes waste from sticking to porous ceramic surfaces
  • Completely skirted design for a sleek and understated look that's easier to clean
  • Universal Height
  • Chrome plated push-button
  • 12" Rough-in
  • Elongated front bowl and WASHLET+ S7 and tank set
  • EWATER+ auto-cleans wand and bowl after every use
  • PREMIST automatically mists the bowl before each use
  • Multifunction pearl white block-style remote control
  • Night light
  • Auto flush available as upgrade
  • Covered under TOTO's 1 year limited warranty
  • Coordinates with products from the Aquia IV line seamlessly
  • Two-piece configuration allows for easier access to the area around the toilet
  • Installs in a floor mounted configuration
  • Lid-top dual flush push button
  • Constructed of vitreous china ensuring durability and dependability
  • Premier finishing process ensures finishes will resist corrosion and tarnishing through everyday use
  • Concealed trapway provides a smoother and less utilitarian appearance, a built in skirt hides the discharge passageway from view

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read our article on the top 7 reasons to replace a toilet and Best Overall Toilets at our Resource Center.

description.en:
Upgrade Your Bathroom with the Toto Aquia IV Two Piece Elongated Universal Height Toilet with SS124 SoftClose Seat

Upgrade your bathroom with the Toto Aquia IV Arc Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Universal Height Toilet, a perfect blend of modern design and advanced technology. Toto, a brand synonymous with quality and innovation, has been a trusted name in the bathroom industry for over a century.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

This ultra-smooth ceramic glaze is specially designed to create a protective barrier that prevents debris, stains, and mold from adhering to the surface. By reducing buildup and making cleaning easier, it ensures your toilet stays fresh, hygienic, and cleaner for longer periods, saving you time and effort.

Dual Flush System

Choose between 0.9 GPF and 1.28 GPF for an efficient, water-saving flush that doesn't compromise on performance. The dual-flush system allows you to adjust water usage based on your needs, helping conserve water without sacrificing powerful, reliable flushing every time.

Universal Height

Designed to provide exceptional comfort and support, this product is thoughtfully created for people of all ages and abilities. Its user-friendly design ensures accessibility and convenience, making it a perfect addition to any household, whether for daily use or special occasions.

Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready

Seamlessly integrates with Toto's Washlet+ system, providing a fully automated, hands-free flushing experience that enhances convenience and hygiene. This innovative integration ensures a clean, efficient, and effortless solution for modern bathroom needs.

SS124 SoftClose Seat

The included SoftClose seat is designed to ensure a quiet and gentle closing every time, eliminating the noise and stress of slamming. This thoughtful feature not only prevents unnecessary wear and tear but also enhances the overall durability and longevity of your toilet seat, making it a practical and reliable addition to your bathroom.

Cotton White Finish

The classic cotton white finish seamlessly complements any bathroom decor, whether it’s modern, traditional, or minimalist, adding a touch of elegance and sophistication. Its clean, timeless look enhances the overall aesthetic, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere in your space.

Brand Notoriety

Toto's commitment to excellence and innovation is evident in every product they create. With a reputation for reliability and cutting-edge technology, Toto toilets are designed to enhance your bathroom experience through superior functionality and stylish design. The Aquia IV Arc Two Piece Toilet is no exception, offering homeowners a perfect combination of efficiency, comfort, and modern aesthetics.

Additional Features

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS448124CEMFGN#01
  • Series: Aquia IV
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Shape: Elongated
  • Height: Chair Height
  • Configuration: Two-piece
  • Trip Lever Placement: Left
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 GPF / 0.9 GPF
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Trapway (Discharge Passageway) Size: 2-1/4 inches
  • Theme: Modern
  • Certifications: ADA, ASME, WaterSense,
  • Warranty: 1-Year Limited Manufacturer Warranty
  • SoftClose seat included
  • Universal Height allows for more comfort across a broader range of individuals
  • DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH utilizes 360 degree cleaning power to reach every part of the bowl
  • CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze minimizes waste from adhering to ceramic surfaces
  • Bowl design reduces water flow resistance and turbulence, resulting in a quieter flush
  • Completely skirted design for a sleek and understated look
  • Designed to work with a T40 WASHLET+ bidet seat for seamless integration
  • Constructed of vitreous china ensuring durability and dependability
  • Premier finishing process ensures finishes will resist corrosion and tarnishing through everyday use
  • The concealed trapway provides a smoother and less utilitarian appearance, a built in skirt hides the discharge passageway from view
  • WaterSense certified toilet uses 20% less water than the current standard while maintaining superior performance
  • Left-hand chrome dual flush trip lever allows you to select 1.28 or 0.9 GPF
  • Two-piece configuration allows for easier access to the area around the toilet
  • Installs in a floor mounted configuration
  • Included parts: TOTO SS124 SoftClose seat, tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps
  • Purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, and water supply lines
  • WASHLET adapter 9AU321-A required if installing a TOTO WASHLET
  • May be adapted for 10" or 14" rough-in with optional TOTO parts: TSU48.10 or TSU48.14 (sold separately)
  • Covered under TOTO's 1 year limited warranty
  • Coordinates with products from the Aquia IV line seamlessly

description.en:
Revolutionize Your Bathroom with the Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Washlet+ Ready Toilet with SS124 SoftClose Seat

By choosing the Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF, homeowners can enjoy a combination of advanced technology, superior performance, and elegant design. This toilet is an excellent investment for those looking to upgrade their bathroom with a reliable and efficient fixture.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS776124CSG#01
  • Series: Drake
  • Finish: Cotton white
  • Material: vitreous china
  • Configuration: Two-piece
  • Installation Type: Floor Mount
  • Bowl Height: Chair Height
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Flush Rate: 1.6 gallons per flush
  • Trip Lever Location: Left
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Trapway Size: 2-1/8-inches
  • Warranty: 1-year limited warranty

Tornado Flush System

The Tornado Flush system uses a powerful, dual-nozzle flushing mechanism that creates a centrifugal rinsing action, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean with every flush. This system is both powerful and quiet, providing optimal performance while conserving water.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

The CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze is an ultra-smooth coating that prevents waste from sticking to the bowl, making it easier to clean and maintain. This feature helps keep the toilet cleaner for longer periods, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

Auto Flush and Washlet+ Ready

This model is designed to be compatible with Toto's Washlet+ bidet seats, allowing for seamless integration and enhanced hygiene. The auto flush feature adds convenience by automatically flushing the toilet after use, ensuring a hands-free experience.

Universal Height

The universal height design makes this toilet comfortable for a wide range of users, including those with mobility issues.

SoftClose Seat

The included SS124 SoftClose seat provides a quiet, gentle closing action. This feature enhances the overall user experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bathroom.

Water Efficiency

With a flush rate of 1.6 gallons per flush (GPF), this toilet balances powerful performance with water conservation, helping to reduce water usage without compromising on effectiveness.

Brand Notoriety

Toto is a highly respected brand in the bathroom fixtures industry, known for its innovative and high-quality products. The Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF is a prime example of their commitment to excellence. This model combines advanced technology with practical features, making it an ideal choice for homeowners seeking a reliable and efficient toilet.

Additional Features

  • TORNADO FLUSH system
  • CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze minimizes debris from sticking to ceramic surfaces
  • Elongated front bowl and tank set with SoftClose Seat
  • 12" Rough-In less supply
  • Covered under TOTO's 1 year limited warranty

  • Premier finishing process – finishes will resist corrosion and tarnishing through everyday use

description.en:
Upgrade Your Bathroom with the Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Toilet with SS124 SoftClose Seat in Cotton White

By choosing the Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Transitional Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.28 GPF, homeowners can enjoy a combination of advanced technology, superior performance, and elegant design. This toilet is an excellent investment for those looking to upgrade their bathroom with a reliable and efficient fixture.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS786124CEG#01
  • Series: Drake
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Configuration: Two-Piece
  • Bowl Height: Chair Height
  • Installation Type: Floor Mount
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 GPF
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Trip Lever Location: Left
  • Trap Diameter: 2-1/8 inches
  • Rough-in: 10 inches
  • Certifications: WaterSense
  • Warranty: 1 Year Limited Manufacturer Warranty

Tornado Flush System

The Tornado Flush system uses a powerful, dual-nozzle flushing mechanism that creates a centrifugal rinsing action, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean with every flush. This system is both powerful and quiet, providing optimal performance while conserving water.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

The CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze is an ultra-smooth coating that prevents waste from sticking to the bowl, making it easier to clean and maintain. This feature helps keep the toilet cleaner for longer periods, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

Auto Flush and Washlet+ Ready

This model is designed to be compatible with Toto's Washlet+ bidet seats, allowing for seamless integration and enhanced hygiene. The auto flush feature adds convenience by automatically flushing the toilet after use, ensuring a hands-free experience.

Universal Height

The universal height design makes this toilet comfortable for a wide range of users, including those with mobility issues. It meets ADA height requirements, making it accessible and user-friendly.

SoftClose Seat

The included SS124 SoftClose seat provides a quiet, gentle closing action. This feature enhances the overall user experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bathroom.

Water Efficiency

With a flush rate of 1.28 gallons per flush (GPF), this toilet balances powerful performance with water conservation, helping to reduce water usage without compromising on effectiveness.

Stylish Design

The transitional design of the Drake model combines modern and traditional elements, making it a versatile choice that complements a variety of bathroom styles.

Brand Notoriety

vToto is a highly respected brand in the bathroom fixtures industry, known for its innovative and high-quality products. The Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Transitional Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.28 GPF is a prime example of their commitment to excellence. This model combines advanced technology with practical features, making it an ideal choice for homeowners seeking a reliable and efficient toilet.

Additional Features

  • TORNADO FLUSH system
  • CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze minimizes debris from sticking to ceramic surfaces
  • Elongated front bowl and tank set with SoftClose Seat
  • Chrome plated trip lever included
  • 12" Rough-In less supply
  • Covered under TOTO's 1 year limited warranty
  • Coordinates with products from the Drake line seamlessly
  • Two-piece configuration allows for easier access to the area around the toilet
  • Installs in a floor mounted configuration
  • Elongated bowl provides extra comfort, extending out an extra 1-1/2" compared to a round configuration
  • Left hand trip lever placement
  • Constructed of vitreous china ensuring durability and dependability
  • Premier finishing process – finishes will resist corrosion and tarnishing through everyday use
  • Toilet seat included with this product
  • WaterSense certified - toilet uses 20% less water than the current standard while maintaining superior performance
  • All hardware required for installation is included

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read our article on the Factors to Consider When Choosing a Toilet at our Resource Center.

description.en:
Experience Modern Comfort with the Toto Aquia IV Cube Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Universal Height Toilet with SS124 SoftClose Seat in Cotton White

By choosing the Toto Aquia IV Cube Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT Dual Flush 0.9 and 1.28 GPF, homeowners can enjoy a combination of advanced technology, superior performance, and elegant design. This toilet is an excellent investment for those looking to upgrade their bathroom with a reliable and efficient fixture.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS436124CEMFGN#01
  • Series: Aquia IV
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Configuration: Two-Piece
  • Bowl Height: Chair height
  • Installation Type: Floor mount
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 / 0.9 GPF
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Trip Lever Location: Left
  • Trap Diameter: 2-1/4 inches
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Certifications: ASME, WaterSense
  • Warranty: One Year Limited Warranty

DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH System

The DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH system uses a powerful, dual-nozzle flushing mechanism that creates a centrifugal rinsing action, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean with every flush. This system is both powerful and quiet, providing optimal performance while conserving water.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

The CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze is an ultra-smooth coating that prevents waste from sticking to the bowl, making it easier to clean and maintain. This feature helps keep the toilet cleaner for longer periods, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

Dual Flush Efficiency

With dual flush options of 0.9 and 1.28 gallons per flushconserving water without compromising performance. This makes it an eco-friendly choice that helps reduce water usage.

Auto Flush and Washlet+ Ready

This model is designed to be compatible with Toto's Washlet+ bidet seats, allowing for seamless integration and enhanced hygiene. The auto flush feature adds convenience by automatically flushing the toilet after use, ensuring a hands-free experience.

Universal Height

The universal height design makes this toilet comfortable for a wide range of users, including those with mobility issues.

SoftClose Seat

The included SS124 SoftClose seat provides a quiet, gentle closing action. This feature enhances the overall user experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bathroom.

Sleek Design

The skirted design of the Aquia IV Cube not only enhances its aesthetic appeal but also makes cleaning easier by eliminating hard-to-reach areas. Its modern look complements a variety of bathroom styles.

Brand Notoriety

Toto is a highly respected brand in the bathroom fixtures industry, known for its innovative and high-quality products. The Toto Aquia IV Cube Two Piece Elongated Auto Flush Washlet+ Ready Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT Dual Flush 0.9 and 1.28 GPF is a prime example of their commitment to excellence. This model combines advanced technology with practical features, making it an ideal choice for homeowners seeking a reliable and efficient toilet.

Additional Features

  • Concealed supply connection for seamless installation
  • DYNAMAX TORNADO FLUSH utilizes 360º cleaning power to reach every part of the bowl
  • Ultra high-efficiency dual flush 1.28 GPF / 0.9 GPF (4.8 LPF / 3.4 LPF)
  • CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze minimizes waste from sticking to porous ceramic surfaces
  • Completely skirted design for a sleek and understated look that's easier to clean
  • Universal Height
  • Chrome plated trip lever
  • 12" Rough-in
  • Elongated front bowl and WASHLET+ S7 and tank set
  • EWATER+ auto-cleans wand and bowl after every use
  • PREMIST automatically mists the bowl before each use
  • Multifunction pearl white block-style remote control
  • Night light
  • Auto flush available as upgrade

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read our articles on Factors to Consider When Choosing a Toilet at our Resource Center.

description.en:
Sleek Design Meets Eco-Friendly Innovation with the Toto Drake II Two Piece Round Toilet with Less Seat in Cotton White

The Toto Drake II Two Piece Round Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT and Right Hand Lever 1.28 GPF in Cotton White is the perfect blend of style, efficiency, and advanced technology. Whether you’re upgrading your bathroom or seeking a reliable and elegant solution, this toilet offers unparalleled performance and convenience.

Classic Two-Piece Design

The Drake II showcases a timeless two-piece design with a classic round bowl, making it a versatile and stylish choice for a wide range of bathroom aesthetics. Its sleek, compact form is perfect for smaller spaces, offering an excellent solution for bathrooms where space is at a premium. Despite its smaller size, the Drake II doesn’t compromise on comfort or functionality, delivering reliable performance and a design that blends seamlessly into both traditional and modern bathroom settings.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

Toto’s proprietary CEFIONTECT glaze creates an extraordinarily smooth, ion-barrier surface that keeps the toilet bowl cleaner for longer. This advanced glaze forms a protective layer over the ceramic, preventing waste particles, debris, and even bacteria from adhering to the surface. As a result, it significantly reduces the need for frequent cleaning while maintaining hygiene and freshness. With CEFIONTECT, your toilet not only stays spotless but also requires less effort to maintain, offering a smarter, more convenient solution for modern living.

Efficient 1.28 GPF Flush

The Drake II utilizes Toto’s Tornado Flush system, a cutting-edge flushing technology that uses a powerful 1.28 gallons per flush (GPF) to effectively clear the bowl. Unlike traditional flush systems, the Tornado Flush creates a centrifugal, cyclonic action that thoroughly cleans the bowl with every use. This high-efficiency system not only conserves water but also ensures top-tier performance, making it an eco-friendly and highly reliable choice for any bathroom. With its combination of efficiency and effectiveness, the Drake II stands out as a smart option for those seeking sustainability without sacrificing functionality.

Universal Height

The universal height design ensures that the toilet is not only comfortable for a wide range of users but also meets ADA height requirements, making it an excellent choice for both residential and commercial settings. This thoughtful design provides easy access for individuals with mobility challenges, including seniors and those who use mobility aids, ensuring a safe and user-friendly experience for everyone.

Right Hand Lever

The toilet features a convenient right-hand lever, thoughtfully designed for ease of use and smooth operation. This lever not only simplifies flushing but also enhances the overall aesthetic by adding a subtle touch of elegance to the design. Its placement on the right-hand side makes it particularly suitable for specific bathroom layouts, ensuring it fits seamlessly into your space. Additionally, this design caters to user preferences, providing a practical and stylish solution for everyday convenience.

Durable Construction

Made from high-quality vitreous china, the Drake II is designed with both durability and functionality in mind. Its robust construction not only ensures long-term reliability but also resists chipping, cracking, and wear over time. This attention to quality provides homeowners with peace of mind, knowing they’ve invested in a product that combines lasting performance with timeless craftsmanship.

Easy Installation and Maintenance

The two-piece design simplifies both installation and maintenance, making it a practical choice for any bathroom. The separate tank and bowl allow for easier handling and positioning during setup, which is especially useful in tight spaces or for DIY installations. The combination of convenience and advanced technology makes it an excellent option for homeowners seeking both functionality and ease of care.

Cotton White Finish

The toilet’s cotton white finish provides a clean and bright look that instantly elevates the ambiance of any bathroom. Its sleek, classic design complements a variety of interior styles, from modern to traditional, making it a versatile choice. This polished finish not only enhances the overall aesthetic appeal but also contributes to a fresh and inviting atmosphere in your space.

Brand Notoriety

Toto, a globally recognized leader in bathroom innovation, is renowned for its commitment to quality, sustainability, and advanced technology. With decades of experience, the brand has revolutionized the industry with its cutting-edge designs, including smart toilets, eco-friendly water-saving systems, and luxurious, user-centric features. Toto's products are crafted to enhance comfort and functionality while promoting a greener future, making it a trusted choice for homes and businesses worldwide.

Additional Features

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: CST453CEFRG#01
  • Series: Drake
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Shape: Round
  • Installation: Floor Mounted
  • Height: Universal Height
  • Configuration: Two-Piece
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 GPF
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Trapway: 2 inches
  • Lever Placement: Right
  • Certifications: ADA, ASME A112.19.2, UPC, CSA B45.1, WaterSense,
  • Warranty: 1-Year Limited Commercial Warranty
  • High profile, two-piece round bowl and tank set
  • 1.28 gallons per flush TORNADO FLUSH system with a powerful centrifugal rinse
  • TOTO's extraordinarily smooth CEFIONTECT glaze minimizes waste from sticking to porous, ceramic surfaces.
  • Right-hand chrome trip lever
  • Glazed trapway
  • Two-piece configuration allows for easier access to the area around the toilet
  • Installs in a floor mounted configuration
  • Round bowl is ideal for bathrooms with limited space
  • Constructed from vitreous china
  • This toilet is compliant with ADA standards for increased comfort and accessibility
  • WaterSense, CALGreen, and CEC compliant
  • Included parts: tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps
  • Purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, water supply lines, and toilet seat
  • Toilet seat not included with this product
  • Covered under manufacturer's 1 year limited residential warranty and a 1 year limited commercial warranty

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read about it in our article on One Piece Toilet vs Two Piece Toilets at our Resource Center.

title.en: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White
title.zh: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White
title.id: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White
title.th: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White
title.vi: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White
title.ar: Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-piece Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet with seat in Grohe Alpine White

description.en:
Eco-Friendly Innovation Meets Modern Comfort with the Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-Piece Toilet Dual Flush Elongated Toilet

Upgrade to the Grohe Essence 39674000 Two-Piece Toilets Dual Flush Right Height Elongated Toilet and enjoy the perfect blend of luxury and practicality. With its advanced features and timeless design, this toilet is an excellent addition to any modern bathroom. Trust Grohe to deliver the quality and innovation your home deserves.

Dual Flush System

The dual flush design offers versatility and efficiency by allowing you to choose between two flushing options. For heavier waste, you can opt for a full flush that uses 1.28 gallons of water, ensuring powerful performance. For lighter waste, the water-saving half flush uses just 1.0 GPF, significantly reducing water usage. This thoughtful design not only provides effective flushing but also promotes eco-friendly water conservation, helping you save resources while maintaining a clean and functional toilet system.

Right Height Comfort

The 16 1/2" bowl rim height provides added comfort and accessibility, offering an ergonomic design that makes it easier and more convenient to use for people of all ages. This thoughtful height is especially beneficial for individuals with mobility challenges, ensuring a more comfortable and inclusive experience for everyone.

Soft-Close Seat

The included soft-close seat and cover are designed to prevent slamming, providing a quiet and gentle close every time. This feature not only enhances convenience but also reduces noise, making it perfect for households where peace and quiet are valued.

Skirted Design

The sleek, skirted design not only conceals the trapway for a smoother, more seamless appearance but also eliminates hard-to-reach areas, making cleaning significantly easier. This thoughtful feature enhances the toilet's modern aesthetic, providing both style and practicality for any bathroom.

InfinaBright Coating

This durable coating is designed to significantly reduce bacteria, grime, and build-up on surfaces, helping to maintain a cleaner appearance for longer periods. With its advanced technology, it minimizes the need for constant scrubbing, making cleaning easier and more efficient while promoting a more hygienic environment.

DreamClean Technology

Experience a powerful, high-pressure rush of water that scrubs the entire bowl from top to bottom with every flush, leaving no spot untouched. This advanced flushing technology ensures a thorough clean, maintaining a fresher, more hygienic bathroom every time you use it.

EPA WaterSense Certified

This certification means the toilet has been tested and meets rigorous criteria for both water efficiency and performance. It ensures that the toilet uses less water without compromising on functionality, providing powerful flushing performance while conserving resources. By choosing a certified toilet, you can save on your water bills, contribute to sustainable water use, and reduce your overall environmental footprint. It's a simple yet impactful choice for both your home and the planet.

Brand Notoriety

With over a century of experience, Grohe has established itself as a trusted name in bathroom and kitchen fixtures. The brand is celebrated for its commitment to sustainability, cutting-edge technology, and superior craftsmanship. Grohe products are designed to enhance your home with both style and efficiency, making them a smart investment for any homeowner.

Additional Features

  • Brand: Grohe
  • MPN: 39674000
  • Series: Essence
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Alpine White
  • Shape: Elongated
  • Configuration: Two-Piece Toilet
  • Installation Type: Floor Mount
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 / 1.0 GPF
  • Trapway: 2-1/8 inches
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Features: Glazed Trapway, Dual Flush, Concealed Trapway, Soft Close, Chair Height
  • Certifications: ADA, ANSI A112.19.2, CSA, UPC, WaterSense,
  • Warranty: Limited Lifetime Manufacturer Warranty
  • Covered under Grohe's limited lifetime warranty
  • Coordinates with products from the Essence line seamlessly
  • Two-Piece Toilets configuration allows for easier access to the area around the toilet
  • Installs in a floor mounted configuration
  • Elongated bowl provides extra comfort, extending out an extra 1-1/2" compared to a round configuration
  • Top mounted push button actuator
  • Constructed of vitreous china ensuring dependability and durability
  • Premier finishing process – finishes will resist corrosion and tarnishing through everyday use
  • Concealed trapway - provides a smoother and less utilitarian appearance, a built-in skirt hides the discharge passageway from view
  • Toilet seat included with this product
  • WaterSense certified means this toilet uses 20% less water than the current standard while maintaining superior performance
  • All hardware required for installation is included
  • Clog-free siphon flushing action clears the bowl completely on the first flush
  • Soft-close seat and cover with quick-release button for easy removal and cleaning
  • InfinaBright coating reduces bacteria and build-up for a longer-lasting shine and less scrubbing
  • DreamClean features a powerful rush of water to scrub the bowl from top to bottom with every flush
  • ADA compliant
  • EPA WaterSense certified

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read our article on the Key Factors to Consider When Buying a New Toilet at our Resource Center.


Want to learn more about this Two-Piece Toilets? Read our blog about Two-Piece Toilets vs. One-Piece Toilets.

title.en: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209
title.zh: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209
title.id: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209
title.th: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209
title.vi: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209
title.ar: Toto Neorest Remote Control with Mounting Bracket for NX, AH, and RH Models - THU6209

description.en:
TOTO THU6209 NEOREST Remote Control with Mounting Bracket (NX / AH / RH)

Replace a lost or damaged controller and restore full, touch-button convenience to your NEOREST. The genuine TOTO THU6209 remote is engineered for the NX, AH, and RH series, so all toilet and bidet functions communicate correctly. A slim wall-mount bracket keeps the remote off counters and within easy reach. Setup is quick—mount the bracket, insert batteries, and pair following the model’s manual for a factory-correct experience.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: THU6209
  • Type: Genuine replacement remote control assembly for NEOREST NX / AH / RH models
  • Size/Capacity: Handheld remote; multi-function keys for cleansing, dryer, seat/lid, memory presets (model-dependent)
  • Material/Finish: Durable molded remote with matching low-profile wall bracket
  • Performance: Restores factory wireless control of supported features (spray modes, temperature, pressure, position, dryer, deodorizer, auto open/close on equipped models)
  • Connections/Fit: Intended for TOTO NEOREST NX, AH, and RH only; not interchangeable with other NEOREST families
  • Dimensions: See model manual (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Remote control and wall-mount bracket (batteries and mounting hardware per package; see contents)
  • Certifications/Compliance: OEM TOTO replacement part
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (electronics/parts; see TOTO terms)

Restore Full Function, Fast

Purpose-built for NEOREST NX, AH, and RH, this remote brings back the complete set of toilet and bidet controls your unit is designed to deliver—no guesswork on compatibility and no missing features.

Cleaner Countertops, Easier Access

The included wall bracket parks the remote where everyone can reach it, reducing drops and keeping controls dry and tidy—ideal for shared and guest baths.

OEM Reliability You Can Trust

As a genuine TOTO component, THU6209 matches factory signaling and firmware behavior for consistent, predictable operation with NX/AH/RH models over the long term.

Simple Pairing & Everyday Use

Follow the quick pairing steps in your toilet’s manual to connect in minutes. Clearly labeled buttons make daily adjustments—water temperature, spray position, pressure, dryer, and more— straightforward for all users.

Designed For The Right Models

This remote is specific to the NEOREST NX, AH, and RH series. For other NEOREST families (e.g., LS, DH, or earlier generations), order the model-specific remote listed in that unit’s parts guide.

Low-Maintenance Power

Uses standard replaceable batteries for easy upkeep—no proprietary chargers. Refer to the owner’s manual for battery type and replacement procedure for your model.

description.en:
5 Pack

The TOTO Adjustable Replacement Fill Valve Assembly for Toilet Tanks is compatible for all current TOTO toilet models. The height and refill volume can be adjusted according to your toilet tank settings, bringing your toilet back to optimal performance. The fill valve has a standard 7/8 inch inlet connection. Includes valve, refill tube, and cone washer with nut.



  • Adjustable for all TOTO toilet tanks
  • Resets your tank back to optimal performance
  • Includes valve, refill tube and clamp, cone washer and nut
  • Standard 7/8 inch inlet connection

Want to know how this fill valve can help you repair your toilet and result in increased efficiency? Check out ourarticle on replacing fill valves on our Resource Center!

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with CEFIONTECT

  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.
  • SAVE WATER WITHOUT SACRIFICE - The 1.28 GPF WaterSense certified Drake enables you to save water without worrying about diminished performance. The Drake features a wide 3 inch flush valve and a siphon jet bowl that gets the job done in one flush.
  • STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN - Update your oasis with this stylish design that couples well with any bathroom d?cor. The elongated bowl provides added space for comfort. The toilet fits into 12 inch rough-in installations and has a right-hand lever.
  • COMPLETE YOUR TOILET - Finish your purchase with the addition of a TOTO SoftClose seat or upgrade to a WASHLET bidet seat. Drake tank and bowl with hardware included. Purchased Separately: Wax ring, flange bolts, and water supply lines.

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Two-Piece Round 1.28 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with CEFIONTECT

  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.
  • SAVE WATER WITHOUT SACRIFICE - The 1.28 GPF WaterSense certified Drake enables you to save water without worrying about diminished performance. The Drake features a wide 3 inch flush valve and a siphon jet bowl that gets the job done in one flush.
  • STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN - Update your oasis with this stylish design that couples well with any bathroom d?cor. The round bowl helps to save space in your bathroom. The toilet fits into 12 inch rough-in installations and has a right-hand trip lever.
  • COMPLETE YOUR TOILET - Finish your purchase with the addition of a TOTO SoftClose seat or upgrade to a WASHLET bidet seat. Drake tank and bowl with hardware included. Purchased Separately: Wax ring, flange bolts, and water supply lines.

title.ar: Toto Adjustable Replacement Fill Valve Assembly For Toilet Tanks - TSU99A.XR - 10 Pack

description.en:
10 Pack

The TOTO Adjustable Replacement Fill Valve Assembly for Toilet Tanks is compatible for all current TOTO toilet models. The height and refill volume can be adjusted according to your toilet tank settings, bringing your toilet back to optimal performance. The fill valve has a standard 7/8 inch inlet connection. Includes valve, refill tube, and cone washer with nut.



  • Adjustable for all TOTO toilet tanks
  • Resets your tank back to optimal performance
  • Includes valve, refill tube and clamp, cone washer and nut
  • Standard 7/8 inch inlet connection

Want to know how this fill valve can help you repair your toilet and result in increased efficiency? Check out ourarticle on replacing fill valves on our Resource Center!

description.en:
10 pack

The TOTO Trip Lever in Crome is your go-to solution for seamlessly blending style and functionality in your bathroom. If you're seeking a quick and effective way to update your bathroom decor and ensure that your toilet operates flawlessly, this trip lever is the ultimate choice.

Reliable Tank Lever

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU808#12-A
  • Chrome finish is rust and corrosion resistant
  • Replacement tank lever for Carolina, Ultimate, and UltraMax toilets
  • Constructed of metal ensuring durability and dependability
  • Benefit from its durable construction and long-lasting reliability
  • Effortless installation for immediate style and functionality upgrades

Upgrade Your Bathroom with TOTO

Transform your bathroom with the TOTO Trip Lever in Chrome and elevate your space with the perfect blend of style and performance. Say goodbye to outdated trip levers and embrace a more elegant and efficient solution. Don't miss the opportunity to upgrade your bathroom with this high-quality replacement lever, ensuring a comfortable and stylish daily routine. Choose the TOTO Trip Lever in Chrome and give your bathroom the deserving upgrade it needs today.

description.en:
5 Pack

The Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever is the perfect solution to enhance the style and performance of your toilet. If you're looking for a quick and effective way to upgrade your bathroom decor and ensure that your toilet operates flawlessly, this trip lever is the ideal choice.

Reliable Toto Replacement Trip Lever

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU808#01-A
  • Rod Length: 10"
  • Compatible with Toto Styles: Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II
  • Sleek and modern design
  • Cotton White finish is chip, fade, and stain resistant
  • Made of metal for reliable performance
  • Also available in: Colonial White, Bone, Sedona Beige, Chrome-Plated, Brushed Nickel, Polished Nickel, Polished Brass
  • Effortless installation for immediate benefits
  • ADA compliant (when installed with trip lever located on the approach side)

Upgrade Your Bathroom with Toto

The Toto THU808#01-A is not just any tank lever - it's the perfect addition to complete your regular toilet. With its sleek cotton white finish, this tank lever effortlessly complements any style and design. Crafted from durable brass and other metals, the THU808#01-A ensures consistent smooth operation that will stand the test of time.

Designed as a genuine Toto replacement part, the THU808#01-A is available in 8 additional finishes to replace the Toto #THU004. It also serves as a replacement part for various Toto models including Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II.

The Toto THU808 Replacement Trip Lever for Select Model Toilets boasts a zinc alloy handle with a solid brass arm and reinforced spud assembly. This genuine Toto lever guarantees reliability and durability, restoring your Toto tank to optimal performance in no time.

Transform your bathroom with the Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever in Cotton White and experience the perfect combination of style and functionality. Upgrade your bathroom with this high-quality replacement lever, making your daily routine more comfortable and stylish. Say goodbye to outdated trip levers and hello to a more elegant and efficient space. Choose the Toto Thu808 and elevate your bathroom decor and toilet performance today.

description.en:
The TOTO Entrada Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height Toilet with Right-Hand Trip Lever offers a clean and modern high profile design. The Entrada bowl and tank set includes a tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps. The Entrada utilizes TOTO's E-max flushing system, featuring a 3� wide flush valve, extra-large siphon jet, and a large trapway. This reliable, highly efficient combination generates a powerful cleansing flush while only using 1.28 gallons of water. This version of the Entrada is designed in TOTO's Universal Height which allows for a more comfortable seat position across a wide range of users. This Entrada comes with a right-hand chrome trip lever. The Entrada is ADA compliant and meets the standards for EPA WaterSense, and California's CEC and CALGreen requirements. Additional items needed for installation and use must be purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, water supply lines, and toilet seat.

  • Purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, water supply lines, and toilet seat
  • Included parts: tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps
  • Clean, modern two-piece elongated bowl and tank set
  • E-Max 1.28 GPF flushing system, creates a powerful flush
  • Universal Height for more comfort across a broader range of individuals
  • Right-hand chrome trip lever
  • Glazed trapway
  • ADA, WaterSense, CALGreen, and CEC compliant

description.en:
Upgrade Your Bathroom with the Toto Promenade II One Piece Elongated Universal Height Toilet with SS224 SoftClose Seat in Cotton White

By choosing the Toto Promenade II One Piece Elongated Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.28 GPF, homeowners can enjoy a combination of advanced technology, superior performance, and elegant design. This toilet is an excellent investment for those looking to upgrade their bathroom with a reliable and efficient fixture.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: MS814224CEFG#01
  • Series: Promenade II
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Configuration: One-Piece
  • Bowl Height: Universal height
  • Installation Type: Floor Mounted
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 GPF
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Trip Lever Location: Left
  • Trap Diameter: 2-1/8 inches
  • Rough-in: 12 inches
  • Certifications: ASME A112.19.2, UPC, CSA B45.1,
  • Warranty: 1 Year Limited

Tornado Flush System

The Tornado Flush system uses a powerful, dual-nozzle flushing mechanism that creates a centrifugal rinsing action, ensuring a thorough and efficient clean with every flush. This system is both powerful and quiet, providing optimal performance while conserving water.

CEFIONTECT Glaze

The CEFIONTECT ceramic glaze is an ultra-smooth coating that prevents waste from sticking to the bowl, making it easier to clean and maintain. This feature helps keep the toilet cleaner for longer periods, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

Universal Height

The universal height design makes this toilet comfortable for a wide range of users, including those with mobility issues.

One-Piece Design

>

The sleek, one-piece design of the Promenade II not only enhances its aesthetic appeal but also makes cleaning easier by eliminating the gap between the tank and bowl where dirt and debris can accumulate. This design also reduces the risk of leaks that can occur with Two-Piece Toilets.

Water Efficiency

With a flush rate of 1.28 gallons per flush (GPF), this toilet balances powerful performance with water conservation, helping to reduce water usage without compromising on effectiveness.

SoftClose Seat

The included SS224 SoftClose seat provides a quiet, gentle closing action. This feature enhances the overall user experience and adds a touch of luxury to your bathroom.

Elegant Design

The Promenade II features a high-profile tank and a classic, elongated bowl that complements a variety of bathroom styles. Its timeless design makes it a versatile choice for both modern and traditional bathrooms.

Brand Notoriety

Toto is a highly respected brand in the bathroom fixtures industry, known for its The Toto Promenade II One Piece Elongated Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.28 GPF is a prime example of their commitment to excellence. This model combines advanced technology with practical features, making it an ideal choice for homeowners seeking a reliable and efficient toilet.

Additional Features

  • One-piece elongated configuration provides a uniform look and simplifies installation
  • Elongated bowl provides extra comfort, extending out an extra 1-1/2" compared to a round configuration
  • Covered under Toto's 1 year limited warranty
  • Made from vitreous china
  • Floor mounted installation
  • WaterSense certified means this toilet uses 20% less water than the current standard while maintaining superior performance
  • Decorative left-hand chrome trip lever
  • Modern, classic elongated one-piece toilet, easier to maintain versus a Two-Piece Toilet
  • Universal Height for more comfort across a broader range of individuals

Want to learn more about this toilet? Read our article on the Factors to Consider When Choosing a Toilet at our Resource Center.

The TOTO Entrada Two-Piece Round 1.28 GPF Universal Height Toilet with Right-Hand Trip Lever offers a clean and modern high profile design. The Entrada bowl and tank set includes a tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps. description.en:
Upgrade Your Bathroom with the TOTO Carlyle II MS614124CEFG#01 1.28 GPF One-Piece Elongated Toilet (WASHLET+ Ready)

Outfit master and guest baths with a sleek, skirted one-piece that saves water and cleans easier. The TOTO Carlyle II (MPN MS614124CEFG#01) pairs TORNADO FLUSH performance with the ultra-smooth CEFIONTECT glaze to help keep the bowl cleaner between scrubs. It’s WASHLET+ ready for a seamless bidet upgrade now or later, and the included SS124 SoftClose seat finishes the comfort story. Universal Height supports an easier sit-down/stand-up experience, while WaterSense-level 1.28 GPF conserves with every flush.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: MS614124CEFG#01
  • Type: One-piece elongated toilet, skirted base; WASHLET+ connection ready
  • Size/Capacity: 1.28 GPF (4.8 LPF) high-efficiency
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china in Cotton White with CEFIONTECT glaze
  • Performance: TORNADO FLUSH; min. operating pressure ~8 psi (flowing); water surface 6-7/8? × 9-3/4?
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 12? rough-in; convertible to 10? or 14? with optional UniFit adapters (TSU01W.10R / TSU01W.14R); left-hand chrome trip lever
  • Dimensions: Approx. 28-3/8? D × 16-1/2? W × 28-3/4? H; rim height 16-1/8? (Universal Height); seat height ~17-1/2?
  • Included: Toilet (one-piece) with SS124 SoftClose seat, mounting hardware & bolt caps (wax ring, floor bolts, and supply line purchased separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: EPA WaterSense; ADA (when installed per ADA); CEC & CALGreen compliant
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (toilet & seat)

Save Water Without Losing Power

The Carlyle II uses just 1.28 GPF while TOTO’s TORNADO FLUSH creates a powerful, centrifugal rinse that clears the bowl efficiently. It’s WaterSense compliant for performance with conservation in mind.

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

A comfortable elongated bowl at Universal Height supports a wide range of users. With a flowing water requirement of about 8 psi, the flushing system performs reliably in typical residential supplies, maintaining consistent, thorough cleaning each use.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT is fired to an exceptionally smooth finish to help prevent debris from sticking, so you’ll scrub less and use fewer harsh cleaners. The sleek skirted base also wipes down quickly for a tidier bathroom.

Installer-Friendly Design

Standard 12? rough-in fits most homes; need flexibility? Swap to 10? or 14? with TOTO’s optional UniFit adapters (TSU01W.10R / TSU01W.14R). The WASHLET+ connection conceals hose and cord when you add a compatible bidet seat for a clean, built-in look.

Sized Right For Your Space

At roughly 28-3/8? front-to-back and 16-1/2? wide, the Carlyle II offers generous seating without crowding the room. The 28-3/4? overall height clears most counters and the skirted sides reduce dust-catching recesses.

Smart Controls & Compatibility

This model is WASHLET+ ready. For touch-free Auto Flush, pair the toilet with a compatible WASHLET+ bidet (e.g., S7A/S7) and the appropriate TOTO auto-flush kit—see the specific WASHLET+ combo spec for details. You can install and use the toilet now, then upgrade later.

Comfort Extras Included

The package includes TOTO’s SS124 SoftClose seat to prevent slams and add comfort out of the box. Left-hand chrome trip lever and quiet, efficient operation round out daily usability.

description.en:
The TOTO Unifit 10 Inch Rough-In Outlet Adapter Trapway for Select Toilets allows compatible toilets to be converted from the standard 12 inch to a 10 inch rough-in. The PVC body is equipped with a rubber gasket for the ceramic bowl to connect. The adapter will include hardware to secure to tile or wood floors. Wax ring and floor drain bolts must be purchased to complete your installation.

  • Genuine TOTO outlet adapter
  • Adapts select TOTO toilets to a 10 inch rough-in
  • PVC body with rubber gasket
  • Hardware to secure to tile or wood floor included
  • Requires wax ring and floor drain bolts

title.en: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.zh: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.id: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.th: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.vi: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.ar: Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack

description.en:
2 Pack

Touch-Free Convenience with the Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets

Upgrade your bathroom with the Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets, a cutting-edge solution designed to enhance convenience and hygiene. This innovative unit automates the flushing process, ensuring a hands-free experience that is both efficient and sanitary.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU855
  • Material: Plastic
  • Compatible with: TOTO Washlet S7A and S7 bidet seats

The Toto Auto Flush Unit redefines bathroom convenience with its advanced, touch-free operation. Engineered with precision sensors, it automatically detects usage and delivers an efficient flush every time, ensuring unparalleled cleanliness. This innovative technology not only minimizes germ spread but also enhances convenience, making it the perfect choice for homes, workplaces, and public facilities. Built to blend hygiene with effortless functionality, the Toto Auto Flush Unit offers a reliable, hassle-free solution for maintaining a sanitary environment.

Designed specifically for dual flush toilets, this advanced unit intelligently determines whether to use a full or partial flush based on usage, ensuring maximum water conservation without compromising flushing performance. By selecting the appropriate flush volume automatically, it helps reduce water waste while maintaining efficiency and reliability. This model is compatible exclusively with dual flush 1.28 GPF and 0.9 GPF WASHLET+ toilets, making it an ideal choice for eco-conscious households seeking both functionality and sustainability.

The unit offers a durable and efficient solution for upgrading your existing toilet setup, designed with simplicity in mind. Its straightforward installation process ensures that homeowners can make the upgrade without relying on professional assistance. With clear, easy-to-follow instructions and a user-friendly design, this unit allows for a quick and seamless enhancement to your bathroom. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast or simply seeking a hassle-free solution, this dependable unit delivers both convenience and accessibility, making it an essential upgrade for any homeowner looking to improve their space.

The Toto Auto Flush Unit is a dependable and innovative solution, designed to bring efficiency and convenience to any bathroom setup. Powered by long-lasting batteries, it guarantees reliable performance�even during unexpected power outages�making it a must-have for both residential and commercial use. With its extended battery life, users can expect fewer replacements, saving valuable time and effort. Engineered for consistent functionality, this unit ensures a seamless and hassle-free experience, delivering practicality and peace of mind every time.

With its compact and unobtrusive design, the auto flush unit seamlessly integrates with your toilet, maintaining the aesthetic appeal of your bathroom while offering a modern touch. Its sleek build ensures it doesn�t take up unnecessary space, blending in effortlessly with various bathroom styles and providing a hassle-free solution for maintaining hygiene and convenience.

Toto is a globally renowned brand, celebrated for its commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability. Originating in Japan, Toto has become a household name worldwide, particularly in North America, where it is recognized for its advanced toilet technologies and stylish designs. Homeowners trust Toto for its reliable performance and eco-friendly features, making it a top choice for modern bathrooms.

Invest in the Toto Auto Flush Unit for Dual Flush Toilets and experience the ultimate in bathroom convenience and hygiene. With its advanced features and reliable performance, this unit is the perfect addition to any modern home. Enjoy a cleaner, more efficient bathroom with Toto's innovative technology.

Additional Features
  • New auto-flush kit for TOTO Washlet S7A and S7 bidet seats
  • This kit is only compatible with dual-flush TOTO (T40) toilets

title.en: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack
title.zh: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack
title.id: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack
title.th: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack
title.vi: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack
title.ar: Toto Replacement Trip Lever For Select Model Toilets, Cotton White - 2 Pack

description.en:
2 Pack

The Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever is the perfect solution to enhance the style and performance of your toilet. If you're looking for a quick and effective way to upgrade your bathroom decor and ensure that your toilet operates flawlessly, this trip lever is the ideal choice.

Reliable Toto Replacement Trip Lever

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU808#01-A
  • Rod Length: 10"
  • Compatible with Toto Styles: Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II
  • Sleek and modern design
  • Cotton White finish is chip, fade, and stain resistant
  • Made of metal for reliable performance
  • Also available in: Colonial White, Bone, Sedona Beige, Chrome-Plated, Brushed Nickel, Polished Nickel, Polished Brass
  • Effortless installation for immediate benefits
  • ADA compliant (when installed with trip lever located on the approach side)

Upgrade Your Bathroom with Toto

The Toto THU808#01-A is not just any tank lever - it's the perfect addition to complete your regular toilet. With its sleek cotton white finish, this tank lever effortlessly complements any style and design. Crafted from durable brass and other metals, the THU808#01-A ensures consistent smooth operation that will stand the test of time.

Designed as a genuine Toto replacement part, the THU808#01-A is available in 8 additional finishes to replace the Toto #THU004. It also serves as a replacement part for various Toto models including Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II.

The Toto THU808 Replacement Trip Lever for Select Model Toilets boasts a zinc alloy handle with a solid brass arm and reinforced spud assembly. This genuine Toto lever guarantees reliability and durability, restoring your Toto tank to optimal performance in no time.

Transform your bathroom with the Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever in Cotton White and experience the perfect combination of style and functionality. Upgrade your bathroom with this high-quality replacement lever, making your daily routine more comfortable and stylish. Say goodbye to outdated trip levers and hello to a more elegant and efficient space. Choose the Toto Thu808 and elevate your bathroom decor and toilet performance today.

title.en: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White
title.zh: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White
title.id: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White
title.th: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White
title.vi: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White
title.ar: Toto Drake Two Piece Elongated Tornado Flush Toilet with CEFIONTECT 1.6 GPF with Washlet+ C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White

description.en:
The TOTO Drake WASHLET+ Two-Piece Elongated 1.6 GPF TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with C2 Bidet Seat is designed to conceal the WASHLET power cord and water supply hose for a seamless installation. Part of the newly redesigned C Series, the WASHLET C2 features a soft rear spray, rear cleanse, and front cleanse with the option of an oscillating stream. The temperature and pressure of the water are adjustable with three temperature settings and five pressure settings. The controls are located on a convenient arm control panel. PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean. The C2 model utilizes TOTO's EWATER+ system when the wand self-cleans. EWATER+ transforms the water into a safe and powerful compound, creating peace of mind by cleaning the inside and outside of the wand before and after every use. The WASHLET features a heated SoftClose seat with three temperature settings. The Drake toilet features TOTO's TORNADO FLUSH, a rimless, hole-free design with dual-nozzles that creates a centrifugal washing action that assists in rinsing the bowl more efficiently. This version of the TOTO Drake includes CEFIONTECT

  • A REFRESHING CLEAN - Gentle yet powerful rear and front warm water cleansing; Adjustable temperature and pressure settings; oscillating and pulsating option creates a refreshing clean every time; WASHLET+ concealed connection for seamless integration
  • STEP INTO A LAVISH STANDARD OF LIVING ? SoftClose heated bidet seat provides consistent warmth coverage over full seat surface; Air deodorizer neutralizes bathroom odors with powerful air filters; Adjustable warm air dryer provides easy clean up
  • CLEAN INNOVATIONS OFFER PEACE OF MIND - PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean; The wand self-cleans automatically with EWATER inside and out
  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • STANDARD HEIGHT FROM FLOOR TO RIM - Standard height is shorter than TOTO's Universal Height for those that prefer not to sit as high.

description.en:
2 Pack

The TOTO Adjustable Replacement Fill Valve Assembly for Toilet Tanks is compatible for all current TOTO toilet models. The height and refill volume can be adjusted according to your toilet tank settings, bringing your toilet back to optimal performance. The fill valve has a standard 7/8 inch inlet connection. Includes valve, refill tube, and cone washer with nut.



  • Adjustable for all TOTO toilet tanks
  • Resets your tank back to optimal performance
  • Includes valve, refill tube and clamp, cone washer and nut
  • Standard 7/8 inch inlet connection

Want to know how this fill valve can help you repair your toilet and result in increased efficiency? Check out ourarticle on replacing fill valves on our Resource Center!

description.en:
Experience Innovation and Comfort with the Toto CST642CEFGAT40#01 Nexus One-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height Toilet with CEFIONTECT in Cotton White

Toto, a global leader in bathroom fixtures, presents the CST642CEFGAT40#01 Nexus One-Piece Elongated Toilet. It features Toto's TORNADO FLUSH system and CEFIONTECT Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. glaze, creating a smooth surface to keep the bowl cleaner with each flush. Known for innovative designs and quality, Toto transforms bathrooms worldwide with cutting-edge technology and sustainability.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: CST642CEFGAT40#01
  • Collection: Nexus
  • Material: Vitreous China
  • Finish: Cotton White
  • Bowl Shape: Elongated
  • Flush Rate: 1.28 GPF
  • Flush Type: Tornado
  • Minimum Water Pressure: 8 psi
  • Trap Diameter: 2-1/8 inches
  • Rough-In: 12 inches
  • Certifications: ADA, ASME A112.19.2, UPC, CSA B45.1, WaterSense,
  • Warranty: One Year Limited Warranty

Experience Toto's advanced CEFIONTECT Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. glaze, a sleek ceramic coating that prevents residue buildup. This innovation keeps your toilet cleaner longer, reducing the need for frequent cleaning and harsh chemicals. With CEFIONTECT Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. 's ion-barrier, enjoy lasting cleanliness, fewer cleanings, less chemical use, and lower water consumption.

The Nexus toilet, featuring Toto's Tornado Flush system, revolutionizes bathroom efficiency. This advanced mechanism uses two nozzles for a cyclonic rinsing action, ensuring thorough cleanliness with just 1.28 gallons per flush. The TORNADO FLUSH minimizes waste buildup, keeping the bowl clean. Its modern rim design enhances performance and simplifies maintenance.

Engineered with Universal Height, this toilet ensures a more comfortable seating position for a diverse range of users. Ideal for households with members of varying ages and mobility levels, it combines convenience and inclusivity.

The Nexus toilet's sleek, one-piece design enhances your bathroom's look and simplifies maintenance, making it a must-have for those who value style and ease. Its seamless construction eliminates the hard-to-clean gaps of Two-Piece ToiletsType of toilet where the tank and bowl are separate parts and are bolted together during installation. , where dirt can collect.

The Nexus toilet meets EPA WaterSense standards, ensuring efficient water use without compromising performance. Choosing the Nexus supports water conservation while providing a reliable flush. It's perfect for those who prioritize sustainability and reliability in home essentials. With the Nexus, you join a community that values quality and resourcefulness in daily life.

Toto's legacy of excellence is a result of decades of innovation and dedication to quality, making it a trusted choice for homeowners seeking reliable performance and advanced technology. The CST642CEFGAT40#01 Nexus One-Piece Elongated Toilet perfectly embodies these attributes, delivering a superior bathroom experience that merges functionality with style. With its elegant designs and reliable operation, Toto stands out as a leader in the industry, offering products that enhance everyday life.

Additional Features

  • 1.28 gallons per flush TORNADO FLUSH system with a powerful centrifugal rinse
  • CEFIONTECT Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. Super-smooth glaze on Toto toilets that creates a non-stick surface, making cleaning easier by repelling waste. Glaze prevents debris from sticking to ceramic surfaces, making them easier to clean
  • 12" rough-in, may be adapted for 14" rough-in
  • Specially designed to work with a T40 WASHLET?+ bidet seat for seamless integration
  • Fully Skirted design
  • Left-hand chrome trip lever
  • ADA, WaterSense, CALGreen, CEC compliant, Universal Height
  • One-piece decorative high-profile toilet
  • Elongated front bowl?
  • Chrome trip lever included

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with CEFIONTECT

  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.
  • SAVE WATER WITHOUT SACRIFICE - The 1.28 GPF WaterSense certified Drake enables you to save water without worrying about diminished performance. The Drake features a wide 3 inch flush valve and a siphon jet bowl that gets the job done in one flush.
  • STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN - Update your oasis with this stylish design that couples well with any bathroom d?cor. The elongated bowl provides added space for comfort. The toilet fits into 12 inch rough-in installations and has a left-hand trip lever.
  • WASHLET+ COMPATIBILTY FOR WHEN YOU ARE READY TO UPGRADE - This model will include the Drake tank, bowl, and SoftClose seat. Complete your toilet with an optional WASHLET+ bidet seat upgrade. WASHLET+ models enable concealment of the cord and hose.

The TOTO Drake WASHLET+ is a two-piece elongated toilet featuring a C2 bidet seat, designed for seamless installation by concealing cords and hoses. It offers adjustable water temperature and pressure, a heated SoftClose seat, and the TORNADO FLUSH system for efficient cleaning. The toilet includes CEFIONTECT

This TOTO Drake two-piece universal height elongated toilet comes with a 1.28 GPF Tornado Flush, and C2 Washlet Bidet Seat. The Washlet+ designation implies a special design aimed to accurately conceal the Washlet power cord and water supply hose for a clean look and easy installation. The WASHLET+ bidet seat system conceals the power cord and water supply hose for a clean look. It includes a WASHLET and toilet designed for easy installation that enhances your bathroom d�cor. The C2 Bidet Seat offers a luxurious experience with a warm water spray, adjustable temperature and pressure, a heated seat, and a remote control. The Washlet+ system integrates with the toilet, hiding water and electrical connections for a sleek appearance.

The sophisticated Cotton White finish brings a touch of elegance to any bathroom decor, not only enhancing its aesthetic appeal but also offering easy cleaning and maintenance. This dependable finish ensures that your bathroom stays stylish and functional, reflecting a commitment to quality and convenience.

With a water consumption rate of just 1.28 gallons per flush, this toilet exemplifies eco-friendliness and cost-effectiveness. Meeting the EPA WaterSense standards, it offers significant water savings without sacrificing performance, making it a smart choice for those who value efficiency and sustainability.

Experience gentle yet powerful cleansing with our redesigned C Series Washlet C2. This innovative toilet offers adjustable temperature and pressure settings for a refreshing clean. Enjoy oscillating and pulsating options, with soft rear, rear, and front cleanse for optimal hygiene. Customize with three temperature and five pressure settings, all from a convenient arm panel.

Elevate your bathroom experience with the SoftClose heated bidet seat, designed for ultimate comfort. Experience consistent warmth across the entire surface�a testament to its innovative design. The powerful air deodorizer effectively neutralizes odors, while the adjustable warm air dryer ensures effortless cleanup, making it a dependable choice for unmatched convenience.

Discover the power of TORNADO FLUSH, featuring dual nozzles that deliver a cyclonic rinsing action to minimize waste buildup and ensure a cleaner bowl. This high-efficiency system uses just 1.28 gallons per flush, outperforming most toilets with fewer flushes. With its sleek rimless design, TORNADO FLUSH guarantees consistent performance and easy maintenance.

EWATER+ provides a modern solution for maintaining a pristine toilet by targeting areas where waste forms stubborn stains. This system uses no harsh chemicals, ensuring microbes have nowhere to hide. With TOTO's EWATER+ and a self-cleaning wand, the C2 model is both reliable and effective. EWATER+ turns water into a disinfectant through electrolysis, automatically cleaning the wand before and after each use.

TOTO�s smooth CEFIONTECT

PREMIST sprays water over the inner toilet bowl before each use. The hydrophilic ceramic makes waste wash away more easily, as less dirt sticks to moist ceramic. Combined with anti-stick glaze, your toilet bowl seems self-cleaning. The Premist function prevents waste buildup, keeping your toilet clean and fresh.

TOTO's Universal Height toilets and sinks are designed for accessibility, comfort, and ease of use. Taller than standard models, they meet ADA requirements and accommodate users of all ages and abilities, including the elderly and those with mobility issues, enhancing bathroom accessibility and enjoyment.

TOTO is a globally recognized brand renowned for its innovation, quality, and commitment to enhancing bathroom experiences. With over a century of expertise, TOTO has become synonymous with advanced technology and superior craftsmanship in the sanitary ware industry.

The Toto Drake Washlet+ Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height Tornado Flush Toilet with C2 Bidet Seat in Cotton White is a perfect blend of innovation, efficiency, and luxury. Its advanced features and the reputable TOTO brand make it a standout choice for those seeking a high-quality, eco-friendly, and comfortable bathroom solution.

Additional Features

  • Front and rear warm water cleansing with adjustable temperature and pressure control
  • Instant water heater provides unlimited warm water
  • Heated seat with temperature control
  • Automatic air deodorizer
  • Warm air drying with three variable temperature settings
  • Convenient side arm control panel with two user settings
  • Vitreous china construction ensures durability and longevity of product
  • 1.28-gallon TORNADO FLUSH system provides effective flush
  • CEFIONTECT
  • EWATER auto cleans the wand after use
  • PREMIST sprays bowl before use
  • Universal height to better suit those with mobility issues
  • Concealed supply connection for seamless installation
  • Chrome plated trip lever
  • 12" or 10" Rough-in
  • Compatible with T40 WASHLET+ components only
  • All hardware required for installation of bidet seat is included

description.en:
The TOTO Drake WASHLET+ Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with C2 Bidet Seat is designed to conceal the WASHLET power cord and water supply hose for a seamless installation. Part of the newly redesigned C Series, the WASHLET C2 features a soft rear spray, rear cleanse, and front cleanse with the option of an oscillating stream. The temperature and pressure of the water are adjustable with three temperature settings and five pressure settings. The controls are located on a convenient arm control panel. PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean. The C2 model utilizes TOTO's EWATER+ system when the wand self-cleans. EWATER+ transforms the water into a safe and powerful compound, creating peace of mind by cleaning the inside and outside of the wand before and after every use. The WASHLET features a heated SoftClose seat with three temperature settings. The Drake toilet features TOTO's TORNADO FLUSH, a rimless, hole-free design with dual-nozzles that creates a centrifugal washing action that assists in rinsing the bowl more efficiently. This version of the TOTO Drake includes CEFIONTECT

  • A REFRESHING CLEAN - Gentle yet powerful rear and front warm water cleansing; Adjustable temperature and pressure settings; oscillating and pulsating option creates a refreshing clean every time; WASHLET+ concealed connection for seamless integration
  • STEP INTO A LAVISH STANDARD OF LIVING ? SoftClose heated bidet seat provides consistent warmth coverage over full seat surface; Air deodorizer neutralizes bathroom odors with powerful air filters; Adjustable warm air dryer provides easy clean up
  • CLEAN INNOVATIONS OFFER PEACE OF MIND - PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean; The wand self-cleans automatically with EWATER inside and out
  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • STANDARD HEIGHT FROM FLOOR TO RIM - Standard height is shorter than TOTO's Universal Height for those that prefer not to sit as high.
