description.en:
The TOTO Unifit 10 Inch Rough-In Outlet Adapter Trapway for Select Toilets allows compatible toilets to be converted from the standard 12 inch to a 10 inch rough-in. The PVC body is equipped with a rubber gasket for the ceramic bowl to connect. The adapter will include hardware to secure to tile or wood floors. Wax ring and floor drain bolts must be purchased to complete your installation.

  • Genuine TOTO outlet adapter
  • Adapts select TOTO toilets to a 10 inch rough-in
  • PVC body with rubber gasket
  • Hardware to secure to tile or wood floor included
  • Requires wax ring and floor drain bolts

description.en:
10 Pack

The Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever is the perfect solution to enhance the style and performance of your toilet. If you're looking for a quick and effective way to upgrade your bathroom decor and ensure that your toilet operates flawlessly, this trip lever is the ideal choice.

Reliable Toto Replacement Trip Lever

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU808#01-A
  • Rod Length: 10"
  • Compatible with Toto Styles: Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II
  • Sleek and modern design
  • Cotton White finish is chip, fade, and stain resistant
  • Made of metal for reliable performance
  • Also available in: Colonial White, Bone, Sedona Beige, Chrome-Plated, Brushed Nickel, Polished Nickel, Polished Brass
  • Effortless installation for immediate benefits
  • ADA compliant (when installed with trip lever located on the approach side)

Upgrade Your Bathroom with Toto

The Toto THU808#01-A is not just any tank lever - it's the perfect addition to complete your regular toilet. With its sleek cotton white finish, this tank lever effortlessly complements any style and design. Crafted from durable brass and other metals, the THU808#01-A ensures consistent smooth operation that will stand the test of time.

Designed as a genuine Toto replacement part, the THU808#01-A is available in 8 additional finishes to replace the Toto #THU004. It also serves as a replacement part for various Toto models including Carlyle, Carolina, Supreme, Ultimate, Ultramax, Eco Ultramax & Eco Supreme, Drake II, and Vespin II.

The Toto THU808 Replacement Trip Lever for Select Model Toilets boasts a zinc alloy handle with a solid brass arm and reinforced spud assembly. This genuine Toto lever guarantees reliability and durability, restoring your Toto tank to optimal performance in no time.

Transform your bathroom with the Toto Thu808 Replacement Trip Lever in Cotton White and experience the perfect combination of style and functionality. Upgrade your bathroom with this high-quality replacement lever, making your daily routine more comfortable and stylish. Say goodbye to outdated trip levers and hello to a more elegant and efficient space. Choose the Toto Thu808 and elevate your bathroom decor and toilet performance today.

description.en:
5 Pack

The TOTO Trip Lever in Sedona Beige is your go-to solution for seamlessly blending style and functionality in your bathroom. If you're seeking a quick and effective way to update your bathroom decor and ensure that your toilet operates flawlessly, this trip lever is the ultimate choice.

Reliable Tank Lever

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU808#12-A
  • Sedona Beige finish is rust and corrosion resistant
  • Replacement tank lever for Carolina, Ultimate, and UltraMax toilets
  • Constructed of metal ensuring durability and dependability
  • Benefit from its durable construction and long-lasting reliability
  • Effortless installation for immediate style and functionality upgrades

Upgrade Your Bathroom with TOTO

Transform your bathroom with the TOTO Trip Lever in Sedona Beige and elevate your space with the perfect blend of style and performance. Say goodbye to outdated trip levers and embrace a more elegant and efficient solution. Don't miss the opportunity to upgrade your bathroom with this high-quality replacement lever, ensuring a comfortable and stylish daily routine. Choose the TOTO Trip Lever in Sedona Beige and give your bathroom the deserving upgrade it needs today.

title.th: Toto Auto Flush Unit for 1.28 GPF Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.vi: Toto Auto Flush Unit for 1.28 GPF Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack
title.ar: Toto Auto Flush Unit for 1.28 GPF Toilets S7A and S7 - 2 Pack

description.en:
2 Pack

Experience Touchless Excellence with the Toto Auto Flush Unit for 1.28 GPF Toilets

Upgrade your bathroom experience with the TOTO THU857 Auto Flush Unit, designed specifically for 1.28 GPF toilets. This innovative device brings convenience and hygiene to a new level, making it a must-have for modern homeowners.

  • Brand: Toto
  • MPN: THU857
  • For Use With: T40 models with 1.28 GPF

The TOTO THU857 Auto Flush Unit is compatible with TOTO's WASHLET+ T40 toilets, specifically designed to work seamlessly with 1.28 GPF models. This ensures optimal performance and reliability, making it a perfect match for your TOTO toilet setup.

Experience advanced convenience and hygiene with the TOTO THU857 Auto Flush Unit. Designed for both residential and commercial bathrooms, this touchless system employs cutting-edge sensor technology for automatic flushing as you step away. Say goodbye to surface contact, enhancing cleanliness and maintaining a sanitary environment every use. TOTO's reputation for quality ensures consistent performance and peace of mind, while modernizing any restroom setup.

Engineered specifically for toilets using 1.28 gallons per flush (GPF), this unit is designed to help conserve water while maintaining optimal performance. By reducing water usage without sacrificing functionality, it serves as an eco-friendly choice for your home, contributing to lower water bills and a reduced environmental footprint.

The TOTO THU857 is meticulously designed for an effortless installation, providing users with a seamless setup experience. Perfectly engineered for compatibility with WASHLET+ T40 toilets, it�s the go-to choice for anyone looking to elevate their bathroom experience without the fuss of complex installations. Once in place, indulge in enhanced hygiene and comfort, all with minimal time and effort. Trusted by those who value quality and ease, TOTO delivers excellence you can count on.

This state-of-the-art auto flush unit revolutionizes bathroom hygiene by eliminating the need to touch flush handles, significantly curbing the spread of germs and bacteria. Its cutting-edge touchless technology ensures that surfaces prone to contamination are bypassed, offering a superior level of cleanliness. Ideal for high-traffic areas like public restrooms, this feature is indispensable for maintaining impeccable hygiene standards. The unit's sleek, modern design effortlessly complements any bathroom decor, enhancing both its functionality and aesthetic appeal.

TOTO is a globally recognized brand known for its commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability. With a legacy of over a century, TOTO has consistently set the standard for bathroom fixtures, earning the trust of homeowners and professionals alike. The TOTO THU857 Auto Flush Unit is a testament to the brand's dedication to enhancing everyday living through cutting-edge technology and superior craftsmanship.

Upgrade to the TOTO THU857 Auto Flush Unit and experience the perfect blend of convenience, efficiency, and hygiene. Transform your bathroom into a modern sanctuary with TOTO's trusted innovation.

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Two-Piece Elongated 1.6 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with CEFIONTECT

  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.
  • REDUCE WATER USEAGE WITHOUT SACRIFICE - The 1.6 gallon per flush Drake enables you to save water without worrying about diminished performance. The Drake features a wide 3 inch flush valve and a siphon jet bowl that gets the job done in one flush.
  • STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN - Update your oasis with this stylish design that couples well with any bathroom d?cor. The elongated bowl provides added space for comfort. The toilet fits into 12 inch rough-in installations and has a left-hand trip lever.
  • WASHLET+ COMPATIBILTY FOR WHEN YOU ARE READY TO UPGRADE - This model will include the Drake tank, bowl, and SoftClose seat. Complete your toilet with an optional WASHLET+ bidet seat upgrade. WASHLET+ models enable concealment of the cord and hose.

description.en:
The TOTO T40 Aquia IV WASHLET+ Two-Piece Elongated Dual Flush 1.28 and 0.9 GPF Toilet is the epitome of modern form and function. The Skirted Design conceals the trapway, which enhances the elegant look of the toilet and adds an additional level of sophistication. Skirted Design toilets also minimize the need to reach behind the bowl to clean the nooks and crannies of the exterior trapway. The Aquia IV features TOTO's DYNAMAX? TORNADO FLUSH , utilizing a 360 degree cleaning power to reach every part of the bowl. The enhanced design of the Aquia IV inner bowl reduces water flow resistance and turbulence, resulting in a quieter flush. The chrome center-mounted push button that sits atop the tank allows you to proactively conserve water by choosing between a 0.9 GPF rinse or 1.28 GPF for tougher jobs. This version of the Aquia IV offers TOTO T40 WASHLET+ compatibility for when you are ready to upgrade. WASHLET+ toilets feature a channel on the bowl surface to help conceal your WASHLET+ supply line and power cord for seamless integration. The Aquia IV meets the standards for EPA WaterSense, and California's CEC and CALGreen requirements. The Aquia IV comes ready for install into a 12" rough-in, but may be adapted for a 10" or 14" rough-in with the purchase of a separately sold adapter. The Aquia IV bowl and tank set includes a SoftClose seat, tank to bowl hardware, a tank to bowl gasket, outlet socket, and toilet bolt caps. Additional items needed for installation and use must be purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, and water supply lines. Compatible with T40 WASHLET+ electronic bidet seat only

  • Included parts: TOTO SS124 SoftClose seat, tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps
  • May be adapted for 10" or 14" rough-in with optional TOTO parts: TSU48.10 or TSU48.14 (sold separately)
  • 12" Rough-in
  • Lid-top chrome dual flush push button - Select 1.28 or 0.9 GPF
  • DYNAMAX? TORNADO FLUSH utilizes 360 degree cleaning power to reach every part of the bowl
  • CEFIONTECT
  • Bowl design reduces water flow resistance and turbulence, resulting in a quieter flush
  • Completely Skirted Design for a sleek and understated look and easier to clean
  • SoftClose seat included. No more slammed lids!
  • TOTO WASHLET+ upgrade compatibility: exclusively designed to work with a T40 WASHLET+ electronic bidet seat for seamless integration

description.en:
The TOTO Drake WASHLET+ Two-Piece Elongated 1.6 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with C2 Bidet Seat is designed to conceal the WASHLET power cord and water supply hose for a seamless installation. Part of the newly redesigned C Series, the WASHLET C2 features a soft rear spray, rear cleanse, and front cleanse with the option of an oscillating stream. The temperature and pressure of the water are adjustable with three temperature settings and five pressure settings. The controls are located on a convenient arm control panel. PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean. The C2 model utilizes TOTO's EWATER+ system when the wand self-cleans. EWATER+ transforms the water into a safe and powerful compound, creating peace of mind by cleaning the inside and outside of the wand before and after every use. The WASHLET features a heated SoftClose seat with three temperature settings. The Drake toilet features TOTO's TORNADO FLUSH, a rimless, hole-free design with dual-nozzles that creates a centrifugal washing action that assists in rinsing the bowl more efficiently. This version of the TOTO Drake includes CEFIONTECT

  • A REFRESHING CLEAN - Gentle yet powerful rear and front warm water cleansing; Adjustable temperature and pressure settings; oscillating and pulsating option creates a refreshing clean every time; WASHLET+ concealed connection for seamless integration
  • STEP INTO A LAVISH STANDARD OF LIVING ? SoftClose heated bidet seat provides consistent warmth coverage over full seat surface; Air deodorizer neutralizes bathroom odors with powerful air filters; Adjustable warm air dryer provides easy clean up
  • CLEAN INNOVATIONS OFFER PEACE OF MIND - PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean; The wand self-cleans automatically with EWATER inside and out
  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Transitional WASHLET+ Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF Universal Height TORNADO FLUSH Toilet with C2 Bidet Seat is designed to conceal the WASHLET power cord and water supply hose for a seamless installation. Part of the newly redesigned C Series, the WASHLET C2 features a soft rear spray, rear cleanse, and front cleanse with the option of an oscillating stream. The temperature and pressure of the water are adjustable with three temperature settings and five pressure settings. The controls are located on a convenient arm control panel. PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean. The C2 model utilizes TOTO's EWATER+ system when the wand self-cleans. EWATER+ transforms the water into a safe and powerful compound, creating peace of mind by cleaning the inside and outside of the wand before and after every use. The WASHLET features a heated SoftClose seat with three temperature settings. The Drake toilet features TOTO's TORNADO FLUSH, a rimless, hole-free design with dual-nozzles that creates a centrifugal washing action that assists in rinsing the bowl more efficiently. This version of the TOTO Drake includes CEFIONTECT

  • A REFRESHING CLEAN - Gentle yet powerful rear and front warm water cleansing; Adjustable temperature and pressure settings; oscillating and pulsating option creates a refreshing clean every time; WASHLET+ concealed connection for seamless integration
  • STEP INTO A LAVISH STANDARD OF LIVING ? SoftClose heated bidet seat provides consistent warmth coverage over full seat surface; Air deodorizer neutralizes bathroom odors with powerful air filters; Adjustable warm air dryer provides easy clean up
  • CLEAN INNOVATIONS OFFER PEACE OF MIND - PREMIST wets the surface of the toilet bowl, aiding in the removal of waste and resulting in a better clean; The wand self-cleans automatically with EWATER inside and out
  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface. CEFIONTECT
  • MORE COMFORT ACROSS A WIDER RANGE OF INDIVIDUALS - TOTO's Universal Height is taller than a standard toilet and makes sitting down and standing up easier for many people. Universal Height models are capable of meeting the ADA height requirement.

description.en:
The TOTO Drake Two-Piece Elongated 1.28 GPF TORNADO FLUSH Toilet is a beautifully designed high profile toilet. The Drake features TOTO's TORNADO FLUSH, a rimless, hole-free design with dual-nozzles that creates a centrifugal washing action that assists in rinsing the bowl more efficiently. Designed with cleanliness in mind, Drake also assists to reduce the frequency of toilet cleanings, minimizing the usage of water, harsh chemicals, and time required for cleaning. This version of the Drake has a left-hand chrome trip lever and meets the standards for EPA WaterSense, and California's CEC and CALGreen requirements. The Drake bowl and tank set includes a tank to bowl gasket, tank to bowl hardware, and toilet bolt caps. Additional items needed for installation and use must be purchased separately: wax ring, toilet mounting bolts, water supply lines, and toilet seat.

  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE WITH LESS FREQUENT CLEANING - The new Drake features TOTO's most efficient flush technology. TORNADO FLUSH swirls water in a circular pattern to fully wash the bowl surface.
  • STANDARD HEIGHT FROM FLOOR TO RIM - Standard height is shorter than TOTO's Universal Height for those that prefer not to sit as high.
  • SAVE WATER WITHOUT SACRIFICE - The 1.28 GPF WaterSense certified Drake enables you to save water without worrying about diminished performance. The Drake features a wide 3 inch flush valve and a siphon jet bowl that gets the job done in one flush.
  • STYLISH AND MODERN DESIGN - Update your oasis with this stylish design that couples well with any bathroom d�cor. The elongated bowl provides added space for comfort. The toilet fits into 12 inch rough-in installations and has a left-hand trip lever.
  • COMPLETE YOUR TOILET - Finish your purchase with the addition of a TOTO SoftClose seat or upgrade to a WASHLET bidet seat. Drake tank and bowl with hardware included. Purchased Separately: Wax ring, flange bolts, and water supply lines.

title.en: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black
title.zh: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black
title.id: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black
title.th: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black
title.vi: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black
title.ar: Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster Shower Head 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Matte Black

description.en:
Power Up Your Shower with the Hansgrohe 28496671 Clubmaster 3-Jet 2.5 GPM Shower Head — Matte Black

Step up everyday showering with the Hansgrohe Clubmaster 28496671. This compact, three-function head delivers a full 2.5 GPM for satisfying rinsing, with easy thumb-turn switching between spray modes. Flexible silicone nozzles resist mineral buildup for steady flow, and the universal 1/2″ connection threads onto most shower arms in minutes. The modern Matte Black finish coordinates with today’s bath trims and cleans with a quick wipe.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 28496671
  • Type: Multi-function fixed shower head (3-jet)
  • Size/Capacity:2.5 GPM maximum flow (U.S. standard)
  • Material/Finish: Durable construction with Matte Black finish
  • Performance: Three selectable spray modes; anti-lime silicone nozzles
  • Connections/Fit:1/2″ NPT universal shower arm connection
  • Dimensions: Face diameter and projection are layout-dependent (see manual/spec)
  • Included: Shower head only (arm and flange sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: Meets U.S. 2.5 GPM flow requirement (verify local code)
  • Warranty: Hansgrohe limited warranty (see terms)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

Switch among three spray patterns to suit the task: fuller coverage for daily rinsing, a concentrated jet for targeted cleaning, or a more massaging option for shoulders and neck.

Clean Spray, Less Maintenance

Anti-lime silicone nozzles let you rub away mineral deposits in seconds, helping maintain a consistent spray without soaking or harsh chemicals.

Installer-Friendly Design

Standard 1/2″ NPT threads make the upgrade fast—remove the old head, apply thread tape, and hand-tighten the Clubmaster onto your existing shower arm.

Sized Right For Most Showers

Compact yet capable, the head’s footprint fits alcove, tub-shower, and walk-in layouts without crowding the space; verify projection and face diameter if clearances are tight.

Modern Matte Black Finish

The Matte Black surface pairs with contemporary trims and accessories for a cohesive look and wipes clean quickly after daily use.

Reliable, Code-Ready Flow

Rated at 2.5 GPM to meet U.S. flow standards while delivering the steady performance Hansgrohe is known for—ideal for refresh projects and remodels.

title.en: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge
title.zh: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge
title.id: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge
title.th: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge
title.vi: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge
title.ar: Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 Thermostatic Cartridge

description.en:
Refresh Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 ThermoBalance II Thermostatic Cartridge

Restore precise, consistent shower temperatures with the Hansgrohe 88586000 TB-2 thermostatic cartridge—engineered for ThermoBalance II valves. This genuine cartridge lets your valve regulate temperature accurately and includes an adjustable high-temperature limit stop to help meet code and reduce scald risk. It is the direct service part for ThermoBalance II systems and installs following Hansgrohe’s service steps. Use it to bring aging showers back to smooth, reliable performance without opening the wall.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 88586000 (TB-2)
  • Type: Thermostatic Cartridge for ThermoBalance II Tub/Shower Valves
  • Size/Capacity: For ThermoBalance II two-function valves (system flow rating up to 8 GPM @ ~44–45 psi)
  • Material/Finish: Not specified (see service manual)
  • Performance: Thermostatic control with adjustable high-temperature limit stop per Hansgrohe service instructions
  • Connections/Fit: Fits ThermoBalance II rough-in valves 06623000 (without stops) and 06627000 (with stops); for use with ThermoBalance II trims. Not for iBox or ThermoBalance I/III valves.
  • Dimensions: Cartridge inserts into existing rough body (layout-dependent; see manual)
  • Included: Thermostatic cartridge assembly (follow service booklet; remove old blue sealing gasket from rough before installing)
  • Certifications: When installed in a ThermoBalance II valve: ASME A112.18.1 / CSA B125.1; IAPMO listed; UL listed (see valve listing)
  • Warranty: Hansgrohe Limited Lifetime consumer warranty; 1-year commercial (USA/Canada)

Restore Stable, Safe Temperatures

The TB-2 cartridge maintains set temperature as pressures fluctuate, helping eliminate sudden hot/cold swings. After installation you can set the integrated high-temperature limit stop to meet local code and reduce scald risk—Hansgrohe specifies a maximum shower outlet of 120 °F (112 °F in MA).

Designed for ThermoBalance II Roughs

This is the factory cartridge for ThermoBalance II systems and services rough-in valves 06623000 (no stops) and 06627000 (with stops). It is not compatible with Hansgrohe iBox Universal Plus or other series; ThermoBalance I and III use different cartridges (TB-1 88585000 / TB-3 88500000). Verify your rough before ordering.

Quick, Guided Replacement

Hansgrohe’s service booklet shows the TB-2 change-out step by step. A key callout: remove the old blue sealing gasket from the rough body before installing the new cartridge to avoid damage, then tighten the screws in the numbered sequence.

Built for Two-Function Showers

ThermoBalance II valves supply two separate outlets and are rated up to ~8 GPM at ~44–45 psi, giving plenty of capacity for a showerhead plus handshower. Per Hansgrohe, do not use this valve with a diverter tub spout. The TB-2 restores the valve’s original thermostatic performance.

Confidence in Code & Compliance

While the cartridge itself is a service part, the complete ThermoBalance II valve assembly carries third-party compliance—ASME A112.18.1/CSA B125.1, IAPMO listing, and UL listed—when installed per instructions. Using genuine TB-2 parts helps keep that compliance path intact.

Backed by Hansgrohe Warranty

Hansgrohe backs its consumer installations with a Limited Lifetime warranty (1-year for commercial), available on purchases from authorized sellers. The service page also provides tech tips and support if you need a hand during replacement.

- Replaces 30681610, 96740000

title.en: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)
title.zh: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)
title.id: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)
title.th: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)
title.vi: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)
title.ar: Hansgrohe 88500000 Thermo Balance III Thermostatic Valve Cartridge (TBIII)

description.en:
Refresh Hansgrohe 88500000 ThermoBalance III Thermostatic Cartridge (TBIII)

Bring your ThermoBalance III shower back to steady, precise temperature control. The genuine Hansgrohe 88500000 TBIII cartridge restores smooth thermostatic regulation and includes an adjustable high-temperature limit stop to help reduce scald risk. It’s a direct drop-in service part for ThermoBalance III rough valves, so you can repair from the finished wall—no tile demo. Ideal when you notice temperature drift, sudden swings, or difficulty holding a setpoint.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 88500000 (TBIII)
  • Type: Thermostatic cartridge for ThermoBalance III tub/shower valves
  • Size/Capacity: For three-function ThermoBalance III systems; system flow depends on trim (many trims list ~6.0 GPM @ 44 psi—see trim spec)
  • Material/Finish: Not specified (see service instructions)
  • Performance: Thermostatic temperature control with adjustable high-temperature limit stop
  • Connections/Fit: Fits ThermoBalance III rough-in valves 06624000 (no stops) and 06628000 (with service stops); not compatible with iBox or ThermoBalance I/II systems
  • Dimensions: Inserts into existing rough body; layout-dependent (see manual)
  • Included: Thermostatic cartridge assembly (install per Hansgrohe service booklet)
  • Certifications: When installed in a ThermoBalance III valve: ASME A112.18.1 / CSA B125.1; IAPMO listed; UL listed (see rough specification)
  • Warranty: Hansgrohe Limited Lifetime (consumer); 1-year commercial (USA/Canada)

Restore Stable, Safe Temperatures

The TBIII blends hot and cold to hold your setpoint as household pressures change. After installation, set the built-in high-temperature limit stop to meet local code and reduce scald risk for family and guests.

Engineered For ThermoBalance III Roughs

This cartridge is purpose-built for ThermoBalance III rough-in valves—use it with rough 06624000 (without service stops) or 06628000 (with service stops). Verifying the rough model before ordering avoids misfit and rework.

Three-Function Shower Control

ThermoBalance III valves integrate thermostatic control with a three-way diverter for multi-feature showers. All three outlets must be plumbed (do not plug any outlet), and the valve is not for use with a diverter tub spout—follow the piping diagram for two-feature layouts.

Front-Side Service, No Wall Demo

Replace from the finished side: remove trim, close the stops (if present), align the locator tab with the notch in the rough, and tighten the retainer screws evenly. Finalize by calibrating the safety limit stop and checking for leaks.

Durable, OEM Sealing & Feel

Genuine Hansgrohe seals and tolerances help maintain the valve’s original smooth operation and reduce nuisance drips. With periodic system flushing and clean water supply, the TBIII delivers years of dependable control.

Compliance Path Intact

While the cartridge itself is a service part, the complete ThermoBalance III assembly maintains its ASME/CSA, IAPMO and UL listings when serviced per Hansgrohe’s instructions—supporting inspection and warranty requirements.

Clear Specs, Clear Expectations

System flow is governed by the trim and supply conditions; many ThermoBalance III trims specify around 6.0 GPM at 44 psi. Always consult the trim’s specification sheet and the rough’s instructions for exact limits and piping.

description.en:
At TOTO, we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO G Series Square Two Spray Modes 8.5 inch 2.5 GPM Shower head with COMFORT WAVE and WARM SPA offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom d?cor. The convenient push button enables simplified transition between the two spray modes. Indulge yourself as the COMFORT WAVE technology releases oscillating water from six central locations, while the periphery of the shower head offers a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, full-feeling shower. Embrace yourself in warmth with TOTO's WARM SPA technology. The expertly crafted pillar of water wraps your entire body in a thin veil of water, keeping you warmer through the entire shower experience. Long lasting and durable, this shower head offers maximum flow rate of 2.5 GPM, with a generous 8.5 inch diameter spray face. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. Includes shower head and matching escutcheon. Requires the separately sold TOTO TS110MW16 or TS110MC6 rain shower arm.

  • LARGER WATER DROPLETS WITH WIDER COVERAGE - Feel refreshed with the moderate intensity of COMFORT WAVE. The special COMFORT WAVE nozzle delivers large drops of water that swing and flow with power, delivering a comfortably stimulating shower while saving water.
  • THE FEELING OF A WARM BATH, IN A SHOWER - Discover a completely new shower experience with WARM SPA. A single pillar of water keeps you warmer by following the curves of your body and enveloping you like a warm blanket.
  • EASILY CONTROL YOUR FLOW - The convenient push-button simplifies the transition between spray modes. Switch between COMFORT WAVE and WARM SPA with ease!
  • EASY CLEANING AND MAINTENANCE - The rubber nozzles are easy to clean and help prevent limescale buildup
  • LIFETIME WARRANTY - TOTO residential shower and faucets are backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty. Quality you can depend on and top notch customer service from a company you can trust.

description.en:
At TOTO, we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO G Series Round Single Spray 8.5 inch 1.75 GPM Shower head with COMFORT WAVE Technology offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom d?cor. Indulge yourself as the COMFORT WAVE technology releases oscillating water from six central locations, while the periphery of the shower head offers a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, full-feeling shower. Long lasting and durable, this shower head offers a WaterSense certified and CEC compliant maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPM, with a generous 8.5 inch diameter spray face. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. Includes shower head and matching escutcheon. Requires the separately sold TOTO TS110MW16 or TS110MC6 rain shower arm.

  • LARGER WATER DROPLETS WITH WIDER COVERAGE - Feel refreshed with the moderate intensity of COMFORT WAVE. The special COMFORT WAVE nozzle delivers large drops of water that swing and flow with power, delivering a comfortably stimulating shower while saving water.
  • EASY CLEANING AND MAINTENANCE - The rubber nozzles are easy to clean and help prevent limescale buildup
  • WATER SAVINGS WITHOUT SACRIFICING PERFORMANCE - The WaterSense certified and CEC compliant shower head uses 1.75 gallons of water per minute, offering water savings with no compromise to your shower experience.
  • COMPLETE YOUR SHOWER - Requires the separately sold TOTO TS110MW16 or TS110MC6 rain shower arm
  • LIFETIME WARRANTY - TOTO residential shower and faucets are backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty. Quality you can depend on and top notch customer service from a company you can trust.

description.en: At TOTO we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO Series Square Three Spray Modes 4 inch 1.75 GPM Handshower with Comfort Wave, Active Wave, and Warm Spa offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom decor. Handshowers offer improved comfort and flexibility over traditional fixed shower heads and allows you to direct water flow right where you need it to create a revitalizing experience unlike any other. The one-hand click button allows an effortless transition between Comfort Wave, Active Wave, and Warm Spa spray modes. TOTO Comfort Wave technology releases water from four central locations with an oscillating stream, while the periphery offers a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, fuller-feeling shower. TOTO Active Wave technology create a swirling stream and generates stronger stimulation without the need for extra water volume. The spray provides a more invigorating, eye-opening shower experience. Embrace yourself in warmth with TOTO Warm Spa technology. The expertly crafted pillar of water wraps your entire body in a thin veil of water, keeping you warmer through the entire shower experience. Long lasting and durable, this handshower offers a WaterSense certified and CEC compliant maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPM. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. Handshower hose and mount sold separately.Features and BenefitsStylish handshower allows you to direct water flow right where you need itWaterSense certified maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPMBalanced COMFORT WAVE technology for a wide coverage rinse and washRejuvenating ACTIVE WAVE technology for a strong, amplified wavy jet sprayBathing shower WARM SPA for a soothing, body enveloping rinseOne-hand click button to effortlessly switch between spray modesRubber nozzles to prevent limescale build upMeets 2018 California water efficiency appliance CEC regulationsHandshower hose and other accessories sold separatelySpecification SheetParts ManualInstallation ManualWarranty Document

We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO Series Round Three Spray Modes 4 inch 1.75 GPM Handshower with Comfort Wave, Active Wave, and Warm Spa offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom decor. Handshowers offer improved comfort and flexibility over traditional fixed shower heads and allows you to direct water flow right where you need it to create a revitalizing experience unlike any other. TOTO Comfort Wave technology releases water from four central locations with an oscillating stream, while the periphery offers a standard spray-type flow. description.en:
Amazon.com The Envi Eco Performance rainshower showerhead in chrome (view larger). Choose a calming rain rinse function or self-pressurized spray (view larger). Channel water pressure into a total-body, rain-soaking experience with the Envi Eco Performance two-function rainshower showerhead, which features Moen's exclusive Immersion technology--a self-pressurizing system that increases the force and flow of water delivery. This showerhead is WaterSense certified to help you conserve water without sacrificing performance, delivering a maximum flow of 2.0 gallons per minute. The Envi showerhead offers a transitional style to coordinate with a variety of Moen faucet collections. This version comes in an a chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome and brushed nickel and oil rubbed bronze. (It's also available in a 2.5 gpm water flow version in several other finishes.) The 8-inch Envi showerhead enables you to personalize your shower experience. With a flick of a lever, you can concentrate water flow to just 30 nozzles or expand it to flow out of as many as 100 for a calming rain rinse. Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, green and sustainability are not just words in our vocabulary. Making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. Immersion Rainshower Technology Step into the shower and wash your cares away with a rainshower showerhead that provides enough pressure to deliver an invigorating, full-body shower. Moen's Immersion rainshower technology channels water through a spoke design, concentrating and magnifying the water's natural force, dramatically enhancing the showering experience. In addition to an exceptional experience, Immersion showerheads also feature rubber spray formers, making it incredibly easy to clean away mineral deposits. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen S6320EP Envi two-function rainshower showerhead At a Glance S6320EP Envi Two-Function Rainshower Showerhead Choose either a calming rain rinse function or a self-pressurized spray Self-pressurizing Immersion rainshower technology with three times more spray power Transitional style coordinates with a variety of Moen faucet collections Maximum flow of 2.0 gpm; WaterSense certified 8-inch diameter spray head rainshower Chrome finish creates a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look Limited lifetime warranty Product Description Enjoy a rainshower experience you can control with the Moen Velocity Two-Function 8-Inch Diameter Eco-Performance Rainshower Showerhead. Equipped with innovative Immersion technology, this 8-inch rainshower delivers exceptional spray power and pressure. Immersion's self-pressurizing system channels water into a circular pattern for consistent, substantial water pressure. This rainshower showerhead lets you adjust water flow with the flip of a lever, so you can choose between a full spray or concentrated rinse. And thanks to its attractive design and highly reflective chrome finish, this rainshower complements a variety of styles. From the Manufacturer The rain shower experience that you can control is available in the Envi showerhead with Immersion technology. A flip of a lever allows either a calming rain rinse function or a self�pressurized spray. Moen's advanced, self�pressurizing Immersion rain shower technology channels water through the showerhead with three times more spray power than most rain showers. With our LifeShine finish this kit is guaranteed not to tarnish, corrode or flake off. This Envi showerhead meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance at 2.0 gpm (7.6 l/min) max.

  • 8-inch diameter rainshower showerhead delivers expansive water coverage
  • Immersion self-pressurizing technology increases spray power for a thorough rinse
  • Adjustable water flow lets you easily switch between concentrated and rain rinse modes
  • Meets epa WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance

description.en:
Amazon.com The Eva Roman tub faucet and hand shower in chrome (view larger). Timeless appeal (view larger). Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, Moen's Eva bathroom collection features tapered, sophisticated lines to deliver a look that will never go out of style. This Eva two-handle high arc roman tub faucet comes with a four-function hand shower. Pair it with other items from Moen's Eva range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories. This version comes in a chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look, and it's also available in brushed nickel and oil rubbed bronze. The levers have hot and cold temperature indicators, and they rotate to increase flow (counterclockwise for hot and clockwise for cold). The single-function hand shower has a maximum flow of 2.5 gallons per minute (gpm). This set is ADA compliant. Note that this set does not include a valve; it is compatible with Moen valve models 9792, 9793, 9796, and 9797. M-Pact Common Valve System With Moen, changing your bath and shower faucet style is as easy as changing a light bulb. Install any of Moen's M-Pact-compatible faucets once, and you can upgrade the style at any point in the decorating or construction process--or switch style years down the road--without replacing any faucet plumbing. All changes can be made above the deck or in front of the wall. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen T944 Eva two-handle high arc roman tub faucet and hand shower; installation instructions At a Glance T944 Eva Two-Handle High Arc Roman Tub Faucet and Hand Shower Transitional design that will never go out of style Chrome finish creates a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look Two�handle lever design for ease of use Four�function hand shower Conventional deck mount design Does not include valve Limited lifetime warranty Product Description With flowing curves, the Eva collection's transitional design is pure and organic. Petal-like handles and swan-like spout bring a relaxed feeling to the bath. From the Manufacturer The Eva collection offers an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal. With tapered, sophisticated lines, Eva delivers a look that will never go out of style. Valve 9992 not included in this set; see Moen Part Number T944-9992 for kit that includes valve.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 9792, 9793, 9796, or 9797 to complete installation
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Coordinates with other faucets and accessories in the Eva Collection

description.en:
Amazon.com The 90 Degree one-function rainshower showerhead in chrome (view larger). Brings a clean, minimalist aesthetic to your bathroom (view larger). With its ultra-contemporary styling, the Moen 90 Degree Eco-Performance one-function rainshower showerhead brings a clean, minimalist aesthetic to your bathroom. It meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance with its maximum flow of 1.75 gallons per minute (gpm). This version comes in a brushed nickel finish to create a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome. It offers Moen's advanced, self-pressurizing Immersion technology, which channels water through the showerhead with three times more spray power than most rainshowers. This showerhead offers a single full spray function, features a brass swivel ball assembly, and measures 6-3/16-inches square. Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, green and sustainability are not just words in our vocabulary. Making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. Immersion Rainshower Technology Step into the shower and wash your cares away with a rainshower showerhead that provides enough pressure to deliver an invigorating, full-body shower. Moen's Immersion rainshower technology channels water through a spoke design, concentrating and magnifying the water's natural force, dramatically enhancing the showering experience. In addition to an exceptional experience, Immersion showerheads also feature rubber spray formers, making it incredibly easy to clean away mineral deposits. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen S6340EP 90-Degree Eco-Performance one-function rainshower showerhead, installation instructions At a Glance S6340EP 90-Degree Eco-Performance One-Function Rainshower Showerhead Chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look Self-pressurizing Immersion rainshower technology with three times more spray power Invigorating single-function full spray mode WaterSense certified with maximum 1.75 gpm flow rate Limited lifetime warranty Product Description With ultra�modern styling, the 90 Degree collection is a study in minimalism. Geometric forms, squared corners and straight lines create an urban focal point for today's contemporary baths. From the Manufacturer With its ultra-contemporary styling, 90-Degree brings a clean, minimalist aesthetic to the home.

  • 6" diameter spray head rainshower for exceptional water coverage
  • meets epa WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance
  • advanced, self�pressurizing technology channels water through the showerhead with three times more spray power for a more thorough rinse
  • one�function full spray

description.en: At TOTO, we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. Were committed to improving peoples lives and for over a century, weve made products that do just that. The TOTO G Series Round Single Spray 8.5 inch 2.5 GPM Shower head with COMFORT WAVE Technology offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom decor. Indulge yourself as the COMFORT WAVE technology releases oscillating water from four central locations, while the periphery of the shower head offers a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, full-feeling shower. Long lasting and durable, this shower head offers maximum flow rate of 2.5 GPM, with a generous 8.5 inch diameter spray face. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. Includes shower head and matching escutcheon. Requires the separately sold TOTO TS110MW16 or TS110MC6 rain shower arm.

description.en: At TOTO we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO Series Square Single Spray 4 inch 1.75 GPM Handshower with Comfort Wave Technology offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom decor. Handshowers offer improved comfort and flexibility over traditional fixed shower heads and allows you to direct water flow right where you need it to create a revitalizing experience unlike any other. Indulge yourself as the Comfort Wave technology releases oscillating water from four central locations, while the periphery offers a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, fuller-feeling shower. Long lasting and durable, this handshower offers a WaterSense certified and CEC compliant maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPM. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. Handshower hose and mount sold separately.Features and BenefitsStylish handshower allows you to direct water flow right where you need itWaterSense certified maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPMBalanced COMFORT WAVE technology for a wide coverage rinse and washRubber nozzles to prevent limescale build-upMeets 2018 California water efficiency appliance CEC regulationsHandshower hose and other accessories sold separatelySpecification SheetParts ManualInstallation ManualWarranty Document

description.en: At TOTO we design simple, brilliant, and elegant solutions for basic human needs where every innovation and detail is designed with you in mind. We're committed to improving people's lives and for over a century, we've made products that do just that. The TOTO Series Cylindrical Single Spray 1.75 GPM Handshower with Comfort Wave Technology offers a modern and sleek design that coordinates with any bathroom decor. Handshowers offer improved comfort and flexibility over traditional fixed shower heads and allows you to direct water flow right where you need it to create a revitalizing experience unlike any other. Indulge yourself as the Comfort Wave technology releases oscillating water from the jets as well as a standard spray-type flow. This provides you with a wide, fuller-feeling shower. Long lasting and durable, this handshower offers a WaterSense certified and CEC compliant maximum flow rate of 1.75 GPM. The rubber nozzles help to prevent limescale buildup. TOTO creates a clean, relaxed, and refreshing lifestyle by designing for every part of the bathroom and striving to bring more to every moment you spend there. description.en:
The DELTA; In2ition; 2-in-1 shower features a detachable handshower which can be used separately from or simultaneously with the showerhead. This integrated dual functionality gives you maximum flexibility without sacrificing warmth, as you can choose to have water streaming from the showerhead only, the handshower only or both the showerhead and handshower at once. DELTA; H2OKinetic; PowerDrench; showers look different because they are different. H2OKinetic; showers are powered by an innovative technology that sculpts the water into a unique wave pattern, giving you the feeling of more water without using more water and creating a shower with more warmth, coverage and intensity. So go ahead and Indulge, because now you can enjoy the feeling of more water without using more water. While products may gather unsightly mineral build up over time, DELTA; soft rubber Touch-Clean; spray holes allow any mineral residue to simply be wiped away for an instantly refreshed look - with no need for soaking or the aid of chemical cleaners. The pause setting gives you Ample space for shaving, lathering and shower tasks, without worrying about overspray or water waste. This spray setting helps you conserve water, so you can worry less about depleting your supply of hot water - and you help the environment too. DELTA; WaterSense; labeled faucets, showers and toilets use at least 20% less water than the industry standard saving you money without compromising performance.

  • The In2ition Two-in-One Shower gets water where you need it most using the integrated shower head and hand shower separately or together
  • Perfect for bathing loved ones and pets as well as keeping the inside of your shower and tub clean
  • H2Okinetic Shower technology sculpts water into a unique pattern, forming a powerful drench spray
  • Gives you the feeling of more water without using more water
  • MagnaTite Docking uses a powerful integrated magnet to hold your In2ition Two-in-One Shower Head precisely in place for easy docking every time
  • Soft, rubber Touch-Clean spray holes allow you to easily wipe away calcium and lime build-up from the spray face of your shower head and hand shower with the touch of a finger
  • Installs in minutes

description.en:
Elevate Your Shower Experience with Hansgrohe's 28496821 Clubmaster 3 Spray Shower head in Brushed Nickel

Elevate your shower experience with our 3.7-inch diameter shower head, meticulously designed to enhance your daily routine. Featuring three distinct spray modes?gentle rain, invigorating massage, and refreshing mist?it delivers a personalized, spa-like retreat in your own bathroom. Crafted with precision, our shower head blends style and functionality, transforming your bathroom into a haven of relaxation and rejuvenation. Enjoy the perfect balance of pressure and coverage, ensuring a luxurious and satisfying shower every time.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 28496821
  • Series: Clubmaster
  • Material: Brass
  • Finish: Brushed Nickel
  • Flow Rate: 2.5 Gallons per Minute
  • Shape: Round
  • Diameter: 3-5/8 inches
  • Connection: 1/2 inches FPT
  • Certifications: UPC, Low Lead

The solid brass shell offers exceptional longevity and durability, making it a reliable choice for any bathroom. A convenient rubber boot simplifies installation, while the brushed nickel finish adds a versatile touch to complement various bathroom styles.

Discover an exceptional shower experience with this luxurious and invigorating shower head. With three spray options, it meets all your needs. Immerse in a soothing rain shower to ease daily stress or choose the invigorating massage spray to rejuvenate tired muscles. The full spray envelops you in a wide, luxurious cascade, while the pulsating spray delivers a targeted massage to relieve soreness. End your day with the gentle spray for a calming touch.

Enhance your shower with our anti-limescale silicone spray nozzles. Featuring 72 easy-to-clean nozzles, they optimize water flow and require little maintenance. The self-cleaning function ensures peak performance. Enjoy even water distribution and elevate your routine with this reliable solution.

Effortlessly upgrade your shower experience by quickly mounting to your existing 6-inch or 9-inch shower arm. Just remove your old shower head and easily install the new one. With a 26-degree range, it offers perfect angle adjustment for your preferences. Customize your shower's angle for maximum comfort and enjoyment.

Compatible with a diverse range of shower trim styles, this product seamlessly integrates into your existing bathroom decor, enhancing both functionality and aesthetic appeal. Trust in its versatility to elevate your space while maintaining reliability and style.

With a 2.5 GPM flow rate, this shower head provides a consistent stream, even at lower pressures, ensuring a satisfying shower every time. This rate ensures excellent water distribution, making each shower refreshing and complete.

Hansgrohe, a top German brand, has led bathroom fixtures for over a century, known worldwide for quality and innovation. Choosing Hansgrohe means choosing craftsmanship and dependability. The Hansgrohe Clubmaster Shower head shines with its elegance, functionality, and reliability. Elevate your daily shower with this exceptional fixture.

Additional Features

  • 3 spray settings include full shower, pulsating massage and soft aerated shower settings for versatility
  • 2.5 GPM waterflow rate helps provide a steady flow of water
  • Includes 72 no-clog spray channels
  • Solid brass construction
  • Self-cleaning system for easy maintenance
  • Includes a rubber boot for your convenience
  • 1/2" female inlet

title.en: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome
title.zh: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome
title.id: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome
title.th: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome
title.vi: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome
title.ar: Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome

description.en:
Hansgrohe 15862001 Features and Product Details

  • Product: Hansgrohe Pressure Balance Trim with Diverter
  • Shower Trim Finish: Chrome
  • Material: Constructed from high-grade, durable metal
  • Handle Style: Featuring a Lever handle style that combines elegance with ease of use.
  • ADA Compliant: Fully compliant with the Americans with Disabilities Act, ensuring accessibility for all users.
  • Integrated Diverter: Incorporating a diverter that allows for two distinct functions, our design permits the simultaneous operation of outlets.
  • cUPC Certification: Adheres to the rigorous standards of the Uniform Plumbing Code (UPC), National Plumbing Code of Canada, and International Plumbing Code (IPC).
  • Required Parts: This product requires an iBox universal rough, with service stops, ¾" for operation.
  • Optional Accessories: Augment your shower experience with our 1" Extension Kit, iBox Universal Plus Rough.
  • Installation Type: Wall Mount
  • Number of Functions: Two separate functions for comprehensive control of your shower experience.
  • Pressure Balance Control: Perfectly designed for maintaining a consistent water temperature in showers, mitigating the risk of accidental scalding.

Product Specs

  • Product Dimensions: W 6 3/4" x H 6 3/4" x D 3 7/8" frame.
  • Valve Trim Dimensions: This Hansgrohe Shower Trim measures 6-3/4" (top to bottom) x 6-3/4" (left to right).
  • Flow Rate: 4.5 GPM (17 L/Min).
  • Rough-In Valve: Please note the rough-in valve is sold separately.
  • Installation Hardware: All necessary hardware for installation is included

Product Description

Introducing the Hansgrohe 15862001 Ecostat Pressure Balance Trim Square with Diverter in Chrome, a notable addition to Hansgrohe's renowned Ecostat Collection. This pressure balance trim showcases a commitment to superior bathroom solutions, combining high quality and advanced technology. Its impressive flow rate of 4.5 GPM (17 L/Min) ensures optimal water efficiency while maintaining exceptional performance.

Experience the pinnacle of German engineering and world-class design with this Hansgrohe shower valve.

title.en: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black
title.zh: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black
title.id: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black
title.th: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black
title.vi: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black
title.ar: Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black

description.en:
Transform Your Shower Experience with the Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black

Hansgrohe stands for innovation, quality, and design excellence in plumbing. With over a century of experience, it leads in high-performance, attractive bathroom fixtures. The Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black exemplifies this legacy, providing style, functionality, and durability.

  • Brand: Hansgrohe
  • MPN: 15724671
  • Series: Ecostat Square
  • Shape: Square
  • Installation Type: Wall Mounted
  • Size: 2-3/8 inches (L) x 5-7/8 inches (W) x 6 inches (H)
  • Material: Brass, Plastic
  • Finish: Matte Black
  • Flow Rate: 5.5 gallons per minute
  • Handle Style: Lever
  • Certifications: ADA,
  • Warranty: 1-year commercial warranty

Experience ultimate shower comfort with advanced pressure balance technology! This innovation guarantees a consistent water temperature, eliminating sudden changes. Enjoy a safer, more comfortable shower every time.

The matte black finish gives your bathroom a modern, sophisticated look, resisting fingerprints and water spots to keep it pristine with ease. High-quality FinishPlus colors turn your shower into a stylish spa experience, all from one source. The sleek, square design of this trim pairs beautifully with modern bathroom aesthetics, making it a perfect choice for those looking to upgrade their space with a touch of elegance.

Hansgrohe products are renowned for their quality and durability. Crafted from high-quality materials like a robust brass handle and durable plastic trim plate, the Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim resists corrosion and wear, providing reliable performance that homeowners can trust.

Designed for the iBox Universal Plus Rough valve, the Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim is easy to install and works with various plumbing setups. The square, concealed Ecostat Square thermostats offer sleek design and comfort in compact spaces.

Choosing the Hansgrohe 15724671 Ecostat Square Pressure Balance Trim in Matte Black means investing in a product that combines cutting-edge technology, superior materials, and timeless design. Transform your bathroom into a sanctuary of comfort and style with Hansgrohe’s exceptional craftsmanship.

Additional Features

  • Temperature and volume control for one outlet
  • Bypass for use with diverter-type tub spouts
  • High-quality pressure balanced cartridge controls the water flow, volume, and temperature
  • The use of the iBox Universal Plus Rough reduces in-wall vibration and resulting noise during use
  • Brass internal components compliment a polymer trim plate for a surface that is resistant to dents, chemical corrosion, and mineral accumulation
  • Premier finishing process ensures finish will resist rusting and corrosion through everyday use
  • Includes handle, sleeve, function block, and escutcheon
  • Rough 01850 required and sold separately
  • Covered under Hansgrohe's limited lifetime warranty for residential installations

title.en: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel
title.zh: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel
title.id: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel
title.th: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel
title.vi: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel
title.ar: Hansgrohe 26864821 Rainfinity Handshower 130 3-Jet, 2.5 GPM in Brushed Nickel

description.en:
The contrast of the brushed nickel outer and the large, gray 5-inch spray disc sets the Rainfinity 130 3-spray handshower apart from the rest. Brushed nickel is a perfect finish to compliment materials such as tile. The Rainfinity collection creates a unique bathroom that becomes a safe haven in the home. The Rainfinity 130 3-spray handshower from hansgrohe pampers users with three different spray modes: PowderRain produces thousands of gentle and silky droplets that envelop your body in a soft spray, Intense PowderRain a concentrated spray to invigorate and wake you up in the morning, and MonoRain, the pure, focused spray mode ? perfect for a soothing, feel-good shower. Users can switch between all spray modes at the touch of a button with hansgrohe Select. The Rainfinity handshower features a standard 1/2-inch connection, making it quick and easy to install.

  • THOUGHTFUL DESIGN: The handshower features a sleek brushed nickel body with a large, 5-inch black metal spray face
  • STYLE VERSATILITY: Compatible with the hangrohe Rainfinity shower collection, adding bold style to your shower
  • RANGE OF SPRAY MODES: This handshower features 3 sprays: PowderRain - a luxurious rain shower that evelops you in a soft spray, Intense PowderRain - an invigorating spray of fine droplets tha helps wake you up in the morning, and Mono - a focused jet for a soothing, feel-good shower.
  • WATER FLOW: The 2.5 GPM flow rate provides thorough water flow
  • SIMPLE TO CLEAN: The easy-to-clean anti-limescale silicone spray nozzles optimize water flow performance and can be quickly wiped clean
  • EASY SHOWER ACCESS: The flexibility of a handshower makes it easy to clean your entire shower
  • EASY INSTALLATION: hansgrohe handshowers are easy to install, simply take your old shower head or handshower off and replace it with your new one. If replacing a shower head, a hose and Shower arm mount are required.
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: Requires a showerhose and Shower arm mount fo installation (sold separately)
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product. Matching shower hose (Part No. 28286823) and handshower mount (Part No. 04580820) sold separately.
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
Defined by its sleek profile and designed to soothe and satisfy, the GROHE Rainshower SmartActive Hand Shower features three essential spray functions with fingertip control. This intuitive hand shower delivers an invigorating Rain spray, a stress-reducing ActiveMassage spray, and a Jet spray for a post-workout power shower. Engineered with the GROHE SmartTip control to switch between sprays with fingertip ease, this slim, minimalist design is enhanced by an ergonomic handle for a secure, comfortable grip.

  • GROHE SmartTip control button, conveniently located on back of hand shower, lets you switch from Rain to Jet to ActiveMassage sprays with just a touch of your fingertip
  • GROHE DreamSpray delivers utmost precision and consistent water distribution to each individual nozzle
  • SpeedClean integrated anti-lime system makes it easy to wipe away limescale residue from nozzles with your fingertip
  • Easy to install on any shower hose for a quick update
  • Limited lifetime warranty

description.en:
The Pulsify shower collection by hansgrohe offers a revitalizing shower experience for every bathroom, budget, and style. Pulsify's distinctive spray face features concentric rings of integrated spray channels and features the PowderRain spray mode. The Pulsify collection includes everything from overhead showers to wallbar sets that make designing your shower easy. The Pulsify collection is available in 3 finishes: Chrome, Matte Black, and Brushed Nickel to perfectly match your bathroom decor.

  • THOUGHTFUL DESIGN: Angle-adjustable holder pivots left and right, slides easily and locks in place
  • AT THE PERFECT HEIGHT: Overall height of -inches allows a wide positioning range of the connected hand held shower
  • PREMIUM FINISH: Designed to match hansgrohe Pulsify collection finishes
  • HOSE INCLUDED: For simplicity, the included Techniflex shower hose matches perfectly with hansgrohe hand held shower heads
  • EASY ADJUSTMENT: The included hand held shower holder slides effortlessly along the wall bar and pivots left and right
  • STRONG AND SECURE: Constructed using brass material and mounts to the wall using anchors and screws
  • EASY SHOWER ACCESS: The flexibility of a handshower makes it easy to clean your entire shower
  • WATER FLOW: The 2.5 GPM flow rate provides thorough results
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: Consumer purchases of hansgrohe products from authorized sellers are covered by a limited lifetime manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
Defined by its sleek profile and designed to soothe and satisfy, the GROHE Rainshower SmartActive Hand Shower features three essential spray functions with fingertip control. This intuitive hand shower delivers an invigorating Rain spray, a stress-reducing ActiveMassage spray, and a Jet spray for a post-workout power shower. Engineered with the GROHE SmartTip control to switch between sprays with fingertip ease, this slim, minimalist design is enhanced by an ergonomic handle for a secure, comfortable grip.

  • GROHE SmartTip control button, conveniently located on back of hand shower, lets you switch from Rain to Jet to ActiveMassage sprays with just a touch of your fingertip
  • GROHE DreamSpray delivers utmost precision and consistent water distribution to each individual nozzle
  • SpeedClean integrated anti-lime system makes it easy to wipe away limescale residue from nozzles with your fingertip
  • Easy to install on any shower hose for a quick update
  • Limited lifetime warranty

description.en:
The GROHE SPA Rainshower Aqua Body Spray elevates your showering experience with its choice of spray options and sleek design. The Rainshower Aqua Body Spray delivers soothing GROHE Rain or invigorating ActiveJet sprays. Slim and unobtrusive, it has a low 3/8" profile to complement the clean lines of today?s modern shower. Easy to use, the body spray pops out when the water is turned on and can be rotated to desired spray pattern. Adjust spray angle for personal preference. Once the water is turned off, the body spray will quietly retract back into the wall for a clean, flush look.

  • Compact design is 3" across for an uncluttered look
  • Gentle GROHE Rain and ActiveJet spray patterns
  • GROHE EcoJoy 0.9gpm (3.3 l/min) maximum flow rate is engineered to use less water yet deliver great performance
  • GROHE DreamSpray delivers precise, consistent water distribution from every nozzle
  • Speed Clean allows easy removal of limescale on nozzles with your fingertip
  • Features GROHE StarLight, a durable coating that wipes clean and maintains finish for life
  • Rough-in included

description.en:
Amazon.com Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, the Moen Eva collection's tapered, sophisticated lines will never go out of style. This high-arc Roman tub faucet in chrome features a two�handle lever design for ease of use and a conventional deck mount design. It is ADA compliant. The Eva high-arc Roman tub faucet in chrome (view larger). Note that this faucet does not include a valve. M�Pact Common Valve System With Moen, changing your bath and shower faucet style is as easy as changing a light bulb. Install any of Moen's M�Pact-compatible faucets once, and you can upgrade the style at any point in the decorating or construction process--or switch style years down the road--without replacing any faucet plumbing. All changes can be made above the deck or in front of the wall. Warranty This Moen Eva is backed by a limited lifetime warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects to the original consumer purchaser. For commercial installations, it's backed by a 5-year limited warranty. What's in the Box Moen Eva Roman tub faucet, installation instructions Product Description Accent your bathroom with the flowing curves and classic charm of the Moen Eva Two-Handle High-Arc Roman Tub Faucet without Valve. Available in three attractive finishes, this faucet features a high-arc swan-like spout and two convenient petal-like lever handles that give you control of water temperature and flow. The faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system that makes it easy to update your trim kit without touching the plumbing. With a transitional design and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, the Moen Eva Two-Handle High-Arc Roman Tub Faucet adds a classic touch to any three-hole bath. *Moen Two-Handle Roman Tub Valve sold separately. From the Manufacturer The Eva collection offers an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal. With tapered, sophisticated lines, Eva delivers a look that will never go out of style. Valve 4992 not included in this set; see Moen Part Number T943-4992 for kit that includes valve.

  • The deck mount tub faucet has a high-arc spout that provides more clearance
  • Installation requires Moen valve 9792, 9793, 9796, or 9797 (sold separately)
  • Oil rubbed bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, old world finish with striking light and dark accents
  • The Roman tub faucet has a two-handle lever design for easy use

Available in three attractive finishes, this faucet features a high-arc swan-like spout and two convenient petal-like lever handles that give you control of water temperature and flow. The faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system that makes it easy to update your trim kit without touching the plumbing. With a transitional design and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, the Moen Eva Two-Handle High-Arc Roman Tub Faucet adds a classic touch to any three-hole bath. *Moen Two-Handle Roman Tub Valve sold separately. From the Manufacturer The Eva collection offers an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal. With tapered, sophisticated lines, Eva delivers a look that will never go out of style. Valve 4992 not included in this set; see Moen Part Number T943ORB-4992 for kit that includes valve.

  • TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Moen bathtub faucet has two lever handles that make it easy to adjust the water
  • UNIQUE FINISH: Oil-rubbed bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, Old World finish with striking light and dark accents
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 4792, 4793, 4794, 4796, 4797, or 4798 to complete installation
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing

title.en: Toto LB Two-Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim with Handshower, Polished Chrome - TBS01202U#CP
title.zh: Toto LB Two-Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim with Handshower, Polished Chrome - TBS01202U#CP

title.ar: Toto LB Two-Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim with Handshower, Polished Chrome - TBS01202U#CP

description.en:
Add sophistication and elegance to your bathtub with the TOTO LB Two Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim with Handshower. Incorporating flowing curves and arches to create a luxurious design for any bathroom d?cor. With the purchase of the separately sold connection tubes, the tub filler is adjustable for various width installations; allowing flexibility and versatility within your bathroom space. The LB tub spout uses low-conductivity materials for parts that comes into contact with the handle. This safe design inhibits the heat flow, keeping the handle from getting too warm. The double levers allow for complete control over water volume and temperature. Included items: spout, handles and handshower mount and hose. Purchased separately: TBN01202U rough-in valve, connection tubes, and compatible handshower.

  • Elegant Two Handle Deck-Mount Roman tub filler with handshower
  • Lever handles allow control over temperature and volume
  • Solid brass construction with durable corrosion resistant finish
  • Safe design, low-conductivity materials keep handles from getting too warm
  • Requires TOTO TBN01202U four hole tub filler rough-in, connecting tubes and handshower sold separately
  • Recommended Handshower modes TBW01009U4, TBW01011U4, TBW02016U4, TBW01019U2, TBW01020U2

description.en: With its smooth organic lines and a modern twist on a classic design, the TOTO Two-Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim will set the standard for every day beauty. With the purchase of the separately sold connection tubes, the tub filler is adjustable for various width installations, allowing flexibility and versatility within your bathroom space. The GS tub spout uses low-conductivity materials for parts that come into contact with the handle. This safe design inhibits the heat flow, keeping the handle from getting too warm. The double levers allow for complete control over water volume and temperature. Included items: spout and handles. description.en: Inspired by culture, the TOTO Global Balance Two-Handle Roman Tub Filler Trim fits perfectly within the TOTO design philosophy of "Understated, but Essential" by blending premium quality and performance. The TOTO GB Two-Handle Deck-Mount Roman Tub Filler Trim redefines the standard by incorporating minimalistic and classical elements to create an eye-catching, yet simple addition to your bathroom. The solid construction and gentle edges offer a sophisticated and durable bathroom fixture. The tub spout features a solid brass construction and a laminar flow which ensures an evenly distributed water stream. With the purchase of the separately sold connection tubes, the tub filler is adjustable for various width installations, allowing flexibility and versatility within your bathroom space. The double levers provide easy handling and complete control over water volume and temperature. Designed with low-conductivity materials for parts that come into contact with the handle. This safe design inhibits the heat flow, keeping the handle from getting too warm. Included items: spout and handle mount. Purchased separately: TBN02201U three-hole rough-in valve and connection tubes.Features and BenefitsDeck-Mount widespread tub fillerLever handles offers control over temperature and volumeSolid brass construction with durable corrosion resistant finishSafe design, low-conductivity materials keep handles from getting too warmBold and refined designRequires TOTOBN02201U three hole tub filler rough-in and connecting tubes sold separatelySpecification Sheet
