description.en:
Elevate your bathroom with the sleek sophistication of the Moen T961BL Gibson Two-Handle Wall-Mount Roman Tub Faucet Trim in Matte Black. This eye-catching fixture is designed to make a bold statement while delivering reliable performance. Inspired by contemporary architecture, the Gibson collection features sharp angles and clean lines that blend effortlessly with modern bath decor. The matte black finish adds a striking touch, offering a perfect balance of elegance and edge that resists fingerprints and water spots for a clean, polished look. This two-handle trim provides precise control over water temperature and volume, giving you a luxurious and personalized bath experience. Designed for use with the Moen M-PACT common valve system (sold separately), it allows you to update your trim in the future without having to replace any plumbing. The wall-mount design not only creates a streamlined look but also frees up deck space around your tub, making it ideal for minimalist or spa-inspired bathrooms. Crafted with Moen's commitment to quality, this faucet trim is built to last and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty. With its durable construction, easy installation, and stunning matte black finish, the Moen T961BL is the ideal choice for homeowners or designers looking to add a modern, luxurious touch to their tub area.

  • CUSTOMIZABLE WATER FLOW: The Moen Gibson Roman Tub Faucet allows for customizable water flow, providing a tailored and indulgent bathing experience
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Can be installed between 8" to 16" for a more customized widespread installation
  • EYE-CATCHING: Matte Black finish makes a bold statement
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This deck mount tub faucet requires valve #4792, 4793, 4794, 4796, 4797, or 4798 to complete installation

description.en:
Amazon.com Featuring a contemporary design with a low arc spout for a conventional look, the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low Arc Roman Tub Faucet is an easy and inexpensive way to give your bathroom an update. ADA compliant and boasting a LifeShine finish for long-term durability and tarnish-free performance, this low arc roman tub faucet is part of Moen's line of coordinated Brantford accessories and fixtures. User-Friendly, Two-Handle Design is ADA Compliant With a two-handle design for better temperature control and ease of operation, the Brantford is low-key and user-friendly. For added convenience, it's ADA compliant, which means it's safe and easy to use for everyone. M-PACT for Easy Updates The Brantford offers Moen's common valve system, M-PACT. Install it once, and you can upgrade style at any point in the decorating or construction process without replacing any faucet plumbing. LifeShine Finish Won't Tarnish or Flake--Ever Built to last, the Brantford has a LifeShine non-tarnish finish. Use it every day. Clean it as you wish. You'll never scrub or wear off the beauty of a LifeShine finish. It gives you the designer touch of polished brass with the durability of chrome, and is guaranteed for life not to tarnish, corrode or flake. Warranty Information Moen's Brantford faucets are backed by a limited lifetime warranty. Moen warrants to the original consumer purchaser for as long as the purchaser owns their home and guarantees this showerhead will be leak and drip free during normal use. All parts and finishes of this faucet will be free from defects in material and manufacturing workmanship. All other purchasers, including purchasers for industrial, commercial and business use, are warranted for a period of five years from the original date of purchase. What's in the Box Faucet trim and instructions. Valve sold separately. Product Description Give your bathroom a polished traditional touch with the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low-Arc Roman Tub Faucet without Valve. Designed with intricate architectural details, the Brantford faucet features a tapered spout, globe finial, and two lever handles that give you control of water temperature and flow. The faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system that makes it easy to update your trim kit without touching the plumbing. Its LifeShine brushed nickel finish resists flaking and corroding for the lifetime of the faucet. With a universal appeal and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low-Arc Roman Tub Faucet adds durable style to any three-hole bath. *Moen Two-Handle Roman Tub Valve sold separately. From the Manufacturer The Brantford collection features a traditional style giving your home a beautiful look and timeless appeal. Valve 4992 not included in this set; see Moen Part Number T4943-4992 for kit that includes valve. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 4792, 4793, 4794, 4796, 4797, or 4798 to complete installation
  • TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Two�handle lever handles make it easy to adjust the water
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing

description.en:
Amazon.com Featuring a contemporary design with a low arc spout for a conventional look, the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low Arc Roman Tub Faucet is an easy and inexpensive way to give your bathroom an update. ADA compliant and boasting a LifeShine finish for long-term durability and tarnish-free performance, this low arc roman tub faucet is part of Moen's line of coordinated Brantford accessories and fixtures. User-Friendly, Two-Handle Design is ADA Compliant With a two-handle design for better temperature control and ease of operation, the Brantford is low-key and user-friendly. For added convenience, it's ADA compliant, which means it's safe and easy to use for everyone. M-PACT for Easy Updates The Brantford offers Moen's common valve system, M-PACT. Install it once, and you can upgrade style at any point in the decorating or construction process without replacing any faucet plumbing. LifeShine Finish Won't Tarnish or Flake--Ever Built to last, the Brantford has a LifeShine non-tarnish finish. Use it every day. Clean it as you wish. You'll never scrub or wear off the beauty of a LifeShine finish. It gives you the designer touch of polished brass with the durability of chrome, and is guaranteed for life not to tarnish, corrode or flake. Warranty Information Moen's Brantford faucets are backed by a limited lifetime warranty. Moen warrants to the original consumer purchaser for as long as the purchaser owns their home and guarantees this showerhead will be leak and drip free during normal use. All parts and finishes of this faucet will be free from defects in material and manufacturing workmanship. All other purchasers, including purchasers for industrial, commercial and business use, are warranted for a period of five years from the original date of purchase. What's in the Box Faucet trim and instructions. Valve sold separately. Product Description Give your bathroom a polished traditional touch with the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low-Arc Roman Tub Faucet without Valve. Designed with intricate architectural details, the Brantford faucet features a tapered spout, globe finial, and two lever handles that give you control of water temperature and flow. Available in three attractive finishes, the faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system that makes it easy to update your trim kit without touching the plumbing. With a universal appeal and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, the Moen Brantford Two-Handle Low-Arc Roman Tub Faucet adds durable style to any three-hole bath. *Moen Two-Handle Roman Tub Valve sold separately. From the Manufacturer The Brantford collection features a traditional style giving your home a beautiful look and timeless appeal. Valve 4992 not included in this set; see Moen Part Number T4943ORB-4992 for kit that includes valve. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

  • TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Two deck mounted lever handles make it easy to adjust the water
  • UNIQUE FINISH: Oil-Rubbed Bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, Old World finish with striking light and dark accents
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 4792, 4793, 4794, 4796, 4797, or 4798 to complete installation
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing

description.en:
Moen Wallmount Tub Fillers feature a simplistic, single-handle design and sleek 10-inch spout for an elevated design and flexible installation around freestanding tubs. The product includes separate temperature and volume control, and a separate tub spout that can be mounted in different locations to fit a wide range of bathroom layouts, which allows you to customize your space to meet your design needs. The Wallmount Tub Filler is available with 12 suite-matching styles to allow you to match your other Moen bathroom fixtures, faucets and accessories for a cohesive design that puts the finishing touches on a dream bathroom. The Wallmount Tub Filler also includes several key features that give plumbers more flexibility when installing in hard-to-reach areas, or on multiple walls so you have more options when installing a freestanding tub.

  • CUSTOMIZED LOOK: Mount the valve and spout at separate locations, providing the ultimate customization of your space
  • SPOUT REACH: 10-inch, ultra-thin profile tub spout provides ample spout length to accommodate a wide range of tub placements and tub lips
  • EFFICIENT: High-flow cartridge flows at 8 gpm to accommodate to fill larger freestanding tubs faster
  • FLEXIBLE INSTALLATION: Features a 180-degree rotating valve and a spout shank that can rotate 360 degrees, providing freedom to install tub fillers in hard-to-reach areas, or on multiple walls

Wall mounted tub spouts provide a sleek, minimalistic design and enable simplified cleaning. description.en:
With subtly upturned spout and handles, the Stryke; Bath Collection radiates confidence and composure with an assured stature and ascending contours. Designed to be integral to both your bathroom's everyday use and personalized style, Stryke's robust design breathes intrigue into any space in your home. With separate handles for volume and temperature control, this Delta; tub/shower provides a more refined showering experience. Simply set the water at your preferred temperature and turn the shower on or off with the volume control handle - without interrupting your set temperature. Delta pressure-balance valves use Monitor; Technology to protect you and your family from sudden temperature changes. You can install with confidence, knowing that Delta faucets are backed by our Lifetime Limited Warranty.

  • Lumicoat Finishes are guaranteed to resist water spots and mineral buildup and easily wipe clean without chemicals or cleaners on the product's most commonly touched areas
  • Trim kit only, must order MultiChoice Universal Valve separately to complete the unit
  • Control volume and water temperature independently with two separate handles for more refined control of your shower experience
  • All parts replaceable from the front of the valve
  • Red/blue pad print temperature indicator on the shower escutcheon
  • ADA Compliant metal lever handle
  • Monitor pressure balance valve keeps water temperature within a safe �3 degrees F (�1.6 degrees C), helping to protect you from sudden changes in hot or cold water pressure

description.en:
Versatile style meets clean curves in the Velum; Bath Collection to provide a beautifully modern aesthetic perfect for both contemporary and transitional bathrooms. Delta; showers with Monitor; pressure-balance valves are engineered to make sure you don't experience a sudden and possibly unsafe change in water temperature as a result of running water elsewhere, such as using a dishwasher, flushing a toilet or running a washing machine. WaterSense; labeled faucets, showers and toilets use at least 20% less water than the industry standard - helping you save water without compromising performance. You can install with confidence, knowing Delta; products are backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty.

  • Single spray setting: Full Spray
  • Monitor pressure balance valve keeps water temperature within a safe �3.6 degrees F (�1.7 degrees C), helping to protect you from sudden changes in hot or cold water pressure
  • Soft, rubber Touch-Clean spray holes allow you to easily wipe away calcium and lime buildup from the spray face of your shower head and hand shower with the touch of a finger
  • ADA Compliant
  • WaterSense labeled shower heads use at least 20% less water than the industry standard without compromising performance

Delta; showers with Monitor; pressure balance valves are engineered to make sure you don't experience a sudden and possibly unsafe change in water temperature as a result of running water elsewhere, such as using a dishwasher, flushing a toilet or running a washing machine. While products may gather unsightly mineral buildup over time, soft rubber Touch-Clean; spray holes allow any mineral residue to simply be wiped away for an instantly refreshed look - with no need for soaking or the aid of chemical cleaners. WaterSense; labeled faucets, showers and toilets use at least 20% less water than the industry standard - helping you save water without compromising performance. You can install with confidence, knowing Delta; products are backed by our Limited Lifetime Warranty.

  • 10-inch square raincan shower head with single spray setting
  • Soft, rubber Touch-Clean spray holes allow you to easily wipe away calcium and lime buildup from the spray face of your shower head and hand shower with the touch of a finger
  • Back-to-back installation capability
  • ADA Compliant

description.en: Inspired by culture, the TOTO GF Two lever Handle Roman Tub Filler Trim fits perfectly within the TOTO design philosophy of Understated, but Essential by blending premium quality and performance. The solid construction and cascading curves offer a beautiful and durable bathroom fixture. The tub spout features a solid brass construction and a laminar flow which ensures an evenly distributed water stream. With the purchase of the separately sold connection tubes, the tub filler is adjustable for various width installations, allowing flexibility and versatility within your bathroom space. The double levers provide easy handling and complete control over water volume and temperature. Designed with low-conductivity materials for parts that come into contact with the handle. This safe design inhibits the heat flow, keeping the handle from getting too warm. ADA compliant. Included items: spout and handle mount. Purchased separately: TBN02201U three-hole rough-in valve and connection tubes.

title.vi: Hansgrohe 04775830 Joleena Tub Spout with Diverter in Polished Nickel
title.ar: Hansgrohe 04775830 Joleena Tub Spout with Diverter in Polished Nickel

description.en:
Whether you're starting your day with a shower or winding down with a hot soak, Joleena will elevate the experience and seamlessly weave it in with the rest of your day. The tub spout perfectly coordinates with the entire Joleena bath and shower collection. It features a diverter, making it the ultimate pairing with the Joleena Pressure Balance Shower Trim (04779xxx). Transform your bathroom into a cleaner and more polished part of your home with the Joleena Collection by hansgrohe.

  • ELEGANT DESIGN: German design and engineering delivers consistent performance for all your bath needs
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid brass construction ensures a long product life
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The Joleena tub spout is a perfect match to the hansgrohe Joleena bathroom collection, which provides an elegantly transitional style
  • UNIVERSAL RETROFIT: This tub spout can be easily fitted to an existing bathroom setup, making updating your shower quick and easy
  • CONFIGURATION: Built-in diverter; must be paired with a pressure balance shower trim
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: This tub spout features a 1/2-Inch female connection and includes a 3/4-Inch male connection adaptor if needed
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
Whether you're starting your day with a shower or winding down with a hot soak, Joleena will elevate the experience and seamlessly weave it in with the rest of your day. The tub spout perfectly coordinates with the entire Joleena bath and shower collection. It features a diverter, making it the ultimate pairing with the Joleena Pressure Balance Shower Trim (04779xxx). Transform your bathroom into a cleaner and more polished part of your home with the Joleena Collection by hansgrohe.

  • ELEGANT DESIGN: German design and engineering delivers consistent performance for all your bath needs
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid brass construction ensures a long product life
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The Joleena tub spout is a perfect match to the hansgrohe Joleena bathroom collection, which provides an elegantly transitional style
  • UNIVERSAL RETROFIT: This tub spout can be easily fitted to an existing bathroom setup, making updating your shower quick and easy
  • CONFIGURATION: Built-in diverter; must be paired with a pressure balance shower trim
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: This tub spout features a 1/2-Inch female connection and includes a 3/4-Inch male connection adaptor if needed
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
Product Description From finishes that are guaranteed to last a lifetime, to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Bring elegance to your home with premium selections from Moen. From the sophistication of period traditional to the streamlined refinement of minimalist contemporary, you'll find a host of amazing ways to express your style with products from Moen. From the Manufacturer Moen's stylish bathroom collections, available in a variety of on-trend finishes, feature single and double-handle bathroom sink faucets, Roman tub faucets, Garden tub faucets, bidets, and tub and shower trim. Replace your bathroom faucet or shower with a new faucet from Moen and enjoy modern style and convenience. Moen's innovative showering systems feature luxurious showerheads, body sprays, and shower faucets, all in a variety of styles and configurations. Coordinating bathroom accessories complete the style of Moen's bath collections. Accessories include decorative tank levers, towel bars, pivoting paper holders, towel rings, shelves, robe hooks, mirrors, toothbrush holders and soap/lotion dispensers to coordinate with Moen's bathroom faucet sets. Moen's complete bathroom collections range in style from traditional to modern, encompassing all styles in between. Whether your bath features clean Old World styling or more clean, contemporary decor, Moen has a bathroom collection to suit your tastes.

  • Oil rubbed bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, old world finish with striking light and dark accents
  • 7-inch length
  • 5-1/2-inch clearance
  • 1/2-inch slip fit CC connections

description.en: The Moen Genta LX Two Handle Deck Mounted Modern Roman Tub Faucet has a sophisticated Matte Black finish, a perfect blend of style and functionality for your bathroom oasis. This exquisite bathroom faucet is designed to elevate your bathing experience with its sleek, modern aesthetic and superior performance. Crafted with precision, the Genta LX faucet is a testament to Moen's commitment to quality and innovation, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a luxurious upgrade to their bathtub faucet setup. The Moen Genta LX faucet is not just a bathroom faucet; it's a statement piece that transforms your bathroom into a contemporary sanctuary. Its two-handle design offers precise control over water temperature and flow, ensuring a comfortable and personalized experience every time you use it. The matte black finish adds a touch of sophistication and modernity, making it a versatile addition to any bathroom decor. Engineered for durability and ease of use, the Genta LX faucet is a reliable choice for those who value both style and substance. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting performance, while the easy-to-install design makes it a convenient choice for homeowners and professionals alike.

description.en:
Colinet, is a highly distinctive suite that perfectly complements any bath by providing a wide decor style reach depending on its finish. In chrome and brushed nickel, Colinet is tailored traditional. In brushed gold, it's the epitome of glamour. In matte black, it defines industrial chic. Its name is inspired by "colonnette," which is a small, slender column in architectural design.

  • EVERYDAY LUXURY: Brushed Gold finish features a mix of classic gold tones and modern brushed texture, adding sophisticated, contemporary glamour to any room
  • PRACTICAL DESIGN: 7-3/4 in. tub spout length
  • LONGSTANDING DURABILITY: Corrosion-resistant metal construction
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Coordinates with Moen Colinet bath faucets and accessories

description.en:
Product Description From finishes that are guaranteed to last a lifetime, to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Bring elegance to your home with premium selections from Moen. From the sophistication of period traditional to the streamlined refinement of minimalist contemporary, you'll find a host of amazing ways to express your style with products from Moen. From the Manufacturer Moen's stylish bathroom collections, available in a variety of on-trend finishes, feature single and double-handle bathroom sink faucets, Roman tub faucets, Garden tub faucets, bidets, and tub and shower trim. Replace your bathroom faucet or shower with a new faucet from Moen and enjoy modern style and convenience. Moen's innovative showering systems feature luxurious showerheads, body sprays, and shower faucets, all in a variety of styles and configurations. Coordinating bathroom accessories complete the style of Moen's bath collections. Accessories include decorative tank levers, towel bars, pivoting paper holders, towel rings, shelves, robe hooks, mirrors, toothbrush holders and soap/lotion dispensers to coordinate with Moen's bathroom faucet sets. Moen's complete bathroom collections range in style from traditional to modern, encompassing all styles in between. Whether your bath features clean Old World styling or more clean, contemporary decor, Moen has a bathroom collection to suit your tastes.

  • Brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look
  • 7.25-inch length
  • 5-1/2-inch clearance
  • 1/2-inch slip fit CC connections

title.en: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.zh: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.id: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.th: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.vi: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White
title.ar: Toto 17" X 14" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink, Cotton White

description.en:
Elevate Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT569#01 17″ × 14″ Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink — Cotton White

A clean, rimless oval that slips neatly under the counter, the TOTO LT569#01 gives small and mid-size baths a timeless, easy-to-clean upgrade. The generously wide basin (17″ × 14″) with a concealed front overflow supports ADA installations when mounted at the proper height. Vitreous china construction resists stains and everyday wear, and the included mounting hardware and template simplify a precise fit. For stone tops, add TOTO sealing kit THU410 (sold separately).

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT569#01
  • Type: Undermount oval bathroom sink (undercounter lavatory)
  • Size/Capacity: Basin 17″ W × 14″ D; overall 19-1/4″ W × 16-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ADA-compliant installation when mounted per guidelines
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation; THU410 sealing kit recommended for marble/granite (sold separately)
  • Dimensions: Cutout/template provided; verify counter reveal per manual
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications: ADA (when installed per ANSI A117.1 clearances)
  • Warranty: One-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can See

The LT569’s 17″ × 14″ bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space without crowding compact vanities, and the concealed front overflow keeps the look clean from the user’s view.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china offers a smooth, glossy surface that resists staining and wipes down quickly—ideal for busy family baths and light-commercial restrooms.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

TOTO includes a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For stone counters (granite/marble), use TOTO THU410 sealing kit to ensure a proper bond and seal.

Sized Right For Your Vanity

With overall dimensions of 19-1/4″ W × 16-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H, the LT569 fits many 24″+ vanities while leaving room for faucet supply lines and a standard 1-1/4″ drain. Always confirm with the template before cutting.

ADA-Ready When Installed Correctly

Meet ADA/ANSI A117.1 requirements by setting counter height and front setback per guidance—ideal for accessible single-user and shared restrooms.

Reliable Drain Compatibility

A standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain opening pairs with common grid or pop-up assemblies, making it easy to match your faucet line and finish.

description.en:
Elevate Your Space with the TOTO LT579G#12 Rendezvous Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your vanity a smooth, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO Rendezvous LT579G#12. This oval undermount lavatory delivers a clean, rimless look with a concealed front overflow, while TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean. The warm Sedona Beige (#12) finish pairs naturally with brushed, bronze, and chrome fixtures. A paper template and mounting hardware simplify layout and installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops per the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT579G#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Comfortable oval bowl for everyday use (see template for exact bowl size)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ultra-smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Overall and cutout are template-dependent (confirm reveal before cutting)
  • Included: Sink, installation template, and mounting hardware (stone-top sealing kit sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china finished with CEFIONTECT® helps resist buildup and makes routine cleaning faster—ideal for busy family baths and guest spaces.

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The oval bowl offers comfortable hand-washing space without crowding the deck, and the concealed front overflow keeps the user view clean and uncluttered.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit for a proper bond.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The undercounter design frees up deck space and fits common vanity sizes; verify cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to compliant counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige complements warm stones and metal finishes, making coordination with faucets and accessories effortless across the bath.

description.en:
Refresh Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT542G#01 19″ × 12-3/8″ Rectangular Undermount Sink — Cotton White, CEFIONTECT

Give compact vanities a clean, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO LT542G#01. This rectangular undermount lav pairs a sleek, rimless look with a space-efficient 19″ × 12-3/8″ bowl—great for powder rooms and narrow countertops. TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while the concealed front overflow keeps the aesthetic tidy. A paper template and mounting hardware simplify layout and installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops as noted in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT542G#01
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 19″ W × 12-3/8″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® micro-smooth glaze helps resist buildup so routine cleaning takes less effort—ideal for busy households and guest baths.

Everyday Comfort In A Compact Footprint

The 19″ × 12-3/8″ basin maximizes usable bowl space without crowding smaller counters, delivering comfortable hand-washing in powder rooms and narrow vanities.

Clean, Concealed Overflow

A front overflow hidden from view preserves the minimalist look while providing protection against accidental overfilling during everyday use.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The compact rectangle sits neatly in many 24″+ cabinets, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath the counter.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to the proper counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation manual.

Bright, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Cotton White pairs easily with chrome, nickel, or matte black faucets and accessories for a fresh, coordinated bath design.

description.en:
Transform Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT597G#12 Dantesca 21-1/4″ × 17-1/4″ Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your bath a clean, timeless upgrade with the TOTO Dantesca LT597G#12. This oval undermount lavatory pairs a generous bowl with a sleek rimless look and a concealed front overflow. The CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while ADA-capable installation makes it a smart choice for shared and accessible spaces. A paper template and mounting hardware are included for a precise fit, with an optional sealing kit for stone countertops.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT597G#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Overall 21-1/4″ W × 17-1/4″ D × 7-1/2″ H; bowl approx. 19″ × 15″
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; ADA-compliant when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template; confirm reveal before cutting countertop
  • Included: Sink, installation template, and mounting hardware (for wood tops)
  • Certifications: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable (installation-dependent)
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Vitreous china with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze creates an ultra-smooth surface that helps resist buildup, reducing cleaning effort while keeping the basin looking new.

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The 19″ × 15″ bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space without crowding smaller vanities. A concealed front overflow keeps the look clean from the user’s view.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware for wood countertops. For granite or marble, use TOTO sealing kit THU410 (sold separately) to ensure a proper bond and seal.

Sized Right For Your Vanity

The 21-1/4″ × 17-1/4″ footprint works well on 24″+ vanities, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath.

Accessible When Installed Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when mounted to the correct counter height and clearance per ANSI A117.1—ideal for shared and multi-user baths.

Finish That Complements Warm Palettes

TOTO’s Sedona Beige pairs naturally with warm stone tops and brushed or bronze metal finishes for a cohesive design across the bath.

description.en:
Optimize Your Vanity with the TOTO LT542G#12 19″ × 12-3/8″ Rectangular Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige, CEFIONTECT

Give your vanity a sleek, easy-care upgrade with the TOTO LT542G#12. This rectangular undermount lavatory pairs a clean, rimless look with a compact 19″ × 12-3/8″ bowl—great for tight vanities and powder rooms. TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® glaze helps the vitreous china surface stay smoother and easier to clean, while the concealed overflow maintains a tidy aesthetic. A paper template and mounting hardware streamline installation; use the TOTO sealing kit for stone tops as directed in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT542G#12
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 19″ W × 12-3/8″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china with CEFIONTECT® glaze; color Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (sealing kit for stone tops sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Vitreous china fired with TOTO’s CEFIONTECT® micro-smooth glaze helps resist buildup so routine cleaning takes less effort—ideal for busy households and guest baths.

Everyday Comfort In A Compact Footprint

The 19″ × 12-3/8″ basin maximizes usable bowl space without crowding small countertops, delivering comfortable hand-washing in powder rooms and narrow vanities.

Clean, Concealed Overflow

A front overflow hidden from view preserves the minimalist look while providing protection against accidental overfilling during everyday use.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and mounting hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The compact rectangle sits neatly in many 24″+ cabinets, leaving room for faucet supplies and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly beneath the counter.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to the proper counter height and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation manual.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige complements warm stones and brushed or bronze metals, making it easy to coordinate with faucets and accessories across the bath.

description.en:
Elevate Your Bathroom with the TOTO LT931#01 Lloyd Rectangular Undermount Sink — Cotton White

Give your vanity a clean, modern upgrade with the TOTO Lloyd LT931#01. This rectangular undermount lavatory delivers a sleek, rimless look with a generous, easy-to-use basin and a concealed front overflow to keep the aesthetic tidy. Durable vitreous china in Cotton White wipes clean quickly and pairs with a wide range of faucet finishes. Use the included template to confirm your cutout and reveal before installation.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT931#01
  • Type: Rectangular undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Rectangular basin for everyday hand-washing (exact bowl size: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean surface
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Overall and cutout dimensions are template-dependent (verify prior to cutting)
  • Included: Sink and installation template (mounting method varies by countertop; see manual)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA capability depends on installation height/clearances
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

The rectangular bowl maximizes usable space for comfortable hand-washing and daily routines, while the hidden overflow keeps the user view clean and uncluttered.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

High-gloss vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so the basin stays bright with simple, non-abrasive cleaning.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

The included template speeds layout and helps you set the preferred counter reveal. Follow the manual for proper support and sealing based on your countertop material.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The low-profile, undercounter design frees up deck space and fits well in common vanity sizes; confirm cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain.

Clean, Coordinated Finish

TOTO’s Cotton White complements chrome, nickel, or matte black faucets and accessories, making it easy to coordinate the entire bath.

Accessible When Installed Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when mounted to compliant counter heights and knee-clearance dimensions—see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

title.ar: Toto Promenade Rectangular Self-Rimming Drop-In Bathroom Sink For 8 Inch Center Faucets, Cotton White

description.en:
Refresh Your Vanity with the TOTO LT531.8#01 Promenade Rectangular Drop-In Sink — 8″ Centers, Cotton White

Give your bath a timeless update with the TOTO Promenade rectangular self-rimming sink, model LT531.8#01. Designed for 8″ widespread faucets, this drop-in lavatory offers a clean, traditional look with a generous rectangular bowl that’s comfortable for daily use. Durable vitreous china in Cotton White resists stains and wipes clean easily, while the raised rim helps contain splashes. A straightforward drop-in installation makes it a smart choice for refresh projects and new tops alike.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT531.8#01
  • Type: Self-rimming (drop-in) rectangular bathroom sink for 8″ widespread faucets
  • Size/Capacity: 8″ (203 mm) three-hole faucet spread; standard lavatory bowl
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Integrated overflow; smooth, easy-clean glaze
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ O.D. drain connection; three-hole deck for widespread faucet
  • Dimensions: Overall and bowl dimensions see TOTO spec sheet/template (counter cutout is template-dependent)
  • Included: Sink; installation template (hardware needs are layout-dependent)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA capability depends on installation height/clearances
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Classic Style, Everyday Comfort

The Promenade’s rectangular bowl provides comfortable hand-washing space with a traditional raised rim that helps keep splashes on the deck—not on the floor. Its clean lines pair well with both vintage and transitional bath designs.

Easy, Drop-In Installation

Designed for a standard countertop cutout, this self-rimming sink installs from the top for a fast upgrade. Use the included template and follow the manual to confirm the opening and faucet hole spacing.

Sized For 8″ Widespread Faucets

The factory 8″ three-hole deck works with your favorite widespread faucet trim—perfect for matching cross or lever handles in the Promenade style.

Durable Vitreous China

A high-gloss vitreous china surface resists staining and everyday wear, making it easy to wipe clean and keep looking new with minimal maintenance.

Countertop Friendly

The self-rimming edge provides a neat transition to the counter surface and can help mask small imperfections in existing cutouts during remodels.

Code-Ready Confidence

Built to recognized plumbing standards. For ADA applications, mount at compliant heights and maintain required clearances per ANSI A117.1.

Plan The Cutout

Always trace and cut using the TOTO template and confirm reveal preferences before cutting. Dimensions and mounting method may vary with countertop materials.

description.en:
140780BN Finish: Brushed Nickel Features: -Ideal for vessel sinks. -Spring loaded push button. -Without overflow. For more information please view the Moen Specification Sheet, Owners Manual, and/or Expanded Parts View seen below. Specification Sheet Moen's stylish bathroom collections, available in a variety of on-trend finishes, feature single and double-handle bathroom sink faucets, Roman tub faucets, Garden tub faucets, bidets, and tub and shower trim. Replace your bathroom faucet or shower with a new faucet from Moen and enjoy modern style and convenience. Moen's innovative showering systems feature luxurious showerheads, body sprays, and shower faucets, all in a variety of styles and configurations. Coordinating bathroom accessories complete the style of Moen's bath collections. Accessories include decorative tank levers, towel bars, pivoting paper holders, towel rings, shelves, robe hooks, mirrors, toothbrush holders and soap/lotion dispensers to coordinate with Moen's bathroom faucet sets. Moen's complete bathroom collections range in style from traditional to modern, encompassing all styles in between. Whether your bath features clean Old World styling or more clean, contemporary decor, Moen has a bathroom collection to suit your tastes.

Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Eurocube Wall-Hung Bathroom Sink inspires with its sleek lines and contemporary aesthetic. Equally beautiful in an above-counter setting, the Eurocube sink pairs perfectly with the Eurocube toilet (sold separately) and specially selected GROHE faucets (sold separately). With GROHE, coordinating the elements of an elegant bathroom is an effortless way to create a space that fosters harmony and relaxation.

  • Meticulously crafted of fine fire clay with high-gloss finish
  • Coordinating shroud conceals plumbing for an unobstructed look, sold separately
  • Pairs perfectly with GROHE Allure Brilliant and GROHE Eurocube 8 in. widespread faucets, sold separately
  • Measures 19 1?16" x 5 7?16" x 24 13 ?16" (485 x 138 x 614 mm)
  • Drain assembly not included
  • Mounting kit and template included
  • Nominal Dimensions: 19-1/16" x 5-7/16" x 24-13/16"
  • Coordinated lavatory shroud (optional)

title.en: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige
title.zh: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige
title.id: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige
title.th: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige
title.vi: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige
title.ar: Toto LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4" x 13-3/4" Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink: Sedona Beige

description.en:
Refresh Your Space with the TOTO LT641#12 Dartmouth 18-3/4″ × 13-3/4″ Oval Undermount Sink — Sedona Beige

Give your vanity a clean, timeless update with the TOTO Dartmouth LT641#12. This oval undermount lavatory pairs a smooth, rimless look with a comfortable 18-3/4″ × 13-3/4″ bowl and a concealed front overflow to keep the deck tidy. Fired vitreous china in warm Sedona Beige wipes down easily and coordinates with brushed, bronze, and chrome fixtures. A paper template and mounting hardware help streamline installation; use the recommended sealing kit for stone tops as noted in the manual.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT641#12
  • Type: Oval undermount (undercounter) bathroom sink
  • Size/Capacity: Bowl approx. 18-3/4″ W × 13-3/4″ D (overall/cutout: see template)
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Sedona Beige (#12)
  • Performance: Concealed front overflow; smooth, easy-clean glaze
  • Connections/Fit: Standard 1-1/4″ O.D. drain; undermount installation
  • Dimensions: Use included template to confirm cutout and reveal (layout-dependent)
  • Included: Sink, mounting hardware, and installation template (stone-top sealing kit sold separately)
  • Certifications/Compliance: ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1; ADA-capable when installed per ANSI A117.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Comfort You Can Feel

The Dartmouth’s generously sized oval bowl supports comfortable handwashing and daily routines, while the hidden overflow preserves a clean, uncluttered look from the user’s view.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

High-gloss vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so the basin stays bright with simple, non-abrasive cleaning—ideal for busy family baths and guest spaces.

Installer-Friendly Undermount

Arrives with a paper template and hardware to speed layout and drilling. For granite or marble, follow TOTO’s instructions and use the recommended sealing kit for a lasting bond and seal.

Sized Right For Modern Vanities

The undermount design frees up deck space and fits common vanity sizes; verify cabinet clearances for the trap and a standard 1-1/4″ drain assembly.

Accessible When Mounted Correctly

Can meet ADA requirements when installed to compliant counter height and knee/forward clearances— see ANSI A117.1 and the installation guide.

Warm, Versatile Finish

TOTO’s Sedona Beige coordinates beautifully with warm stones and brushed or bronze metals for a cohesive bath palette.

title.zh: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01

title.th: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01
title.vi: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01
title.ar: Toto Wall-Mount Bathroom Sink, Single Hole in Cotton White - LT307#01

description.en:
Outfit Your Space with the TOTO LT307#01 Commercial Wall-Mount Sink — Single-Hole, Cotton White

Give restrooms a clean, durable upgrade with the TOTO LT307#01 wall-hung lavatory. Sized at 20-7/8″ W × 18″ D, it features an anti-splash rim, high backsplash, and a concealed front overflow to keep the deck tidy. The single-hole deck pairs with compact faucets for simple, reliable handwashing in commercial and light-residential spaces. A wall hanger is included to speed installation and support.

  • Brand: TOTO
  • MPN: LT307#01
  • Type: Wall-mount lavatory, single faucet hole
  • Size/Capacity: Overall 20-7/8″ W × 18″ D; bowl approx. 14-3/4″ W × 10-1/8″ D
  • Material/Finish: Vitreous china, Cotton White (#01)
  • Performance: Anti-splash rim, high backsplash, concealed front overflow
  • Connections/Fit:1-1/4″ drain opening; single faucet hole; punching for concealed arm carrier; wall hanger included
  • Dimensions: Overall height approx. 11-1/8″ (back height); see spec sheet for clearances
  • Included: Sink and wall hanger (faucet & drain not included)
  • Certifications/Compliance:ADA-compliant when installed per guidelines; ASME A112.19.2 / CSA B45.1
  • Warranty: 1-year limited (manufacturer)

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

The high back and anti-splash rim help keep water where it belongs, while the concealed overflow preserves a clean look that’s easy to maintain in busy restrooms.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

Fired vitreous china resists staining and routine wear, so staff can wipe surfaces clean quickly without harsh scrubbing—ideal for schools, offices, and multi-unit facilities.

Installer-Friendly Design

The lav ships with a wall hanger and is punched for use with concealed arm carriers. Follow TOTO’s installation manual for mounting, leveling, and sealing steps.

Sized Right For Compact Rooms

At 20-7/8″ × 18″, the LT307#01 fits tight alcoves and corridor restrooms while still providing a comfortable 14-3/4″ × 10-1/8″ bowl for handwashing.

ADA-Ready When Installed Correctly

Mount at compliant heights and maintain knee/forward clearances to meet ADA and local code requirements—perfect for shared and accessible restrooms.

Simple Faucet & Drain Pairing

The single-hole deck accepts a standard single-handle faucet, and the 1-1/4″ outlet works with common grid or pop-up drains for fast spec and stocking.

description.en: 140780BG Finish: Brushed Gold Features: -Ideal for vessel sinks. -Spring loaded push button. -Without overflow. For more information please view the Moen Specification Sheet, Owners Manual, and/or Expanded Parts View seen below. Specification Sheet Moen's stylish bathroom collections, available in a variety of on-trend finishes, feature single and double-handle bathroom sink faucets, Roman tub faucets, Garden tub faucets, bidets, and tub and shower trim. Replace your bathroom faucet or shower with a new faucet from Moen and enjoy modern style and convenience. Moen's innovative showering systems feature luxurious showerheads, body sprays, and shower faucets, all in a variety of styles and configurations. Coordinating bathroom accessories complete the style of Moen's bath collections. Accessories include decorative tank levers, towel bars, pivoting paper holders, towel rings, shelves, robe hooks, mirrors, toothbrush holders and soap/lotion dispensers to coordinate with Moen's bathroom faucet sets. Moen's complete bathroom collections range in style from traditional to modern, encompassing all styles in between. Whether your bath features clean Old World styling or more clean, contemporary decor, Moen has a bathroom collection to suit your tastes.

Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Essence Wall-Hung Bathroom Sink is defined by soft curves and timeless luxury. Equally beautiful in an above-counter setting, the Essence sink pairs perfectly with the Essence toilet (sold separately) and specially selected GROHE faucets (sold separately). description.en:
Grohe 3427000A Concetto Collection Single Hole Bathroom Faucet
  • Chrome Finish
  • Metal lever handle
  • Swivel spout - 100 degree swivel
  • Stainless steel flex lines
  • Includes waste set assembly
  • Temperature limiter
  • Flow control
  • Flow Rate 1.2 gpm
  • WaterSense compliant
The TOTO Rendezvous Oval Undermount Bathroom Sink with CeFiONtect offers a space-saving and elegant design. The Rendezvous sink features a beautiful rimless circular shape, a generously wide basin, and concealed front overflow. The Rendezvous features TOTO's CeFiONtect glaze, prohibiting mold and debris from adhering to ceramic surfaces, keeping your sink cleaner longer. The Rendezvous is ADA compliant. Features and Benefits Elegant, space-saving oval design for undermount installation CeFiONtect ceramic glaze prevents debris and mold from sticking to ceramic surfaces, leading to fewer chemicals and less water in cleaning Concealed front overflow Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops ADA Compliant.

description.en: The TOTO Promenade Rectangular Undermount Bathroom Sink is a space-saving sink that is ideal for narrow countertops. The Promenade has a generous wash basin with an overflow that can be oriented to the front or the rear. title.zh: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite

title.vi: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite
title.ar: Grohe Essence 23538A0A Single Hole Single-Handle Deck Mount Vessel Sink Faucet 1.2 GPM in Grohe Hard Graphite

description.en:
Sleek and sophisticated, the GROHE Essence Single-Handle Single-Hole Bathroom Faucet is a distinctive style with a gently curved swivel spout and side lever handle. The perfect size for a vessel sink, this water-saving faucet reduces water usage while providing superior performance. Available in an array of exquisite, on-trend finishes. The Essence single-handle vessel-sink bathroom faucet embodies all the elements of precision craftsmanship and design excellence.

  • SINGLE-HOLE FAUCET: Single-handle bathroom faucet can also be used on a 1- or 3-hole sink or vanity with deck plate, sold separately
  • EASY SINK CLEANING: For added convenience, the swivel spout rotates 150� or 360� to rinse every corner of the sink
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered bathroom faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • BRASS BODY: Solid brass spout and metal handle for durability
  • SMOOTH HANDLE OPERATION: Features GROHE SilkMove for precise handle control
  • REDUCED SPLASHING: GROHE AquaGuide allows for adjustable water flow for less splashing
  • ANTI-SCALD PROTECTION: Limits the water temperature to prevent accidental scalding
  • CONSERVES WATER: GROHE EcoJoy technology allows for less water usage without sacrificing performance
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this bathroom faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

description.en:
Reflecting the exceptional character of every GROHE design, the Eurocube Wall-Hung Sink Shroud complements the contemporary lines of the Eurocube collection. More than an accent, the sink shroud conceals plumbing, creating a clean, unobstructed look. Made of smooth, high-gloss fine fire clay, its precise angles fit perfectly under GROHE Eurocube sinks for a flawless finish.

  • Contemporary design matches Eurocube sinks 39655000 and 39656000
  • Smooth, glossy finish is easy to clean
  • Measures 10 5?8" x 7" x 10" (270 x 180 x 254mm)

title.en: Toto Atherton Undermount Bathroom Sink – Rectangular Vitreous China Lavatory, 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" in Cotton - LT221#01
title.zh: Toto Atherton Undermount Bathroom Sink – Rectangular Vitreous China Lavatory, 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" in Cotton - LT221#01
title.id: Toto Atherton Undermount Bathroom Sink – Rectangular Vitreous China Lavatory, 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" in Cotton - LT221#01

title.ar: Toto Atherton Undermount Bathroom Sink – Rectangular Vitreous China Lavatory, 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" in Cotton - LT221#01

description.en:
Upgrade your bathroom with the sleek and modern TOTO LT221#01 Atherton Undermount Lavatory Sink, expertly crafted from durable vitreous china for long-lasting performance. This 21-3/8" x 16-3/8" rectangular sink features a smooth, easy-to-clean surface and minimalist design that fits seamlessly into a wide range of bathroom vanities. Ideal for both residential and commercial applications, the LT221#01 offers a clean undercounter installation that maximizes countertop space while maintaining elegance.

  • Undermount Installation – Clean undercounter design enhances countertop space and creates a seamless, modern look
  • Spacious Rectangular Basin – 21-3/8 x 16-3/8 size with ample washing area and sleek, contoured shape
  • Premium Vitreous China – Durable, non-porous surface resists stains, scratches, and fading over time
  • Elegant Cotton White Finish – Classic white color coordinates beautifully with most bathroom decors
  • Overflow Drain Included – Integrated overflow prevents water spills and enhances safety
  • Easy to Maintain – Smooth surface makes cleaning effortless with regular non-abrasive cleaners
  • Trusted TOTO Quality – Backed by a global leader in bathroom innovation and performance

description.en:
Toto LT307.4#01 4" CTR Wall Mount Lavatory, 4 Inch Centerset, Cotton White Vitreous china wall mounted ADA compliant commercial lavatory with 4" center faucet mount.With unrivaled vision and innovation expertise TOTO leads and never follows in designing engineering refining and delivering innovative technology that enhances your daily life. TOTO's innovations translate into the best performance and ecology in the plumbing world. TOTO leaves nothing to chance when it comes to design. TOTO embraces holistic design principles because performance quality functionality and ultimately customer satisfaction are just as important as aesthetics. Backed by precision engineering and global manufacturing great designs address functionality and performance as well as beauty. Attention to detail continuous improvement over a thousand research and development professionals and 90+ years of experience fuel TOTO's product quality. TOTO provides unmatched performance durability and reliability representing the ultimate in customer satisfaction for our toilets faucets lavatories showers and products for the entire bathroom. Superior quality backed by over 90 years of experience creates many benefits. TOTO installations offer peace of mind and performance you can count on. Reliability translates into reduced maintenance costs and superior performance.

  • Country of Origin: UNITED STATES
  • The Package Length of the product is 18 inches
  • The Package Width of the product is 18 inches
  • The Package Height of the product is 21 inches

  • Concealed front overflow
  • Mounting assembly complete with installation template and mounting screw set for wood countertops
  • ADA Compliant

description.en:
Safety, comfort, and peace of mind.
Safety, comfort, and peace of mind... it's engineered into every Moen Home Care. This transfer bench is ideal for use in the shower as well as your tub. It supports up to 400 pounds, measures 33 inches wide by 18 inches deep, and is height adjustable from 16.5 to 21 inches to fit a variety of tub and shower styles. It also features a glacier finish for a bright, pure white look, a non-slip seat surface, and ADA compliance. What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen DN7105 Home Care transfer bench; installation instructions DN7105 Home Care Transfer Bench At a Glance Supports up to 400 pounds For use in shower or tub Height adjusts from 16.5 to 21 inches Non-slip seat surface, seat back Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

Help ensure stable, comfortable transfer in and out of your bathtub or shower with the Moen Transfer Bench. This tub transfer bench supports up to 400 pounds and features a comfortable, non-slip seat surface that measures 33 inches by 18 inches. Adjustable to heights between 16.5 and 21 inches, it also accommodates a variety of tub and shower styles. The support handle helps ensure a safer transfer, while the basket organizer provides a handy place to store bathing essentials and toiletries. Easy to assemble, the bench can be set up in either right- or left-facing orientations. It has a cool, white glacier finish that seamlessly blends with a wide range of bathroom styles. Whether you're looking for a shower chair for the elderly or disabled, this sturdy transfer bench for your bathtub is designed to stand the test of time, offering both style and security for your bathroom.



Safety, comfort and peace of mind. It's engineered into every Moen Home Care product we make. You can be sure that when you select Moen, you are getting a product that not only meets the ADA's exacting standards, but yours as well. From finishes that are guaranteed to last a lifetime, to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

description.en:
Enjoy peace of mind and the feeling of safety in your bathroom with the Moen 36-Inch Grab Bar. This ADA certified grab bar for bathrubs and showers measures 39.25 inches in total length and supports up to 500 pounds. Its 1.5-inch diameter provides a reliable handhold whether you're showering, bathing, or using the toilet. Featuring a SecureMount design, this handicap accessory for daily living allows for easy, secure installation at any angle. The optional secure mounts are sold separately. Thanks to its durable stainless-steel construction, this elderly assistance product provides lasting performance. For slip-resitance, it features a peened texture to help give you stability and reassurance in the bathroom. Durable, ADA-compliant design combines innovative function with a look that easily coordinates with the style of your bath. This grab bar for the wall or shower has a stainless steel finish and has concealed screws for a sleek design that will stand the test of time. The SecureMount design allows you to anchor with or without studs. The patented flange design makes it easy to connect to the stud at multiple points for extra security. The bar is built to withstand up to 500 pounds of weight, which exceeds the ADA requirement. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets, and shower products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction. The shower handicapped grab bar is backed by Moen's limited lifetime warranty, so you can have peace of mind.



Moen SecureMount Stainless 36-Inch grab bar delivers a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look. It is ADA compliant and comes with a limited lifetime warranty. A Genuine Moen Product. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

description.en:
Safety, comfort, and peace of mind... it's engineered into every Moen Home Care. This 24-inch straight grab bar features stainless steel construction for added durability and a handsome brushed nickel finish that provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look. It has a weight capacity of 500 pounds, 1-1/4-inch bar diameter, and a grip pad for a secure, comfortable hold. Moen's SecureMount design allows for secure installation into any stud at any angle. It is ADA compliant. What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen LR8724D1GBN Home Care 24-inch grab bar; installation instructions At a Glance LR8724D1GBN Home Care 24-Inch Grab Bar SecureMount design allows for secure installation into any stud at any angle Brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look Supports up to 500 pounds Grip pad for secure, comfortable hold Stainless steel construction for added durability Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

Enjoy peace of mind in the bathroom with the stylish Moen 24-Inch Designer Grab Bar. This ADA grab bar supports up to 500 pounds and features discreet grip pads for a comfortable, secure hold--whether you're showering, bathing, or using the toilet. Its SecureMount design allows for easy, secure installation at any angle. Thanks to its durable stainless steel construction, this bath grip provides lasting performance. The designer styling and warm brushed nickel finish blend seamlessly with almost any interior decor.



Moen's Brushed Nickel 24-inch Grab Bar from the Home Care collection's brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look. When you're looking after others or taking care of yourself, it's good to have Home Care by Moen bath safety products to lean on. Our broad selection of quality products and accessories combine function, safety and style for reliable in-home security and comfort. Durable, ADA-compliant designs combine innovative function with a look that easily coordinates with the style of your bath.

description.en:
The 18-inch Eva towel bar.
Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, Moen's Eva bathroom collection features tapered, sophisticated lines to deliver a look that will never go out of style. This version of the Eva 18-inch towel bar comes in a brushed nickel finish that provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome and oil rubbed bronze. Pair it with other items from Moen's Eva range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories.
Moen's Pro-Fit installation system eliminates set-screws for faster, more durable mounting, and this package includes a template with a built-in level. The towel bar posts are constructed of zinc, while the bar itself is constructed of brass. When assembled, it measures 20.03 x 3.43 x 1.99 inches (LxWxH). What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen YB2818 Eva 18-inch towel bar; template and installation instructions At a Glance YB2818 Eva 18-Inch Towel Bar Transitional design that will never go out of style Brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look Pro-Fit installation system eliminates set�screws for faster, more durable mounting Assembled dimensions: 20.03 x 3.43 x 1.99 inches (LxWxH) Includes template and installation hardware Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

With its flowing curves and transitional design, the Moen Eva 18-Inch Bathroom Towel Bar brings a relaxed feel to any bathroom. The 18-inch bar offers ample space for hanging towels, washcloths, and other bathroom items. Designed with the Pro-Fit system for quick and secure installation, this towel bar includes mounting hardware and a convenient template that make installation easy. The Eva towel bar is available in a warm brushed nickel finish and a rich oil-rubbed bronze finish to match your decor.



The Eva collection offers an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal. With tapered, sophisticated lines, Eva delivers a look that will never go out of style. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

title.en: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN
title.zh: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN
title.id: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN
title.th: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN
title.vi: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN
title.ar: Moen 24 Inch Towel Bar - YB2824BN

description.en:
The 24-inch Eva towel bar.
Offering an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal, Moen's Eva bathroom collection features tapered, sophisticated lines to deliver a look that will never go out of style. This version of the Eva 24-inch towel bar comes in a brushed nickel finish that provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look, and it's also available in chrome and oil rubbed bronze. Pair it with other items from Moen's Eva range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories.
Moen's Pro-Fit installation system eliminates set-screws for faster, more durable mounting, and this package includes a template with a built-in level. The towel bar posts are constructed of zinc, while the bar itself is constructed of brass. When assembled, it measures 26.03 x 3.43 x 1.99 inches (LxWxH). What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen YB2824 Eva 24-inch towel bar; template and installation instructions At a Glance YB2824 Eva 24-Inch Towel Bar Transitional design that will never go out of style Brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look Pro-Fit installation system eliminates set�screws for faster, more durable mounting Assembled dimensions: 26.03 x 3.43 x 1.99 inches (LxWxH) Includes template and installation hardware Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

With its flowing curves and transitional design, the Moen Eva 24-Inch Bathroom Towel Bar brings a relaxed feel to any bathroom. The 24-inch bar offers ample space for hanging towels, washcloths, and other bathroom items. Designed with the Pro-Fit system for quick and secure installation, this towel bar includes mounting hardware and a convenient template that make installation easy. The Eva towel bar is available in a warm brushed nickel finish and a rich oil-rubbed bronze finish to match your decor.



The Eva collection offers an elegant, transitional design that gives today's home timeless appeal. With tapered, sophisticated lines, Eva delivers a look that will never go out of style. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

description.en:
The Locarno collection includes a range of fixtures and accessories designed to coordinate your entire bathroom in boldly unique style. Available in five different finishes, Locarno will enable endless creativity, opening the door for uniquely glamorous interior spaces. The towel ring makes the perfect addition to the rest of the Locarno bath collection, giving your bathroom a uniform look. The mounting hardware is included with the towel bar, making installation quick and easy.

  • BALANCED DESIGN: The design inspired by the Art Deco movement create balanced design that suits any living space.
  • WALL MOUNT DESIGN: Towel ring mounts to the wall for easy access
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid metal construction ensures a long product life
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The Locarno towel ring is a perfect match to the hansgrohe Locarno bath and shower collection, which provides an elegantly transitional style

  • EASY INSTALLATION: All mounting hardware is included with this product, making it a breeze to install on your own
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
The Locarno collection includes a range of fixtures and accessories designed to coordinate your entire bathroom in boldly unique style. Available in five different finishes, Locarno will enable endless creativity, opening the door for uniquely glamorous interior spaces. The 24-inch towel bar makes the perfect addition to the rest of the Locarno bath collection, giving your bathroom a uniform look. The mounting hardware is included with the towel bar, making installation quick and easy.

  • BALANCED DESIGN: The design inspired by the Art Deco movement create balanced design that suits any living space.
  • WALL MOUNT DESIGN: Towel bar mounts to the wall for easy access
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid metal construction ensures a long product life
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The Locarno towel bar is a perfect match to the hansgrohe Locarno bath and shower collection, which provides an elegantly transitional style
  • PIECES INCLUDED: This product includes the towel bar and mounting hardware
  • EASY INSTALLATION: All mounting hardware is included with this product, making it a breeze to install on your own
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
The Addstoris Collection by hansgrohe exudes beautiful design with superior performance and durability. The collection is available in a variety of finishes to perfectly compliment your bathroom style: Chrome, Brushed Bronze, Brushed Black Chrome, Matte Black, and Matte White. The Addstoris Collection includes everything from shower baskets and robe hooks to toilet paper holders and towel bars, allowing you to outfit your bathroom with a single cohesive collection. The mounting hardware is included with purchase.

  • ELEGANT DESIGN: German design and engineering delivers consistent performance for all your bath needs
  • WALL MOUNT DESIGN: Toilet Paper Holder mounts to the wall for easy access
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid construction ensures a long product life
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The AddStoris Toilet Paper Holder is a perfect match to the AddStoris collection, which provides a perfect match in your bathroom
  • PIECES INCLUDED: This product includes the Toilet Paper Holder and mounting hardware
  • EASY INSTALLATION: All mounting hardware is included with this product, making it a breeze to install on your own
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: Consumer purchases of Hansgrohe products from authorized sellers are covered by a limited lifetime manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en: Moen Genta LX Chrome Modern Wall Mount Pivoting Toilet Paper Holder, a sleek and sophisticated addition to any contemporary bathroom. This modern toilet roll holder is designed to seamlessly blend style with functionality, making it an essential accessory for your bathroom. The chrome finish adds a touch of elegance but also ensures durability and resistance to corrosion, maintaining its pristine look for years to come. Its pivoting design offers a convenient and user-friendly experience, allowing you to change toilet paper rolls effortlessly without the hassle of traditional spring mechanisms. Elevate your bathroom's aesthetic with this wall-mounted toilet paper holder, which maximizes space and provides a clean, uncluttered look. The Moen Genta LX is perfect for those who value both form and function, offering a practical solution for toilet paper storage while enhancing your bathroom's decor. Its modern design complements a wide range of interior styles, from minimalist to industrial, making it a versatile choice for any home. With easy installation and a secure fit, it ensures your toilet paper roll holder stays firmly in place, providing peace of mind and convenience.

description.en:
The Moen Bathroom Safety 32-inch Stainless Steel Shower Grab Bar for bathtubs and showers features a perfect blend of style, strength, and security for your bathroom. Designed with the utmost care and precision, this heavy-duty grab bar for your wall is an essential addition to any bath or shower space, providing unparalleled support and peace of mind for the elderly and handicapped. Crafted from high-quality stainless steel, this elderly assistance product is built to withstand the test of time, ensuring a reliable handhold for years to come. With its sleek design and concealed screws, it seamlessly integrates into your bathroom decor, offering both functionality and aesthetic appeal. Engineered to provide maximum support, this sturdy handrail can bear significant weight, making it an ideal choice for those who require extra assistance in the shower or bath. Whether you're recovering from surgery, living with a disability, or simply seeking added security, this handicap accessory for daily living offers the stability you need to maintain your independence. Its 32-inch length provides ample space for a comfortable grip, ensuring that you can move with confidence and ease. Installation is quick and easy. Designed for easy wall mounting, the shower bar comes with all necessary hardware and clear instructions, allowing you to set it up quickly and efficiently.



Moen SecureMount Stainless 32-Inch grab bar delivers a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look. It is ADA compliant and comes with a limited lifetime warranty. A Genuine Moen Product. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.
