Enjoy peace of mind in the bathroom with the stylish Moen 24-Inch Designer Grab Bar. This ADA grab bar supports up to 500 pounds and features discreet grip pads for a comfortable, secure hold--whether you're showering, bathing, or using the toilet. Its SecureMount design allows for easy, secure installation at any angle. Thanks to its durable stainless steel construction, this bath grip provides lasting performance. The designer styling and warm brushed nickel finish blend seamlessly with almost any interior decor. Moen's Brushed Nickel 24-inch Grab Bar from the Home Care collection's brushed nickel finish provides a lightly brushed warm grey metallic look. When you're looking after others or taking care of yourself, it's good to have Home Care by Moen bath safety products to lean on. Our broad selection of quality products and accessories combine function, safety and style for reliable in-home security and comfort. Durable, ADA-compliant designs combine innovative function with a look that easily coordinates with the style of your bath.

description.en: The Moen Brushed Nickel Bathroom 16-inch Safety Grab Bar with Storage Shelf is a perfect blend of style, functionality, and safety for your bath or shower. Designed with the utmost care, this grab bar for your wall offers unparalleled support and stability, making it an essential addition to any bathroom. Whether you're looking for an elderly assistance product or handicap accessory for daily living, this heavy-duty shower grab bar is engineered to meet your needs. Its sleek brushed nickel finish not only complements any bathroom decor but also resists corrosion, ensuring long-lasting durability. This innovative handicap grab bar goes beyond just providing a secure handle; it features an integrated storage shelf that offers convenient space for your bath essentials. Keep your shampoo, soap, and other shower necessities within easy reach, reducing the need to bend or stretch, which can be particularly beneficial for those with limited mobility. The Moen Safety Grab Bar is designed to support up to 250 pounds, offering peace of mind and confidence to users who require additional balance assistance. Its robust construction and secure wall-mounted design ensure that it remains firmly in place, providing reliable support whenever you need it. Installation is a breeze with this hand rail, thanks to its user-friendly design and comprehensive instructions.

description.en:
The Moen Brantford Brushed Nickel 24-Inch Single Bathroom Towel Bar is a perfect blend of style and functionality that elevates your bathroom accessories to a new level of sophistication. Crafted with precision, this traditional wall-mounted towel hanger is designed to seamlessly integrate into any bathroom decor, offering both elegance and practicality. This versatile towel rack for bathroom use is more than just a hand towel holder; it's a statement piece that enhances the overall aesthetic of your space. With its 24-inch length, the Moen Brantford towel bar provides ample space for hanging towels of all sizes. Its sturdy construction ensures that it can support the weight of multiple towels without bending or sagging, making it a reliable bathroom towel rack for everyday use. Transform your bathroom into a sanctuary of elegance with the Moen Brantford brushed nickel towel bar. Easy to install and maintain, this towel holder for bathroom wall is the perfect solution for those seeking a blend of beauty and functionality in their bathroom accessories. Elevate your bathroom experience with this exquisite towel bar, and enjoy the perfect combination of form and function in your daily routine.



The Brantford collection features a traditional style giving your home a beautiful look and timeless appeal. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

description.en:
Elevate your bathroom's functionality and style with the Moen Sage Collection Spot Resist Brushed Nickel 24-inch Double-Towel Bar. This wall-mounted bath towel hanger is designed to provide ample storage space while adding a touch of elegance to your bathroom. Crafted with precision, the double-towel bar features two sturdy rods, allowing you to hang multiple towels simultaneously, whether they are hand towels or bath towels. The brushed nickel finish not only enhances the aesthetic appeal but also resists fingerprints and water spots, ensuring your bathroom remains pristine and inviting. The Moen Sage Collection is synonymous with quality and durability, and this double-towel bar is no exception. Constructed from high-quality metal, it offers robust support for your towels, ensuring they remain securely in place. The transitional design seamlessly blends with both modern and traditional bathroom styles, making it a versatile addition to any home. Whether you're upgrading your bathroom or completing a new build, this towel bar provides the perfect solution for your towel storage needs. Its 24-inch length offers ample space, while the dual rods maximize storage efficiency. Installation is a breeze with the simple wall-mounted design.

description.en: The Moen Genta LX Modern Hand Towel Bar is a sleek and sophisticated addition to your bathroom or kitchen that combines functionality with contemporary design. Measuring at a compact 6.8-inches, this matte black towel bar is the perfect solution for those seeking a stylish yet practical accessory to enhance their space. Crafted with precision and attention to detail, the Genta LX towel bar not only serves as an elegant hand towel holder but also complements your existing bathroom fixtures, including your toilet paper holder and tissue holder, creating a cohesive and modern aesthetic. Designed for versatility, the Moen Genta LX towel bar is an ideal choice for both bathroom and kitchen settings. Its robust construction ensures durability, while the matte black finish adds sophistication to your decor. Whether you're updating your bathroom toilet paper holder or looking for a chic toilet paper storage solution, this towel bar seamlessly integrates with your existing toilet paper holder wall mount and toilet paper roll holder, offering a unified look that is both functional and stylish. The compact size makes it perfect for smaller spaces, ensuring that your towels are always within reach without overwhelming your decor.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Complies with Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) specifications

description.en: The Moen Genta LX Matte Black Modern Bathroom Towel Bar is a perfect blend of style and functionality that elevates your bathroom accessories to a new level of sophistication. Crafted with precision and designed to impress, this wall-mounted towel bar is an essential addition to any modern bathroom or kitchen. Its sleek matte black finish not only complements a wide range of decor styles but also adds a touch of elegance and contemporary flair to your space. Whether you're looking to upgrade your bathroom towel rack or searching for a stylish towel holder for your kitchen, the Moen Genta LX is the ideal choice. This versatile towel bar is more than just a bathroom towel holder; it is a statement piece that enhances the overall aesthetic of your home. Measuring inches, it provides ample space for hanging towels, making it a practical solution for both large and small bathrooms. The robust construction ensures durability, while the minimalist design offers a clutter-free look. As part of a comprehensive bathroom accessory set, this towel bar seamlessly integrates with other Moen Genta LX products, allowing you to create a cohesive and stylish bathroom environment. Its wall-mounted design ensures stability and ease of use, making it a reliable towel holder for bathroom walls.

description.en:
Amazon.com The Voss high arc bathroom faucet in chrome (view larger). Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features (view larger). Combining elements from traditional and modern styling, Moen's Voss bath collection offers uncomplicated, transitional styling with classic and simple lines that will endure the test of time. This Voss high arc bathroom faucet features crisp edges and a fashion-forward presence as well as a two-handle lever design for easy of use. Pair it with other items from Moen's Voss range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories. This version comes in a chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look, and it's also available in brushed nickel and oil rubbed bronze. It's designed for three-hole installations, from 8 inches to widespread 16 inches. The handle rotates from 90 degrees to full on either handle: rotate hot side counterclockwise to open and clockwise to close; rotate cold side clockwise to open and counterclockwise to close. This faucet meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. Flow is limited to a maximum of 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm) at 60 PSI. It is also ADA compliant. Note that this faucet does not include its required valve (model 9000). Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, green and sustainability are not just words in our vocabulary. Making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. M-Pact Common Valve System With Moen, changing your bath and shower faucet style is as easy as changing a light bulb. Install any of Moen's M-Pact-compatible faucets once, and you can upgrade the style at any point in the decorating or construction process--or switch style years down the road--without replacing any faucet plumbing. All changes can be made above the deck or in front of the wall. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen T6905 Voss two-handle high arc bathroom faucet; drain assembly; installation instructions At a Glance T6905 Voss Two-Handle High Arc Bathroom Faucet Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features ideal for transitional bathrooms Chrome finish creates a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look Elegant 8-16-inch widespread installation Maximum flow of 1.5 gpm; WaterSense certified Includes pop-up metal drain assembly Does not include valve Limited lifetime warranty Product Description Give your bathroom a touch of timeless style with the Moen Voss Two-Handle High-Arc Bathroom Faucet. Available in three attractive finishes, this faucet features two lever handles that can be installed at any distance between 8 and 16 inches for a customized look. The faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system. Once installed, the valve system lets you conveniently update your trim kit without changing any plumbing. The faucet meets WaterSense criteria for water conservation without sacrificing performance. With a transitional style and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, this bathroom faucet adds durability and timelessness to any three-hole sink. *Moen 9000 M-PACT Two-Handle Widespread Valve sold separately. From the Manufacturer Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features give the Voss collection an ageless, yet fashion-forward, presence. Each silhouette brings a confident transitional style to the bath.

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: The Moen Voss Bathroom Faucet is crafted with precision and durability in mind
  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Widespread faucet can be installed between 8" to 16" for a more customized widespread installation

description.en:
Product Description It's the little things that add up to a lot of Transitional style for Camerist. Flared-tip spout, simple curves and single-handle operation create an updated basic collection. Amazon.com Upgrade your kitchen decor with the classic-looking 67545C Camerist one-handle low-arc pullout kitchen faucet from Moen. The faucet features a handy pullout spout that allows you to easily wash food or dishes or rinse out the sink. You can also choose from different spray settings. The stylish lever handle is simple to operate, and Moen's Hydrolock quick connect system makes the faucet a snap to install. This product is part of Moen's Camerist line of kitchen fixtures, which are notable for their clean, simple, graceful design. 67545C Camerist One-Handle Low-Arc Pullout Kitchen Faucet At a Glance: Convenient pullout spout Easy-to-use lever-style handle Choose from aerated stream, powerful rinse, or light spray Backed by a limited lifetime warranty The faucet adjusts to different spray settings can deliver up to 1.5 gallons of water per minute (click to enlarge). Stylish Kitchen Faucet That Is Simple to Use An elegant addition to any kitchen, Moen 67545C Camerist one-handle low-arc pullout kitchen faucet sports a convenient pullout spout attached to a 68-inch hose. This adjustable spout lets you apply an aerated stream, a powerful rinse, or a light, gentle veggie spray and can deliver a maximum of 1.5 gallons of water per minute. The spout is 8.5 inches long and sits 9.38 inches above the sink. The faucet's lever-style handle is easy to operate. Hydrolock Technology for Fast Installation This product features Moen's innovative Hydrolock installation system, patented by ITT Industries, which allows for easier and faster faucet installation and removal and eliminates the need to use tools to attach the water line to the faucet. The water lines snap in with a telltale "click," so the installer knows the connection is secure. The Moen 67545C has a conventional deck mount design and can be installed in either one-hole or three-hole sinks. Follows State and Federal Standards The Moen 67545C Camerist one-handle low-arc pullout kitchen faucet meets California's AB 1953 and Vermont's S152 requirements as well as Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) guidelines for the physically challenged. About Moen's Camerist Line The Camerist line offers superior styling. The clean, simple design and graceful style of Camerist has the ability to complement any decor. About Moen As the No. 1 faucet brand in North America, Moen offers a diverse selection of thoughtfully designed kitchen and bath faucets, showerheads, accessories, bath safety products, and kitchen sinks for residential applications--each delivering the best possible combination of meaningful innovation, useful features, on-trend styling, and lasting value. In addition, Moen Commercial offers superior performing products that deliver lower lifetime costs for today's facilities. Moen has worked diligently to support, promote, and advance sustainability within the organization and the plumbing industry. The company has been recognized with the 2011 EPA WaterSense Excellence Award, as well as the 2010 EPA WaterSense Manufacturer Partner of the Year Award, for its work to protect the future of the United States's water supply through the introduction and ongoing support of water-efficient products, programs, and practices while keeping consumers' needs top-of-mind. What's in the Box One Moen 67545C Camerist one-handle low-arc pullout kitchen faucet and one set of instructions. The stylish Moen 67545C features a handy pullout spout for ease of use (click each to enlarge). From the Manufacturer The Camerist line offers superior styling. The clean, simple design and graceful style of Camerist has the ability to complement any decor. From finishes that are guaranteed to last a lifetime, to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Timeless designs, styles unlike anything else, faucets and fixtures that are livable and enduring, these are just some of the reasons that Moen is the number one brand of faucet in North America. But, Moen does more than make faucets. It's also a major supplier of stylish kitchen sinks and innovative bath accessories. In the time that Moen has been part of the Fortune Brands family, it has introduced a wide range of consumer-preferred, stylish products - positioning Moen as the number one plumbing brand, both in market share and in the minds of consumers. Whether you are planning a full-scale kitchen remodel with premium kitchen fixtures and faucets, or are looking for simple updates to your bath faucets and coordinating plumbing and bathroom fixtures - Moen carries a large selection of products to help you create the kitchen or bath of your dreams. If your decorating style is traditional, modern or somewhere in between, Moen offers the styles, fini

  • Chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look
  • Low-arc spout design for conventional styling
  • One-Handle lever design for ease of use
  • Pulldown spout

description.en:
Amazon.com From intimate galley kitchens to large gourmet workstations, Moen's lineup of Align faucets brings a refreshed modern look to your home. Nicely contemporary with simple lines, this one-handle high arc bar faucet features a pulldown wand with a 68-inch braided hose. This version comes in chrome, and it's also available in a Spot Resist Stainless finish. The contemporary Align bar faucet with pulldown wand (view larger). The high arc spout provides the height and reach to fill or clean large pots while the pulldown feature provides the infinite maneuverability for cleaning or rinsing. The 360-degree rotating spout enables you to install the handle on either side, and temperature is controlled by the 100-degree arc of handle travel. It operates in aerated stream or powerful spray mode in the pullout or retracted position, and it has a spout height of 6-7/8 inches. Water flow is limited to 1.5 gallons per minute (GPM), and the lever handle is ADA compliant. Moen's quick connect system creates easier, faster installation with fewer tools. An optional escutcheon is available. Moen Reflex Pulldown System With Reflex, Moen has created the best, most user-friendly pulldown faucet experience. Driven by input from actual users, Moen focused on creating a comprehensive collection of improvements and enhancements that work together to naturally respond to the way you work, and the way you want your faucet to work. Along with an ultraflexible hose, the spray wand offers the greatest range of motion for exceptionally easy movement. And it returns to the docked position after use without additional assistance--no matter where it is released. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen 5965 Align one-handle high arc pulldown bar faucet; installation instructions 5965 Align One-Handle High Arc Pulldown Bar Faucet At a Glance Simple lines create a contemporary style Chrome finish Pulldown spray with 68-inch braided hose; 360-degree rotating spout Aerated stream for everyday cleaning; powerful rinse for heavy-duty cleaning One-handle lever handles make it easy to adjust the water Single hole mount Limited lifetime warranty Product Description The Moen Align One Handle Pulldown Bar Faucet in Chrome will bring a Modern and refreshed look to your kitchen. With the Moen Align, simple lines create a contemporary style. The pulldown spray head has 2 functions: an aerated stream for everyday cleaning and Power Clean, a high-pressure jet of water designed to clean dishes faster. The pause function conveniently lets you stop water flow from the spray head, putting water delivery control at your fingertips. The faucet comes with Duralock quick connect system, making DIY installation simple. It can be installed in either a 1 or 3-hole sink. Note, the optional deck plate is sold separately for a 3-hole sink configuration (Moen Model #141002). The product is ensured by Moen's limited lifetime warranty. From the Manufacturer From intimate galley kitchens to large gourmet workstations, Align faucets bring a refreshed modern look to your home. Simple lines create the contemporary style, while a pull-down wand delivers in�demand functionality.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • POWER CLEAN: Power Clean spray technology provides 50 percent more spray power versus most of our pulldown and pullout faucets without the Power Clean technology
  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement and secure docking of the spray head
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Designed to be installed through 1 hole; optional escutcheon (SKU 141002) sold separately

description.en:
Amazon.com The Voss single-handle bathroom faucet in oil rubbed bronze (view larger). Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features (view larger). Combining elements from traditional and modern styling, Moen's Voss bath collection offers uncomplicated, transitional styling with classic and simple lines that will endure the test of time. This Voss high arc bathroom faucet features crisp edges and a fashion-forward presence as well as a single-handle lever design for easy of use. Pair it with other items from Moen's Voss range, including faucets, shower kits, towel bars, and other accessories. This version comes in an oil rubbed bronze finish that delivers a rich, dark brown, old world finish with striking light and dark accents, and it's also available in chrome and brushed nickel. This single-handle faucet is designed for single hole installations, but it comes with an optional three-hole deck plate (escutcheon) for use with three-hole installations. Temperature is controlled by the 100-degree arc of handle travel. It meets WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance. Flow is limited to a maximum of 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm) at 60 PSI. It is also ADA compliant. Moen Eco-Performance At Moen, green and sustainability are not just words in our vocabulary. Making energy saving improvements along with incorporating sustainable practices into our everyday lives not only saves on energy costs, but also creates a healthier place to live. WaterSense is a program sponsored by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) to promote water efficiency (it is similar in nature to the EPA's Energy Star program). As of 2009, all Moen lavatory faucets are certified to meet the WaterSense criteria, using up to 32 percent less water while maintaining the same great performance you expect. What Sets Moen Apart? From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box Moen 6903 Voss one-handle high arc bathroom faucet At a Glance 6903 Voss One-Handle High Arc Bathroom Faucet Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features ideal for transitional bathrooms Oil rubbed bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, old world finish with striking light and dark accents Single hole mount Aerated flow for everyday use Maximum flow of 1.5 gpm; WaterSense certified Includes metal pop-up waste assembly and 3-hole deck plate (escutcheon) Limited lifetime warranty Product Description With crisp edges and uncomplicated details, the Moen Voss Bathroom Faucet has an ageless yet fashion-forward silhouette that brings confident transitional style to the bath. The lever handle allows for effortless control of the water temperature and volume, and the aerated flow is ideal for everyday bathroom tasks. The high-arc neck provides plenty of clearance beneath the neck for an optimal cleaning experience. One-hole mount construction creates a cleaner look against custom countertops. Backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty and certified to meet EPA WaterSense standards, the Moen Voss Faucet brings dependable and efficient performance to your bathroom. From the Manufacturer Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features give the Voss collection an ageless, yet fashion-forward, presence. Each silhouette brings a confident transitional style to the bath.

  • SIMPLICITY: The bathroom faucet oil rubbed bronze combines functionality with simplicity through its single-handle design
  • WATERSENSE CERTIFIED: Meets EPA WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Single hole bathroom faucet oil rubbed bronze includes optional 3-hole deck plate (escutcheon) for installation
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Coordinates with other faucets and accessories in the Voss Collection

Developed exclusively by Moen, in collaboration with NASA Glenn Research Center, the LifeShine finish offers enhanced resistance to abrasion, corrosion, and chemical attack. description.en:
Modern, eye�catching aesthetic.
Offering an urban appeal and modern, eye�catching aesthetic, the Moen Integra one-handle kitchen faucet offers a low arc design and pullout spout with a 68-inch braided hose. This version comes in a chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look, and it's also available in classic stainless.
The faucet's pulldown feature provides the infinite maneuverability for cleaning or rinsing, and temperature is controlled by the 180-degree arc of handle travel. The spout also offers a 120-degree rotation. It operates in stream or spray mode in the pullout or retracted position, and it has a spout height of 5-9/16 inches. Water flow is limited to 1.5 gallons per minute (gpm), and the lever handle is ADA compliant. Hydrolock Installation System
Moen's innovative Hydrolock installation system allows water lines to be connected with a snap for faster and easier installation, eliminating the needs for tools. Hydrolock assures the connection is secure, with an audible, visual, and tactile confirmation of proper installation. What Sets Moen Apart?
From a variety of styles designed to complement today's decors to faucets that perfectly balance your water pressure, Moen sets the standard for exceptional beauty and reliable, innovative design. Additionally, all Moen products come with a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and finish defects. What's in the Box
Moen 67315 Integra one-handle low arc pullout kitchen faucet; installation instructions At a Glance 67315 Integra One-Handle Low Arc Pullout Kitchen Faucet One�handle lever design for ease of use Chrome finish creates a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look Pullout spray with 68-inch braided hose Aerated stream; powerful cleaning rinse Conventional deck mount design Hydrolock quick connect installation system Limited lifetime warranty

Product Description

Ergonomically designed with modern functionality, the Integra collection from MOEN contributes to an urban appeal and clean, contemporary aesthetic. The easy-to-use Integra is perfect for your kitchen or laundry room and features a single-finger control button spout, which allows you to effortlessly switch from a forceful stream to a soft aerated spray. This dual-function pull-out spout offers flexible reach around all corners of your sink and makes it easy to fill tall containers. The patented Duralock quick connections make DIY installation a snap.



The Integra collection contributes to an urban appeal and modern, eye-catching aesthetic. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

title.en: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish
title.zh: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish
title.id: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish
title.th: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish
title.vi: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish
title.ar: Grohe 32298DC3 Zedra Single-Handle Pull Down Kitchen Faucet Triple Spray 1.75 GPM In Supersteel Finish

description.en:
Transform Your Kitchen with GROHE Zedra 32298DC3 1.75 GPM Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet (SuperSteel)

Give your sink a sleek, easy-to-use upgrade. The GROHE Zedra single-handle pull-down faucet pairs a comfortable, flared spray head with triple-function flow—laminar, shower, and powerful blade spray—to speed everyday rinsing. A handy pause button and automatic return to laminar help control splashing, while a full 360° swivel spout and forward-rotating lever make tight backsplashes easier to accommodate. The durable SuperSteel finish and GROHE’s precision ceramic control deliver long-term reliability.

  • Brand: GROHE
  • MPN: 32298DC3
  • Type: Single-handle pull-down kitchen faucet with triple-spray head
  • Size/Capacity: 1.75 GPM maximum flow
  • Material/Finish: Brass body with SuperSteel InfinityFinish
  • Performance: Triple spray (laminar, shower, blade), pause function, automatic return to laminar, 360° swivel spout; SilkMove ceramic control
  • Connections/Fit: Single-hole mount; pre-attached nylon-braided flex hoses; 3/8? compression inlets; faucet hole 1-5/16? (max deck 2-3/8?)
  • Dimensions: Faucet height 15-13/16?; aerator height 8-3/8?; spout reach 9-5/16?
  • Included: Pull-down spray head, pre-attached supply lines, QuickFix Plus mounting
  • Certifications/Compliance: ADA; ASME A112.18.1; CSA B125.1; NSF/ANSI 61; CEC & CALGreen; lead-law compliant
  • Warranty: Limited lifetime (residential; see GROHE terms)

Save Water & Stay In Control

The 1.75 GPM rating supports conservation targets without sacrificing everyday utility. Toggle between laminar, shower, and a blade spray for stuck-on messes. Use the pause button to stop flow mid-task, then resume with an automatic return to a clean, splash-resistant laminar stream.

Everyday Performance You Can Feel

A flared, ergonomic spray head makes switching modes intuitive, while the spout’s full 360° rotation improves sink coverage. The forward-rotating lever helps avoid backsplash interference in tight installations for smoother daily use.

Durable Materials, Easier Care

GROHE StarLight SuperSteel finish resists wear for a lasting sheen, and SpeedClean nozzles wipe free of mineral buildup with a fingertip. The SilkMove ceramic cartridge delivers precise, long-life control of temperature and flow.

Installer-Friendly QuickFix Plus

Pre-attached nylon-braided hoses and GROHE QuickFix Plus reduce steps and parts runs. Single-hole mounting, standard 3/8? compression inlets, and clear dimensions simplify planning and speed up the swap.

Sized Right for Most Kitchens

With a 15-13/16? overall height, 8-3/8? aerator height, and 9-5/16? reach, Zedra fits beneath most wall cabinets while providing generous pot-clearance and working room.

Smart Compliance & Confidence

Listed to ADA and major North American plumbing standards, lead-law compliant, and CALGreen/CEC certified. Pair with GROHE’s optional Foot Control retrofit kit for hands-free activation where desired.

Secure Docking (Optional Feature)

Zedra supports GROHE Magnetic Docking for firm, repeatable spray-head seating—helpful in busy kitchens. Availability may vary by finish/batch; see the spec/finish

title.zh: Grohe Eurosmart 30306DC1 Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet in Grohe Supersteel
title.id: Grohe Eurosmart 30306DC1 Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet in Grohe Supersteel
title.th: Grohe Eurosmart 30306DC1 Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet in Grohe Supersteel
title.vi: Grohe Eurosmart 30306DC1 Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet in Grohe Supersteel
title.ar: Grohe Eurosmart 30306DC1 Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet in Grohe Supersteel

description.en:
The GROHE Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Kitchen Faucet with Pull-Out Spray Head offers the style, dependability and performance you expect from GROHE. Gently contoured handle and pull-out spray head provide a comfortable, ergonomic grip to make every task at the kitchen sink easier. Arched spout leaves ample room for filling pots and makes rinsing every corner of the sink easy. Toggle button on dual sprayer delivers a steady stream of water for washing dishes or a gentle spray for rinsing fruits and vegetables. Equipped with exclusive GROHE features, the Eurosmart kitchen faucet ensures exceptional ease of use and lasting beauty.

  • PULL-OUT FAUCET: Dual sprayer features wide, rinsing spray and regular stream
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered kitchen faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Fits single-hole, 2-hole or 3-hole sinks and countertops
  • EASY TO CLEAN: Kitchen faucet sprayer features GROHE SpeedClean rubber nozzles to quickly wipe away limescale with your fingertip
  • SINGLE-HANDLE FAUCET: Features GROHE SilkMove for smooth, precise handle control and operation
  • SWIVEL CONVENIENCE: Faucet swivels 90� for easy access to every corner of the kitchen sink
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this kitchen faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

title.zh: Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose
title.id: Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose
title.th: Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose
title.vi: Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose
title.ar: Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose

description.en:
Enhance the performance of your kitchen faucet with the Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose. Experience the confidence of exceptional quality and the convenience of effortless installation. Upgrade your kitchen today and discover the remarkable difference that Hansgrohe brings to your culinary experience. Make the smart choice and elevate your kitchen to new heights of functionality and style.

Effortless Restoration, Premium Quality, and Stylish Design

  • Manufacturer: Hansgrohe
  • Part #: 88624000
  • Item Weight: 7.2 ounces
  • Dimensions: 60" x 1" x 1"
  • Country of Origin: USA
  • Finish: Chrome
  • Installation Method: Single Hole
  • Handle Material: Stainless Steel
  • Certifications: NSF/ KTW/ W270/WRAS
  • Versatile: This Hansgrohe pull-down hose is compatible with most Hansgrohe pull-down kitchen faucets, allowing you to customize your faucet to your personal style.
  • Maximum Flexibility: The Hansgrohe 88624000 has a length of 50 inches so you can reach all corners of your sink and enjoy a greater range of motion while washing dishes or filling pots.
  • Easy Installation: This replacement hose by Hansgrohe has QuickConnect technology, so you can be confident that a secure and reliable connection has been established when you hear the audible 'click.'
  • Material: The Hansgrohe 88624000 Replacement Hose is built of carbodur ceramic and strong nylon wrapping with metal joiners, guaranteeing durability and reliable performance.
  • Environmental and Food Grade certified PE inner hose for safe drinking water and family health, ensuring lead-free, non-toxic and tasteless.

Experience the Difference with Hansgrohe

Hansgrohe is a trusted name in the kitchen and bathroom industry, known for its commitment to quality, innovation, and design. With over 120 years of experience, Hansgrohe continues to be a leader in the industry by providing exceptional products that enhance your everyday experiences. When you choose Hansgrohe, you can trust that you are getting a product that is built to last and designed to impress. Upgrade your kitchen with the Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose and experience the difference for yourself. Elevate your culinary experience today!

Don't settle for a subpar kitchen faucet when you can upgrade to excellence with the Hansgrohe 88624000 Pull-Down Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose. With its effortless installation, durable construction, and sleek design, this replacement hose is the perfect choice for any kitchen. Trust in Hansgrohe for exceptional quality, effortless installation, and unmatched style. Transform your kitchen into a functional and stylish space with the help of Hansgrohe.

(PLEASE NOTE: This hose is not compatible with Hansgrohe Select or AXOR Select kitchen models.)

Hansgrohe 88624000 Limited Lifetime Warranty

This product is covered under Hansgrohe's limited lifetime warranty for functional and finish defects. The Hansgrohe Pull Out Hose Replacement undergoes rigorous 100% water testing in development and 100% air testing in production to ensure quality and durability.

Order your Hansgrohe Kitchen Faucet Replacement Hose today from Plumbing Deals and give your kitchen faucet a new lease of life. As the trusted source for all your plumbing needs, we are committed to providing our customers with superior quality products that offer excellent value for money.

title.zh: Hansgrohe 74800671 Zesis Kitchen Faucet 2-Spray, Pull-Out, 1.75 GPM in Matte Black
title.id: Hansgrohe 74800671 Zesis Kitchen Faucet 2-Spray, Pull-Out, 1.75 GPM in Matte Black
title.th: Hansgrohe 74800671 Zesis Kitchen Faucet 2-Spray, Pull-Out, 1.75 GPM in Matte Black
title.vi: Hansgrohe 74800671 Zesis Kitchen Faucet 2-Spray, Pull-Out, 1.75 GPM in Matte Black
title.ar: Hansgrohe 74800671 Zesis Kitchen Faucet 2-Spray, Pull-Out, 1.75 GPM in Matte Black

description.en:
With the new hansgrohe Zesis line, you'll discover minimalist design that integrates seamlessly into your kitchen with easy-to-use features. This attractive faucet will make a stylish focal point in your kitchen with zero compromise in functionality.

  • FLEXIBLE CONFIGURATION: Single-hole faucet; can also be installed over existing multi-hole counter configuration (baseplate and soap dispenser sold separately)
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid brass construction ensures a long product life
  • FAUCET SIZE: The Zesis HighArc kitchen faucet has an overall height of inches and a spout reach of 8.625 inches.
  • EXTENDED HOSE RANGE: With the pull-out spout's 8.625 -inch extended range, 150-degree swivel spout and two spray modes, kitchen tasks have never been so easy
  • SIMPLE TO CLEAN: The easy-to-clean anti-limescale silicone aerator optimize water flow performance and can be quickly wiped clean
  • WATER FLOW: Low-Flow compliant rate of 1.75 GPM
  • SPRAY TYPE: This faucet features the spray type which causes less splashing than traditional faucets
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: 3/8-inch connection hoses included for quick and easy DIY installation
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product

title.en: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.zh: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.id: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.th: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.vi: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.ar: Hansgrohe 72806001 Talis N Kitchen Faucet, U-Style 1-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome

description.en:
The modern minimalist design of the Talis N U-spout kitchen faucet adds a modern touch to the kitchen with its consistently sophisticated style. All elements are seamlessly incorporated into the slim silhouette. The brilliant chrome finish adds the perfect finishing touch to your kitchen workspace. The swivelling pull-out spout sends water precisely where you need it, and is perfect for filling up coffee pots to start your day or cleaning up after dinner. The shower spray makes cleaning fruit and vegetables quick and easy. Users can switch between spray types using the ultra-flat button on the spout. The pull-out spout glides back into a magnetic slot once finished (MagFit).

  • Minimalist Design: Sleek U-spout combined with the slim protruding lever handle is space-saving and ergonomic
  • DISTINCTIVE SHAPE: The U-shaped spout brings a unique and eye catching element to your kitchen workspace.
  • SPRAY TYPE: This faucet features aerated and needle sprays, which is a softer spray that splashes less
  • SMOOTH AND DURABLE HANDLE: Solid brass construction, premium ceramic cartridge ensures long-term, leak-free operation
  • DURABLE FINISH: Applied using the latest finish technologies to not only look great but also hold up to kitchen use
  • SIMPLE TO CLEAN: The easy-to-clean anti-limescale silicone aerator optimize water flow performance and can be quickly wiped clean
  • WATER FLOW: Low-Flow compliant rate of 1.75 GPM
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: 3/8-inch connection hoses included for quick and easy DIY installation
  • FLEXIBLE CONFIGURATION: Single-hole faucet; can also be installed over existing multi-hole counter configuration (baseplate and soap dispenser sold separately)
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: Consumer purchases of hansgrohe products from authorized sellers are covered by a limited lifetime manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

title.en: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.zh: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.id: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.th: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.vi: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome
title.ar: Hansgrohe 04851000 Locarno Semi-Pro Kitchen Faucet, 2-Spray, 1.75 GPM in Chrome

description.en:
Inspired by the Art Deco movement and the 1920s, Locarno is the revival of iconic sophistication and elegance. Geometric octagonal form recalls the monumental period and will make a bold statement of authenticity and artistic appreciation in any living space. Available in five different finishes, Locarno will enable endless creativity, opening the door for uniquely glamorous interior spaces. The semi-professional kitchen faucet allows you to have total access to your kitchen sink, making it easy to fill your coffee pot and keep your sink clean thanks to the 360-degree spout. The faucet features an aerated spray, which provides a luxurious feeling and limits the amount of splashing on your countertop as well as the shower spray that makes cleaning fruit and vegetables quick and easy. The single-hole design may be installed in either a 1-hole or multi-hole counter setup with the addition of the Locarno baseplate (04857xxx).

  • BALANCED DESIGN: The design inspired by the Art Deco movement create balanced design that suits any living space.
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid brass construction ensures a long product life
  • FAUCET SIZE: The Locarno HighArc kitchen faucet has an overall height of 17.38 inches and a spout reach of 8.38 inches.
  • SEAMLESS STYLE: The Locarno kitchen faucet is a perfect match to the Locarno kitchen collection, which provides a bold room style
  • SIMPLE TO CLEAN: The easy-to-clean anti-limescale silicone aerator optimize water flow performance and can be quickly wiped clean
  • WATER FLOW: Low-Flow compliant rate of 1.75 GPM
  • SPRAY TYPE: This faucet features aerated and needle sprays, which causes less splashing than traditional faucets
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: Features the sBox, which provides smooth, protected hose guidance in the cabinet, length up to 30"
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: Consumer purchases of hansgrohe products from authorized sellers are covered by a limited lifetime manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
The kitchen is where we gather, the center of our daily routines and family lives. With a wide range of kitchen fixtures, Joleena has products to fille every moment. For the helping hands that need washing and the food that needs rinsing, Joleena is there. The HighArc Kitchen Faucet allows you to have total acces to your kitchen sink, making it easy to fill your a pot and keep your sink clean thanks to the 180-degree spout. The faucet features an aerated spray, which provides a luxurious feeling and limits the amount of splashing on your countertop. The single-hole design may be installed in either a 1-hole or multi-hole counter setup with the addition of the Joleena baseplate (04797xxx).

  • FLEXIBLE CONFIGURATION: Single-hole faucet; can also be installed over existing multi-hole counter configuration (baseplate and soap dispenser sold separately)
  • ROBUST MATERIALS: Solid brass construction ensures a long product life
  • FAUCET SIZE: The Joleena HighArc kitchen faucet has an overall height of 15.8 inches and a spout reach of 8.5 inches.
  • EXTENDED HOSE RANGE: With the pull-out spout?s 13.75-inch extended range, 150-degree swivel spout and two spray modes, kitchen tasks have never been so easy
  • SIMPLE TO CLEAN: The easy-to-clean anti-limescale silicone aerator optimize water flow performance and can be quickly wiped clean
  • WATER FLOW: Low-Flow compliant rate of 1.75 GPM
  • SPRAY TYPE: This faucet features aerated and needle sprays, which causes less splashing than traditional faucets
  • CONNECTION DETAILS: 3/8-inch connection hoses included for quick and easy DIY installation
  • INSTALLATION NOTES: Hansgrohe recommends a licensed plumber install this product
  • LIMITED LIFETIME CONSUMER WARRANTY: All hansgrohe products are covered by a limited manufacturer warranty applicable to the original purchaser

description.en:
The GROHE Zedra Pull-Out Kitchen Faucet with Dual-Function Spray Head has a contemporary look and innovative technology. This sleek, single-handle faucet features a pull-out spray head with button to easily switch between regular stream and shower spray functions. The Zedra kitchen faucet is the perfect combination of style and substance for today�s home. GROHE Zedra is the name for Ladylux L2.

  • PULL-OUT KITCHEN FAUCET: Features dual-function spray head with regular stream and spray
  • OPTIONAL TOUCHLESS CONVENIENCE: Works with GROHE Foot Control, model 30310000, sold separately
  • DRIP-FREE PERFORMANCE: Equipped with quality ceramic disc valve
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Fits single-hole sinks and countertops, with hoses included
  • EASY TO CLEAN: Kitchen faucet sprayer features GROHE SpeedClean rubber nozzles to quickly wipe away limescale with your fingertip

  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this kitchen faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

description.en:
The GROHE Zedra Pull-Down Prep Sink Faucet with Triple-Function Spray Head is a single-handle faucet ideal for a secondary kitchen sink or bar sink in an entertaining area. This sleek, contemporary faucet features an ergonomic, pull-down spray head, distinctively flared for in-hand comfort when switching between three spray functions: regular stream for filling pots, shower spray for rinsing the sink or washing fruit, and a powerful blade spray to quickly clear food from plates. The Zedra single-hole bar/prep sink faucet is the perfect combination of style and substance. GROHE Zedra is the name for Ladylux L2.

  • PULL-DOWN BAR FAUCET: Features triple-function spray head with regular stream, spray, powerful blade spray, plus pause to briefly stop water flow
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered kitchen faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Fits single-hole sinks and countertops, with hoses included
  • FORWARD ROTATING HANDLE: Will not interfere with backsplash
  • EASY TO CLEAN: Kitchen faucet sprayer features GROHE SpeedClean rubber nozzles to quickly wipe away limescale with your fingertip
  • SINGLE-HANDLE FAUCET: Features GROHE SilkMove for smooth, precise handle control and operation
  • SWIVEL CONVENIENCE: Faucet swivels 360� for island-friendly use and easy access to every corner of the kitchen sink
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this kitchen faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance
  • GROHE Zedra is the name for Ladylux L2

description.en:
The GROHE Eurosmart Single-Handle Dual Spray Kitchen Faucet with Pull-Out Spray Head offers the style, dependability and performance you expect from GROHE. Gently contoured handle and pull-out spray head provide a comfortable, ergonomic grip to make every task at the kitchen sink easier. Arched spout leaves ample room for filling pots and makes rinsing every corner of the sink easy. Toggle button on dual sprayer delivers a steady stream of water for washing dishes or a gentle spray for rinsing fruits and vegetables. Equipped with exclusive GROHE features, the Eurosmart kitchen faucet ensures exceptional ease of use and lasting beauty.

  • PULL-OUT FAUCET: Dual sprayer features wide, rinsing spray and regular stream
  • DRIP-FREE: German engineered kitchen faucet with quality ceramic disc valve to ensure leak-proof performance
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Fits single-hole, 2-hole or 3-hole sinks and countertops
  • EASY TO CLEAN: Kitchen faucet sprayer features GROHE SpeedClean rubber nozzles to quickly wipe away limescale with your fingertip
  • SINGLE-HANDLE FAUCET: Features GROHE SilkMove for smooth, precise handle control and operation
  • SWIVEL CONVENIENCE: Faucet swivels 90� for easy access to every corner of the kitchen sink
  • DURABLE FINISHES: GROHE StarLight coating maintains luster on brushed and polished finishes
  • LIMITED LIFETIME WARRANTY: GROHE warranties this kitchen faucet to be free of manufacturer defects, your assurance of quality design and performance

description.en:
The Belfield Pre-Rinse Spring kitchen sink faucet offers extended reach and functionality while also adding elegant, intricate features to the sink. The Belfield collection artfully blends classic style elements with contemporary capabilities for a timeless and fresh appearance. Now with a lower profile, this Spring Galley kitchen faucet provides the convenience of a traditional spring faucet while maintaining a compact design for smaller sink spaces. Available in Moen's Chrome finish to add a clean, crisp look to your kitchen.

  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button
  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • FUNCTION: High arc spout provides height and reach to fill or clean large pots while pulldown wand provides the maneuverability for cleaning or rinsing
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation

description.en:
Having a cold water tap at your kitchen sink has never been easier or more stylish. The Sip drinking water faucet from Moen offers a coordinating style for every decorating taste: traditional, transitional or modern, as well as multiple finish options. Sip styles feature a high-arc rotating spout that gives you more convenience at the sink. Pair with a Moen under-sink filtration system or Moen reverse osmosis system to experience clean, crisp cold drinking water right from your sink, and reduce the need for plastic water bottles for a more eco-conscious solution.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • FILTERED WATER: Moen SIP Drinking Water Faucets conveniently provide separate cold, filtered drinking water at the sink
  • CONVENIENCE: SIP faucets feature high-arc spouts, which make filling tall glasses or large containers a breeze
  • ROTATING SPOUT: The unique rotating spout gives more control over the water flow to prevent splashing

The Sip drinking water faucet from Moen offers a coordinating style for every decorating taste: traditional, transitional or modern, as well as multiple finish options. Sip styles feature a high-arc rotating spout that gives you more convenience at the sink. Pair with a Moen under-sink filtration system or Moen reverse osmosis system to experience clean, crisp cold drinking water right from your sink, and reduce the need for plastic water bottles for a more eco-conscious solution.

  • FILTERED WATER: Moen SIP Drinking Water Faucets conveniently provide separate cold, filtered drinking water at the sink
  • CONVENIENCE: SIP faucets feature high-arc spouts, which make filling tall glasses or large containers a breeze
  • ROTATING SPOUT: The unique rotating spout gives more control over the water flow to prevent splashing

description.en:
Product Description Elegant in its simplicity, the Moen Arbor Kitchen Faucet has a sleek, single-handle design that's easy to mount, install, and operate. This faucet's versatile style suits a variety of kitchens and its matching side spray gives you more flexibility when cleaning in and around the prep area. The Arbor can be mounted on a sink or countertop, and the Duralock Quick Connect system ensures an effortless, secure installation. Backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty. From the Manufacturer The Arbor line delivers streamlined and timeless transitional styling that meets personal preferences and houses a host of performance features that make Arbor extremely flexible and friendly to use.

  • EVERYDAY CONVENIENCE: Includes side spray hose for convenient, flexible cleaning at the sink
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation; 1- to 4-hole mount with included optional deck plate
  • SPOT RESISTANT: Spot Resist Stainless finish resists fingerprints and water spots for a cleaner looking kitchen
  • EASY TO USE: Single handle kitchen faucet with side sprayer makes it easy to adjust the water temperature and pressure

description.en:
Product Description Bring crisp edges and an ageless style to your bathroom with the Moen Voss Two-Handle High-Arc Bathroom Faucet. This faucet features a three-hole mount with 4-inch centerset design for easy installation. Two convenient lever handles give you control of water temperature and flow. The faucet provides an aerated stream of up to 1.2 gallons per minute and meets WaterSense criteria for water efficiency without sacrificing water pressure. With a timeless, yet fashion-forward design and backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty, the Moen Voss Two-Handle High-Arc Bathroom Faucet adds a confident look to any three-hole sink. From the Manufacturer Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features give the Voss collection an ageless, yet fashion-forward, presence. Each silhouette brings a confident transitional style to the bath.

  • UNIQUE FINISH: Oil-Rubbed Bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, Old World finish with striking light and dark accents
  • WATERSENSE CERTIFIED: Meets EPA WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance
  • EVERYDAY CONVENIENCE: Aerated flow is ideal for everyday bathroom tasks, like brushing teeth and washing hands
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Coordinates with other faucets and accessories in the Voss Collection

description.en:
Product Description The Moen Sip Modern Cold Water Stainless Steel Faucet with Optional Water Filtration System adds a dedicated cold water tap to your kitchen. It dispenses cold water, making this the perfect choice for a bar faucet or a dedicated sink faucet. The faucet features a rotating, high-arc spout that provides ample clearance for pitchers, along with a single handle for easy adjustments. Its spot-resist stainless steel finish resists water spots and fingerprints and pairs perfectly with the other Moen faucets for a sleek, cohesive look. For added peace-of-mind, this beverage faucet is designed for hassle-free installation.To care for it properly, clean the kitchen beverage faucet with a soft, damp cloth and avoid using abrasive cleaners. Add Moen's F9800 Advanced Single Stage Water Filtration System to get fresh, filtered drinking water on demand; the faucet water filter replacement is sold seperately. This product is backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips, and finish defects. From the Manufacturer Having a cold water tap at your kitchen sink has never been easier - or more stylish. The Sip beverage faucet offers a coordinating style for every decorating taste: traditional, transitional or modern. Sip styles feature a high arc rotating spout that gives you more convenience at the sink. Add the optional filtration system to get clean drinking water when desired.

  • COLD WATER BEVERAGE FAUCET: Dispenses cold water only, making it an ideal choice for a bar faucet or dedicated drinking water faucet at your sink
  • PEACE-OF-MIND: Modern cold water beverage faucet designed for hassle-free installation
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Pairs perfectly with other Moen faucets for a cohesive look
  • SPOT-RESIST STAINLESS STEEL: The stainless steel faucet resists fingerprints and water spots for a cleaner looking kitchen

description.en:
Product Description Add a relaxed style and traditional charm to your bathroom with the Moen Wynford Two-Handle High-Arc Bathroom Faucet. Designed with a High-Arc spout and durable finish, the Wynford faucet features a 3-hole mount and two convenient lever handles that can be installed at any distance between 8 and 16 inches for easy customization. The faucet is compatible with the Moen M-PACT valve system that makes it easy to update your trim kit without touching the plumbing. This faucet provides an aerated stream of up to 1.2 gallons per minute and meets WaterSense criteria for water efficiency without sacrificing water pressure. It is backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty. From the Manufacturer Wynford is a traditional styled bath suite that has updated, classic details with clean, refined design cues, allowing it to work across multiple decorating styles.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • VALVE REQUIRED: This trim kit requires Moen valve 9000 to complete installation
  • LONGSTANDING FLEXIBILITY: Built on the Moen M-PACT common valve system, allowing you to update the faucet style in the future without replacing any plumbing
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Can be installed between 8" to 16" for a more customized widespread installation

description.en:
Bold. Modern. Sleek. Inspired by clean lines and a minimalist approach to style, the sleek kitchen faucet Collection proves the old adage that less really is more. The dramatic flared base is mirrored in the pulldown, self-retracting faucet head and spray wand, allowing for ease-of-use and easy clean up. Dramatic flair featuring sleek and clean lines, pushing beyond transitional into a modern style with broad appeal. Featuring a clean and cylindrical modern style with soft, flowing lines, Sleek elevates modern to a new level and defines the shape and function of things to come. Featuring single-sensor touchless activation, MotionSense Wave allows you to easily turn water on and off with the wave of a hand�no need to touch the faucet with dirty or wet hands. Installation is quick and easy with the Duralock Quick Connect system, and the faucet can be mounted on either a sink or countertop.

  • ONE SENSOR: MotionSense Wave features single-sensor touchless activation, allowing you to easily turn water on and off with the wave of a hand
  • POWER CLEAN: Power Clean spray technology provides 50 percent more spray power versus most other faucets without the Power Clean technology
  • RETRACTABLE: Touchless faucet is equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement, and secure docking of the spray head
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Designed to be installed through 1 or 3 holes; escutcheon included

description.en:
With a high arc and exposed-spring design, pre-rinse spring kitchen faucets combine a commercial inspired look with thoughtfully designed innovations ideal for residential use. Inspired by clean lines and a minimalist approach to style, the Sleek kitchen faucet proves the old adage that less really is more. Boost the performance of your kitchen faucet with the push of a button. Power Boost fills containers faster and provides 50% more spray power, for quicker clean-up. Moen's game-changing Power Boost innovation helps maximize your time at the sink, offering improved functionality at your fingertips. Faucet pulldown hose offers flexible water delivery while the hose retracts with ease. High arc spout provides height and reach to fill or clean large pots.

  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button
  • SIMPLE INSTALLATION: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation
  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • EASY TO USE: Spring faucet pulldown hose offers flexible water delivery and the hose retracts with ease

description.en:
The Moen Voss Brushed Gold Transitional Two-Handle High Arc Centerset Bathroom Faucet, a perfect blend of elegance and functionality that transforms your bathroom into a luxurious retreat. Designed for a 4-inch 3-hole setup, this bathroom faucet is the epitome of style and performance. The brushed gold finish adds a touch of sophistication, making it a standout piece in any bathroom decor. Whether you're renovating your space or simply upgrading your bathroom sink faucet, the Moen Voss is the ideal choice for those who appreciate quality and design. The two-handle design offers precise control over water temperature and flow, ensuring a comfortable and customized experience every time. As a leading choice among bathroom faucets, the Moen Voss is engineered for durability and reliability, promising years of flawless performance. Its transitional style seamlessly blends with both modern and traditional bathroom aesthetics, making it a versatile addition to any home. Installation is a breeze with the Moen Voss bathroom faucet hole setup, designed to fit effortlessly into your existing bathroom sink configuration.

  • TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Two-handle lever handles make it easy to adjust the water
  • EVERYDAY LUXURY: Brushed Gold finish features a mix of classic gold tones and modern brushed texture, adding sophisticated, contemporary glamour to any room
  • COORDINATING COLLECTION: Bathroom faucet 4 inch setup coordinates with other accessories in the Voss Collection
  • WATERSENSE CERTIFIED: Meets EPA WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance

description.en:
The Genta pulldown faucet with its contemporary tiers and flat planes brings an appealing yet bold style that makes a statement in any kitchen. The simple lines of the faucet create contemporary style, while the pull-down wand delivers on-demand functionality. Boost the performance of your kitchen faucet with the push of a button. Power Boost fills containers faster and provides 50% more spray power, for quicker clean-up. Moen's game-changing Power Boost innovation helps maximize your time at the sink, offering improved functionality at your fingertips.

  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button on the kitchen sink sprayer
  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement, and secure docking of the spray head
  • SPOT RESISTANT: Spot Resist Stainless finish resists fingerprints and water spots for a cleaner-looking kitchen
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation for 1, 3 or 4-hole sink configuration

description.en:
With its streamlined, no-frills style and low-arc design, the Moen Chateau Kitchen Faucet with Side Spray delivers dependable performance with understated appeal. This faucet has a single lever handle for fast water adjustments and offers an aerated stream for everyday kitchen tasks. A convenient matching side spray gives you more flexibility for cleaning and prepping in and out of the sink. For quick, no-stress installation, the Chateau faucet features the Duralock Quick Connect system and mounts on most four hole sinks or countertops configurations. Available in three attractive finishes, this faucet has a Duralast 1255 cartridge that withstands the rigors of everyday use and is backed by Moen's Limited Lifetime Warranty. The ever-popular Chateau collection features soft, clean curves and modern, rounded styling - a proven classic. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

description.en:
Product Description With its flared spout and simple curves, the Moen Camerist Kitchen Faucet offers transitional style and reliable performance. Featuring a pivoting low arc neck, lever handle, and aerated stream of up to 1.5 gallons per minute, this faucet makes every day cleaning tasks easy. This faucet is available in three finishes: a highly reflective chrome finish, an antiqued oil rubbed bronze finish, and a Spot Resist stainless finish that resists water spots and fingerprints. It features a 1255 Duralast cartridge to ensure lasting performance and has a standard design that mounts on the sink or countertop. From the Manufacturer It's the little things that add up to a lot of transitional style for Camerist: a flared-tip spout, simple curves and single-handle operation create an updated basic collection.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • TEMPERATURE CONTROL: Single handle lever make it easy to adjust the water
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation
  • ADA COMPLIANT: Complies with Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) specifications

description.en:
Product Description Understated style boasting versatile functionality meets its match in this kitchen faucet with pull-down sprayer. The Arbor Single-Handle Faucet features Reflex Technology which provides smooth operation, easy movement and the pull-out faucet's sprayhead easy docks into place. Arbor is constructed with the highest standards and offers a Limited Lifetime Warranty against leaks, drips and more. Arbor's smooth profile is tailored to perfection. The slight flair of the handle and the curve of the spout make this a transitional look that works with a variety of decorating styles. From the Manufacturer Arbor's smooth profile is tailored to perfection. The slight flair of the handle and the curve of the spout make this a transitional look that works with a variety of decorating styles.

  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button
  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement and secure docking of the spray head
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Designed to be installed through 1 or 3 holes; optional deckplate included

description.en:
Product Description Offering a clean, simple design, Moen's Camerist range of kitchen faucets brings a graceful style to your home that can complement any decor. This one-handle low arc pullout kitchen faucet features a pulldown spout with a one-of-a-kind pause button that enables you to conveniently interrupt water flow and a 68-inch braided hose. This version comes in a chrome finish to create a bright, highly reflective, cool grey metallic look, and it's also available in classic stainless, and oil rubbed bronze. The faucet's pulldown feature provides the infinite maneuverability for cleaning or rinsing, and temperature is controlled by the 100-degree arc of handle travel. When filling a vessel outside of the sink, the pause feature conveniently stops the flow of water as the wand passes over the countertop, and the single-button control provides flexibility to switch from stream to spray mode. From the Manufacturer The Camerist line offers superior styling. The clean, simple design and graceful style of Camerist has the ability to complement any decor. Moen is dedicated to designing and delivering beautiful products that last a lifetime. Moen offers a diverse selection of kitchen faucets, kitchen sinks, bathroom faucets and accessories, and showering products. Moen products combine style and functionality with durability for a lifetime of customer satisfaction.

  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement, and secure docking of the spray head
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation
  • UNIQUE FINISH: Oil-rubbed bronze finish delivers a rich, dark brown, Old World finish with striking light and dark accents
  • POWER CLEAN: Power Clean spray technology provides 50 percent more spray power versus most other faucets without the Power Clean technology

description.en:
Product Description The Moen Wynford One-Handle High Arc Bathroom Faucet mounts with a single hole, making it a clean fit against custom countertops. Because it meets EPA Water Sense criteria, this faucet is an environmentally friendly purchase that conserves water without sacrificing performance. High arching, single handle operation. ADA compliant. EPA Water Sense certified. Ceramic disc valve type. Lever action handle. Spout height: 5 in.. Spout reach: 4.625 in.. Flow rate (GPM): 1.2. From the Manufacturer Wynford is a traditional styled bath suite that has updated, classic details with clean, refined design cues, allowing it to work across multiple decorating styles.

  • EVERYDAY CONVENIENCE: Aerated flow is ideal for everyday bathroom tasks, like brushing teeth and washing hands
  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style
  • FLEXIBLE DESIGN: Single hole mount creates a cleaner look against custom countertops, or use included escutcheon for three-hole installations
  • WATERSENSE CERTIFIED: Meets EPA WaterSense criteria to conserve water without sacrificing performance (Certified 2016 by IAPMO Research and Testing, Inc.)

description.en:
The Genta pulldown faucet with its contemporary tiers and flat planes brings an appealing yet bold style that makes a statement in any kitchen. The simple lines of the faucet create contemporary style, while the pull-down wand delivers on-demand functionality. Boost the performance of your kitchen faucet with the push of a button. Power Boost fills containers faster and provides 50% more spray power, for quicker clean-up. Moen's game-changing Power Boost innovation helps maximize your time at the sink, offering improved functionality at your fingertips. The reflex docking system provides smooth operation, easy movement and secure docking of the pulldown spray head. Power Boost delivers a powerful stream of water for faster filling and heavy-duty cleaning. Spot resist finish keeps your faucet looking cleaner with a finish that resists fingerprints and water spots. This kitchen faucet features an aerated stream to maintain a constant rate of water flow that is ideal for everyday cleaning and filling pots without splashing. It is equipped with the Duralock quick connect system for easy installation, without the need for tools and can be installed through 1 or 3 holes. The optional escutcheon is included.

  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button
  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement, and secure docking of the spray head
  • EASY INSTALL & DURABLE: Duralock quick connect system ensures hassle-free setup, backed by Moen's warranty, for your long-term peace of mind
  • VERSATILE DESIGN: Chrome finish is highly reflective for a mirror-like look that works with any decorating style

description.en:
The Moen Genta LX One-Handle Modern Kitchen Faucet is a perfect blend of style, functionality, and innovation for your kitchen. It has a durable Spot Resist Stainless finish, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen that also resists fingerprints and water spots. Whether you're upgrading your kitchen or building a new one, the Moen Genta LX is the ideal choice for those who value both aesthetics and practicality. Experience the ultimate convenience with the Reflex Docking Head, which offers smooth retraction, easy movement, and secure docking of the pull down sprayer. It is engineered to make your daily kitchen tasks more efficient and enjoyable. The pull-down sprayer provides a powerful rinse, making it easier to tackle tough cleaning jobs, while the Power Boost technology delivers a faster clean and faster fill with just the push of a button. It's one-handle lever makes it easy to adjust water temperature and flow, providing you with precise control. The high-arc spout offers ample clearance for filling large pots and pans, making it a versatile addition to any kitchen. With its durable construction and reliable performance, this sink faucet is built to last, offering you years of trouble-free use. It is easy to install in a one or 3 hole setup.

  • BOOSTED STREAM: Moen's exclusive Power Boost technology offers a faster clean and faster fill with the push of a button on the kitchen sink sprayer
  • RETRACTABLE: Equipped with the Reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement, and secure docking of the spray head
  • SPOT RESISTANT: Spot Resist Stainless finish resists fingerprints and water spots for a cleaner-looking kitchen
  • EASY TO INSTALL: Features Duralock quick connect system for easy installation for 1, 3 or 4-hole sink configuration

This chrome two-handle wall mount bathroom faucet was built to last by MOEN. Designed for use in your bath. This trim kit requires MOEN valve 9700 to complete installation. From the Manufacturer Crisp edges and uncomplicated style features give the Voss collection an ageless, yet fashion-forward, presence. Each silhouette brings a confident transitional style to the bath.

description.en:
The sink is the heart of the kitchen, and Moen is making it more efficient to move about the space with the new workstation kitchen sinks. With a workstation sink, you can transform messy routines such as rinsing, chopping, and washing into a contained, all-in-one experience right over the sink and free up valuable counter space. The workstation bundle includes a contemporary stainless-steel undermount sink and high-quality accessories such as a bottom sink grid, colander, hardwood cutting board, flexible drying rack, and drain strainer/cover. The sink also includes a built-in ledge to secure accessories or slide them over to tailor your workstation to meet your needs.

  • Workstation sinks maximize prep space and increase workflow in the kitchen
  • The sink and accessories ease tasks in the kitchen, providing an improved experience
  • Complete tasks directly over the sink. The built-in ledge slides accessories to make prepping food and cleaning up more manageable
  • Perfect for any size kitchen, including small spaces without a lot of counter space, as the sink can help extend prep areas

title.en: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat
title.zh: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat
title.id: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat
title.th: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat
title.vi: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat
title.ar: Blanco 238483: Precis Collection Foldable Drying Mat

description.en:
It is often the clever accessories that make everyday kitchen tasks so much more convenient and efficient. BLANCO's new foldable grid is just that; a multi-purpose sink accessory designed to maximize your workspace above the sink bowl. This versatile sink accessory can be used for drying dishes, rinsing produce, or filling your pots without bending over. It can also be used as a trivet for added heat protection for your countertops. When it is not in use, simply roll up the grid and stow at the edge of your sink or easily store in your cabinet or drawer. The options are limitless, making it an indispensable tool in your kitchen.

  • Multi-functional sink accessory designed for drying dishes, rinsing produce, filling pots, or as a trivet
  • Space-saving design keeps your kitchen sink organized and countertops clear of clutter
  • Folding function makes it easy to adjust the size of the workspace needed based on the desired kitchen task
  • Made of high-quality, durable stainless steel rods
  • Heavy-duty silicon provides a slip-proof grip
  • Measures 18.11" L x 17.32" W when fully opened

title.zh: Blanco Diamond Drop-In or Undermount Kitchen Sink 25" x 22" in Biscuit - 440212
