title.th: Blanco Diamond Drop-In or Undermount Kitchen Sink 25" x 22" in Biscuit - 440212
title.vi: Blanco Diamond Drop-In or Undermount Kitchen Sink 25" x 22" in Biscuit - 440212
title.ar: Blanco Diamond Drop-In or Undermount Kitchen Sink 25" x 22" in Biscuit - 440212

description.en:
Both an expression of your individual style, and a testament to BLANCO's unsurpassed quality and craftsmanship - a variety of shape, sizes and features combine to bring you the DIAMOND collection. Every detail has been considered, from the large bowl capacity to the easy-to-clean, durable SILGRANIT surface. The BLANCO DIAMOND DUAL DECK SINGLE BOWL is designed to be used as a secondary sink. Made from the rock hard, SILGRANIT patented surface, the DIAMOND kitchen sink features a smooth surface that is resistant to chips, scratches and heats up to 536 degrees F. Even a fork or the bottom of a hot pan can't damage BLANCO SILGRANIT sinks. The colorful, non-porous surface also makes the bowl resistant from all stains, household acids and alkali solutions as well as easy-to-clean. For three generations, BLANCO has quietly and passionately elevated the standards for luxury sinks, faucets, and decorative accessories. A family-owned company, BLANCO was founded over 85 years ago in Germany, and recently celebrated a milestone of 25 years in the United States where we are recognized as a leader in quality, innovation, and unsurpassed service. Create the ideal kitchen experience with the versatility of the DIAMOND collection. From the Manufacturer Silgranit withstands extreme hot and cold fluctuations and is a uniquely resilient material, less likely to break dinnerware and fine crystal. Softly rounded drain grooves serve as a point of elegance as well as function.

  • SINK DIMENSIONS: 25" L X 22" W X 1" D and designed to fit a minimum 24" cabinet base
  • COMPACT SOLUTION: Ideal for complementary second sink, butler's pantry or bar sink
  • EASY INSTALLATION: Can be installed as either a drop-in or undermount for added convenience
  • ULTRA-DURABLE PATENTED MATERIAL: Heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact-resistant while also 1% hygienic and food-friendly
  • OPTIONAL ACCESSORIES: Grid (item #221) and cutting board for drop-in only (item #44231)
  • Overall: 25-Inch x 22-Inch
  • Self Rimming or under mount installation
  • Silgranit
  • Bowl: 22-inch x 18-13/16-inch x 1-inch
  • Cutout size: 24 1/4-inch x 21 1/4-Inch; Cutout corner radius: 5/8-Inch

title.ar: Blanco Diamond Super Single Drop-In or Undermount Kitchen Sink 33.5" x 22" in Biscotti - 441214

description.en:
Both an expression of your individual style, and a testament to BLANCO's unsurpassed quality and craftsmanship - a variety of shape, sizes and features combine to bring you the DIAMOND collection. Every detail has been considered, from the large bowl capacity to the easy-to-clean, durable SILGRANIT surface. The BLANCO DIAMOND DUAL DECK SUPER SINGLE BOWL offers plenty of room for rinsing, washing, soaking, spraying and straining operations. Made from the rock hard, SILGRANIT patented surface, the DIAMOND kitchen sink features a smooth surface that is resistant to chips, scratches and heats up to 536 degrees F. Even a fork or the bottom of a hot pan can't damage BLANCO SILGRANIT sinks. The colorful, non-porous surface also makes the bowl resistant from all stains, household acids and alkali solutions as well as easy-to-clean. For three generations, BLANCO has quietly and passionately elevated the standards for luxury sinks, faucets, and decorative accessories. A family-owned company, BLANCO was founded over 85 years ago in Germany, and recently celebrated a milestone of 25 years in the United States where we are recognized as a leader in quality, innovation, and unsurpassed service. Create the ideal kitchen experience with the versatility of the DIAMOND collection. From the Manufacturer Heat Resistant - Go ahead, toss in a hot pan. Throw in a baking sheet. Or put that boiling pot right on the work area. Withstanding temperatures of up to 536 Degree, you can't burn, scorch or mar a SILGRANIT II sink. Scratch Resistant - Steak knives. Carving knives, paring knives, pots and pans, you name it, SILGRANIT II can handle it. So whether you're slicing, dicing, mincing or chopping, you just can't scratch this sink. Acid Resistant- Slice a lemon. Squeeze a grapefruit. When it comes to citrus, SILGRANIT II has no fear. Rock hard granite material creates an acid-resistant surface, so you can enjoy all your favorite foods without damaging the finish. Stain Resistant - No matter what you're drinking, pouring� or even sometimes spilling, SILGRAIT II sinks are designed to defy all types of stains. In fact, the ultra-durable, non-porous material resists everything from black tea to red wine. Cleanability - Easier to care for than any other material - our newest innovation is an advanced surface technology that repels water, provides a permanent protective shield against stains and is extremely hygienic. The proof is in the 7 patents and the independent test results - up to 4-percent greater cleanability than others in the category. SILGRANIT II is also cleanable with just the wipe of a sponge against grape juice, acidic foods, tea stains, red wine, even hair dyes. Plus, whether you fun a fork, knife or place a hot pan up to 536 Degree right on its surface - all have no lasting impact. Simply put, SILGRANIT II provides the ultimate finish in color, durability, and cleanability. Non-Fading - Lesser sinks don't stand a chance in the direct sunlight. But a SILGRANIT II sink won't fade, crack or dry out. The color penetrates the entire product - not just the surface. So you get consistent color that last a lifetime.

  • SINK DIMENSIONS: 32.5" L X 22" W X 9.5" D and designed to fit a minimum 36" cabinet base
  • EASY INSTALLATION: Can be installed as either a drop-in or undermount for added convenience
  • ULTRA-DURABLE PATENTED MATERIAL: Heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact-resistant while also 1% hygienic and food-friendly
  • OPTIONAL ACCESSORIES: Grid (item #2211) and cutting board for drop-in only (item #4423)
  • WARRANTY: Your BLANCO kitchen sink features a Limited Lifetime Warranty for added protection and complete peace of mind
  • 8-percent rock hard granite
  • Bowl depth 9-1/2-Inch
  • Outside dimensions 33 1/2 inches by 22 inches
  • Biscotti
  • Drain width 3-1/2 inches

description.en:
5 Pack

When it comes to installing a new undermount sink, reliable sink mounting clips are crucial. BLANCO Undermount Clips provide a secure solution that makes sink installation easy. Specifically designed to ensure the safe and secure installation of your SILGRANIT undermount sink, these tough and durable stainless metal clips are a must-have. The set includes everything you need: screws, clips, inserts, washers, and washouts, along with detailed installation instructions. Designed to perfectly fit BLANCO undermount kitchen sinks, this installation kit has the best sink brackets for granite composite SILGRANIT kitchen sinks. Trust in our high-quality clips to hold your sink firmly in place, so you can enjoy a beautifully installed undermount sink for years to come.

Undermount Sink Installation Essentials

  • Blanco 440851 Undermount Clips simplify the installation process for your SILGRANIT and granite composite SILGRANIT sinks
  • These clips provide a sturdy and dependable solution, ensuring your sink stays securely in place for years to come
  • Material: durable stainless steel
  • Corrosion resistant and maintain strength
  • Made in the USA
  • Discreet and hidden security
  • This pack includes 10 undermount sink clip support brackets, plus the screw, clip, insert, washer and washout
  • Easy-to-follow instructions for seamless installation

Blanco: Quality You Can Trust

Blanco is a trusted name in kitchen solutions, known for its dedication to innovation and quality. The 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips exemplify these values, making them the preferred choice for professionals and homeowners alike.

Ensure a hassle-free installation of your new undermount sink with BLANCO Undermount Clips. Designed specifically for SILGRANIT undermount sinks, these durable stainless metal clips provide a secure and reliable solution. The installation kit includes all the necessary components and detailed instructions. Trust in BLANCO's expertise to hold your sink firmly in place for years to come. Upgrade now and experience the excellence of Blanco.

description.en:
From farmhouse chic to cottage charm to midcentury modern style, Moen fireclay sinks add a definitive aesthetic touch to any kitchen along with superior performance. A gleaming white glazed finish is highly resistant to scratches, chips, heat and stains, and an easy-to-clean smooth surface stands up to abrasive cleaners. Beneath the surface, 100% eco-friendly, lead-free materials compose the thick, durable fireclay body that minimizes sound during use. A deep bowl accommodates many dishes and even large pots and pans, making the apron-front sinks highly functional.

  • Highly scratch and stain resistant
  • Stainless steel bottom sink rack and chrome strainer included
  • Thick and durable material aids in minmizing sound during use
  • White glazed finish is easy to clean with long lasting smooth shining surface

title.zh: Blanco 442765: Formera Collection 28" Undermount Single Bowl Kitchen Sink

title.th: Blanco 442765: Formera Collection 28" Undermount Single Bowl Kitchen Sink
title.vi: Blanco 442765: Formera Collection 28" Undermount Single Bowl Kitchen Sink
title.ar: Blanco 442765: Formera Collection 28" Undermount Single Bowl Kitchen Sink

description.en:
Blanco Formera 28″ Undermount Single-Bowl Stainless Steel Kitchen Sink – Satin Polish

Blanco has been a global leader in kitchen fixtures since 1925, engineering sinks that combine German precision with beautiful, functional design. The Formera collection offers a sleek and durable solution perfect for modern culinary spaces.

  • Brand: Blanco
  • Model (MPN): 442765
  • Material: 18‑gauge 304 stainless steel (18/10 chrome‑nickel) 
  • Finish: Satin polish
  • Dimensions: 28″ L × 18″ W × 9″ H
  • Bowl Size: 26″ L × 16″ W × 9″ D 
  • Corner Radius: 30 mm (R30) 
  • Drain Location: Rear-center (3½″ connection) 
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 33″ 
  • Sound Insulation: Pre-installed pads reduce noise 
  • Warranty: Limited lifetime 
  • UPC: 747943047456

Premium 18‑Gauge Steel with German Precision

Crafted from ANSI 304 stainless steel with 18/10 chrome-nickel, this sink offers exceptional resistance to rust, stains, and heat—while maintaining a sleek, modern appearance.

Elegant R30 Radius Corners

Large 30 mm radius corners create a smooth, curved interior that not only enhances cleaning ease but also brings a contemporary aesthetic to your kitchen.

Rear-Center Drain for Maximum Storage

The strategically rear-positioned drain frees up usable cabinet space beneath your sink, making room for larger sink accessories or waste systems.

Quiet, Durable Undermount Design

Undermount installation provides seamless countertop integration, while sound-dampening pads muffle dish and disposal noise for a quieter kitchen environment.

Additional Features

  • Fully undermounted for a clean edge-to-countertop look
  • Brushed satin polish finish resists water spots and fingerprints
  • High-capacity 9″ deep bowl handles large pots and pans
  • Requires separate strainer and installation clips
  • Limited lifetime warranty backed by Blanco

description.en:
The BLANCO QUATRUS MULTI-LEVEL GRID is designed to be used in a variety of ways. With an elevated sink grid, you can fill a pot of water without bending over, easily dry dishes, or rinse fruits and veggies with ease. BLANCO elevated grids are heat-resistant and can be safely washed in the dishwasher. Each of our stainless steel sink grids is custom designed to achieve a perfect fit to protect the handcrafted beauty of your BLANCO sink – offering convenience, flexibility and style.

  • Measures 10.88" L X 15.44" W
  • Custom-designed to fits QUATRUS SUPER SINGLE sink models 519548 & 518172
  • Made from durable stainless steel
  • Non-skid protective feet and side bumpers for added stability and protection
  • Heat-resistant and dishwasher safe

description.en:
The PRECIS UNDERMOUNT BAR SINK offers clean lines and a compact single bowl design, making it the perfect solution for small spaces. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material. The PRECIS Bar Sink easily conquers the demands of everyday life and is an ideal choice for your bar area or butler's pantry. A pop of color could be the perfect finishing touch.

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • Optional accessories include grid (item #221013) and colander (item #227689)
  • BLANCO is the only granite composite sink manufacturer that meets the composite stone IAPMO standards
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 18"
  • Bowl Length 1: 12.5"
  • Bowl Width 1: 15.75"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 7.5"
  • Installation Sheet

title.zh: Blanco 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips - 2 Pack
title.id: Blanco 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips - 2 Pack
title.th: Blanco 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips - 2 Pack
title.vi: Blanco 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips - 2 Pack
title.ar: Blanco 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips - 2 Pack

description.en:
2 Pack

When it comes to installing a new undermount sink, reliable sink mounting clips are crucial. BLANCO Undermount Clips provide a secure solution that makes sink installation easy. Specifically designed to ensure the safe and secure installation of your SILGRANIT undermount sink, these tough and durable stainless metal clips are a must-have. The set includes everything you need: screws, clips, inserts, washers, and washouts, along with detailed installation instructions. Designed to perfectly fit BLANCO undermount kitchen sinks, this installation kit has the best sink brackets for granite composite SILGRANIT kitchen sinks. Trust in our high-quality clips to hold your sink firmly in place, so you can enjoy a beautifully installed undermount sink for years to come.

Undermount Sink Installation Essentials

  • Blanco 440851 Undermount Clips simplify the installation process for your SILGRANIT and granite composite SILGRANIT sinks
  • These clips provide a sturdy and dependable solution, ensuring your sink stays securely in place for years to come
  • Material: durable stainless steel
  • Corrosion resistant and maintain strength
  • Made in the USA
  • Discreet and hidden security
  • This pack includes 10 undermount sink clip support brackets, plus the screw, clip, insert, washer and washout
  • Easy-to-follow instructions for seamless installation

Blanco: Quality You Can Trust

Blanco is a trusted name in kitchen solutions, known for its dedication to innovation and quality. The 440851 Accessories Undermount Clips exemplify these values, making them the preferred choice for professionals and homeowners alike.

Ensure a hassle-free installation of your new undermount sink with BLANCO Undermount Clips. Designed specifically for SILGRANIT undermount sinks, these durable stainless metal clips provide a secure and reliable solution. The installation kit includes all the necessary components and detailed instructions. Trust in BLANCO's expertise to hold your sink firmly in place for years to come. Upgrade now and experience the excellence of Blanco.

Designed for every kitchen decor, Moen's granite sinks are available in 4 finishes and several configurations.

  • STAIN RESISTANT: Foods and liquids will not stain the surface

title.ar: Moen Apron Front Fireclay Single Bowl Undermount Kitchen Sink 33" White in White - FC331910

description.en:
From farmhouse chic to cottage charm to midcentury modern style, Moen fireclay sinks add a definitive aesthetic touch to any kitchen along with superior performance. A gleaming white glazed finish is highly resistant to scratches, chips, heat and stains, and an easy-to-clean smooth surface stands up to abrasive cleaners. Beneath the surface, 100% eco-friendly, lead-free materials compose the thick, durable fireclay body that minimizes sound during use. A deep bowl accommodates many dishes and even large pots and pans, making the apron-front sinks highly functional.

  • DURABILITY: Highly scratch and stain resistant
  • INCLUDED: Stainless steel bottom sink rack and chrome strainer included
  • SOUND DAMPENING: Thick and durable material aids in minmizing sound during use
  • EASY MAINTENANCE: White glazed finish is easy to clean with long lasting smooth shining surface

description.en:
Fine fireclay material sourced in the Limoges region of France renders these centerpieces as durable as they are beautiful. Specially designed to fit bar/food prep or kitchen sink Minimizes scratches and wear on the bottom of the sink by creating a raised working surface Plastic feet included to protect sink bottom Vinyl coating If undermount, sink bowl must be completely exposed for grid to fit properly Stainless steel construction Purchase with confidence knowing that the product is covered by a 1-year limited warranty. Covered under Rohl's 1 year limited warranty Constructed of stainless steel Coordinates with products from the line seamlessly Feet coated with protective rubber Provides added protection for both your dishes and your sink Made in America Length: 13" (left to right of product) Width: 13" (front to back of product)

  • Specially designed to fit 6497 kitchen sink
  • Plastic feet included to protect sink bottom
  • Vinyl-coating on white and biscuit
  • If undermount installation, sink bowl must be completely exposed for grid to fit properly

description.en:
Olympia Elite Series Sinlge Handle Faucet with Side Spray in ChromeSingle Handle Kitchen Faucet
  • Metal Lever Handle
  • Spout Swivel 360 degrees
  • 7-15/16" Reach
  • 4-3/4"From Deck to Aerator
  • Stainless Steel Ball Operation

  • Side Spray Assembly With 1.5 GPM
Elkay 33" Dayton Stainless Steel Drop in SinkDayton offers a complete line of stainless steel sinks, along with drains and accessories. Our products are backed with the quality assurance of domestic manufacturing and great customer service.
  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • 22-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Commercial grade 22-gauge thickness and 300 Series stainless steel for everyday use.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is installed above the countertop, an ideal choice if you are not replacing the counter; has a beautifully finished rim.
  • DOUBLE BOWLS OF EQUAL SIZE: Conveniently use bowls independently for washing, soaking, rinsing, drying and other household tasks.
  • 300 SERIES STAINLESS STEEL: Sturdy design is crafted to meet the demands of everyday use.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".

description.en:
Dayton offers a complete line of stainless steel sinks, along with drains and accessories. From drop-in installation to undermount and dual mount styles, Dayton sinks come in an array of sizes and bowl configurations. You'll also find packages to meet every budget. Our products are backed with the quality assurance of domestic manufacturing and great customer service.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • 22-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Commercial grade 22-gauge thickness and 300 Series stainless steel for everyday use.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is designed for drop-in installation to make the sink a focal point of your room.
  • SINGLE BOWL: Bowl gives you uninterrupted space for washing and stacking dishes or other household tasks.
  • 300 SERIES STAINLESS STEEL: Designed for everyday use.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • LARGE CAPACITY: Straight sidewalls give the sink a flat bottom and offer more usable space for stacking, soaking and washing dishes; easy to clean.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.

description.en:
Dayton offers a complete line of stainless steel sinks, along with drains and accessories. From drop-in installation to undermount and dual mount styles, Dayton sinks come in an array of sizes and bowl configurations. You'll also find packages to meet every budget. Our products are backed with the quality assurance of domestic manufacturing and great customer service.

  • ADA COMPLIANT: Product is ADA compliant when properly installed.
  • 22-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Commercial grade 22-gauge thickness and 300 Series stainless steel for everyday use.
  • DROP-IN INSTALLATION: Sink is installed above the countertop, an ideal choice if you are not replacing the counter; has a beautifully finished rim.
  • SINGLE BOWL: Bowl gives you uninterrupted space for washing and stacking dishes or other household tasks.
  • 300 SERIES STAINLESS STEEL: Sturdy design is crafted to meet the demands of everyday use.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 30".

description.en:
Dayton offers a complete line of stainless steel sinks, along with drains and accessories. From drop-in installation to undermount and dual mount styles, Dayton sinks come in an array of sizes and bowl configurations. You'll also find packages to meet every budget. Our products are backed with the quality assurance of domestic manufacturing and great customer service.

  • SLIM RIM: Install sink as a drop-in or undermount; ultrathin, flat rim virtually eliminates the barrier between sink and counter for a clean look.
  • DOUBLE BOWLS OF EQUAL SIZE: Conveniently use bowls independently for washing, soaking, rinsing, drying and other household tasks.
  • 18-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: High-quality 18-gauge thickness and 300 Series stainless steel for lasting durability.
  • QUIET: Sound-deadening pad(s) minimizes sound and vibration for a quieter time at the sink.
  • U-CHANNEL INSTALLATION: Mounting clips placed inside the channel before installation mean less time under the sink for an easier install.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • MADE IN THE USA: This Elkay product is proudly made in the USA.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".
  • CABINET SIZE: Minimum cabinet size for this sink is 36".

description.en:
The Elkay Crosstown collection offers a fresh take on the classic stainless steel sink, combining beauty, function and contemporary design. Tight corners and a flat bottom provide more space inside the sink bowl for stacking and cleaning dishes. The striking geometric shape makes a statement in any home.

  • UNDERMOUNT INSTALLATION: Sink is installed beneath the countertop creating a seamless appearance between the sink and the countertop.
  • SINGLE BOWL: Bowl gives you uninterrupted space for washing and stacking dishes or other household tasks.
  • 18-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Highest quality 18-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for lasting durability, performance and lustrous beauty.
  • SOUND GUARD: Pads and undercoating enhance sound-deadening performance for a quieter time at the sink.
  • TIGHT CORNERS: Fresh, geometric design offers straight sidewalls and a flat bottom for a modern look and more usable space; easy to clean.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • EXTRA-DEEP BOWL: High-capacity bowl offers more room inside for stacking dishes, filling stockpots, and handling large baking sheets and roasters.
  • CROSS BREAKS: Creased accent lines inside the bowl provide a professional appearance.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".
  • DISPOSAL READY: This sink has a drain that works with standard garbage disposals, if space allows.

title.ar: Elkay Crosstown 16 Gauge Stainless Steel 16" x 18-1/2" x 10" Rounded Single Bowl Undermount Sink

description.en:
The Elkay Crosstown collection offers a fresh take on the classic stainless steel sink, combining beauty, function and contemporary design. Tight corners and a flat bottom provide more space inside the sink bowl for stacking and cleaning dishes. The striking geometric shape makes a statement in any home.

  • UNDERMOUNT INSTALLATION: Sink is installed beneath the countertop creating a seamless appearance between the sink and the countertop.
  • SINGLE BOWL: Bowl gives you uninterrupted space for washing and stacking dishes or other household tasks.
  • 16-GAUGE STAINLESS STEEL: Premium 16-gauge thickness and Type 304 stainless steel for immense durability, performance and beauty.
  • SOUND GUARD: Pads and undercoating enhance sound-deadening performance for a quieter time at the sink.
  • TIGHT CORNERS: Fresh, geometric design offers straight sidewalls and a flat bottom for a modern look and more usable space; easy to clean.
  • OFFSET DRAIN: Drain placement provides more usable space on the bottom of the sink and in the cabinet below.
  • LARGE CAPACITY: Straight sidewalls give the sink a flat bottom and offer more usable space for stacking, soaking and washing dishes; easy to clean.
  • EXTRA-DEEP BOWL: High-capacity bowl offers more room inside for stacking dishes, filling stockpots, and handling large baking sheets and roasters.
  • CROSS BREAKS: Creased accent lines inside the bowl provide a professional appearance.
  • DRAIN OPENING: Sink drain opening measures 3-1/2".

title.ar: Blanco 440174 Diamond Single Bowl Silgranit II: Anthracite Undermount Kitchen Sink

description.en:
The DIAMOND 24" UNDERMOUNT SINGLE BOWL KITCHEN SINK offers a compact single bowl design, making it the perfect solution for small spaces. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material. The DIAMOND 24" easily conquers the demands of everyday life and is an ideal choice for smaller kitchens or as a secondary prep sink in larger kitchens.

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Optional accessories include grid (item #221000) and decorative drain cover (item #517666)
  • Basket strainer sold separately
  • BLANCO is the only granite composite sink manufacturer that meets the composite stone IAPMO standards
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 27"
  • Bowl Length 1: 22"
  • Bowl Width 1: 18.81"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 10"
  • Installation Sheet

description.en:
The FORMERA collection is a beautifully crafted collection that starts with practicality and ends with a beautiful lustrous finish. Blending clean, modern lines with functional practicality for a simply stunning look, the FORMERA XL SUPER SINGLE UNDERMOUNT STAINLESS STEEL SINK provides a seamless fit to any style of kitchen. With a rear-right offset drain for maximum utility, the extra large bowl can hold every dinner dish, from plates to pans.

  • BLANCO stainless steel is heat, rust and corrosion resistant, while impervious to water stains and calcium deposits
  • Engineered with elegant 30 mm radius corners that are smooth to the touch and easy to clean
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Sound dampening insulation reduces noise from garbage disposals and dishes
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • Optional accessories include a grid (item #237681) and decorative drain cover item (item #517666)
  • Sink Gauge: 18
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 36"
  • Bowl Length 1: 31"
  • Bowl Width 1: 16"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 9"
  • Faucet Holes: 0
  • Installation Sheet

description.en:
Single bowl space, double bowl convenience. The BLANCO DIAMOND DOUBLE BOWL UNDERMOUNT KITCHEN SINK with LOW DIVIDE features a 50/50 bowl design with low partition, offering plenty of room for rinsing, washing, soaking, spraying and straining operations. The ideal choice for those who wash dishes by hand, you can stack dirty dishes and utensils in one sink while prepping in the other. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material.

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Convenient low divide sits 5-1/2" above sink basin and makes it easier to handle large pots and baking sheets
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • Optional accessories include left grid (item #221008), right grid (item #221009), floating dish rack (item #236432) and drain cover (item #517666)
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 36"
  • Bowl Length 1: 14.5"
  • Bowl Width 1: 17"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 9.5"
  • Bowl Length 2: 14.5"
  • Bowl Width 2: 17"
  • Bowl Depth 2: 9.5"
  • Cut-Out Depth: 17.25"
  • Cut-Out Width: 30.5"
  • Installation Sheet

description.en:
Maintain a Clean and Efficient Sink with the Blanco 203439: Color-Coordinated Metal Basket Strainers - Soft White

Upgrade your kitchen sink with the Blanco 203439, a color-coordinated metal basket strainer that seamlessly complements your SILGRANIT sink. This practical accessory effectively traps food particles and debris while allowing water to flow freely, ensuring a clean and efficient drainage system.

  • Brand: Blanco
  • Material: Stainless Steel
  • Color: White
  • Dimensions: 2.5" (H) x 4.6" (D) x 4.6" (W)

Upgrade your kitchen with Blanco 203439 Color-Coordinated Metal Basket Strainers in Soft White. Experience the perfect balance of style and functionality, making meal prep and cleanup a seamless and elegant affair. Don't settle for ordinary sink accessories—choose Blanco for exceptional quality and design. Elevate your kitchen's appeal and efficiency—select Blanco 203439 today and discover a new level of kitchen refinement.

Discover the perfect blend of style and practicality with Blanco 203439 Metal Basket Strainers. Crafted to complement your sink in a soft white hue, these strainers are more than just a kitchen accessory—they're a sophisticated addition that brings harmony and convenience to your daily kitchen routine.

These basket strainers offer a range of benefits for your kitchen sink. They feature color coordination with Blanco SILGRANIT sinks, ensuring a cohesive look. Made from durable metal, they provide efficient drainage and prevent clogs. Installation is hassle-free, and their durability is backed by Blanco's reputation. With easy maintenance and a universal design, these strainers are a practical and stylish upgrade for any kitchen sink.

Additional Features

  • Color Coordination: The soft white finish seamlessly matches Blanco SILGRANIT sinks, creating a cohesive and aesthetically pleasing look that enhances the overall appeal of your kitchen space.
  • Premium Quality: Crafted from durable metal, these basket strainers are built to last. Their sturdy construction ensures reliable performance and longevity, making them a valuable addition to your kitchen.
  • Efficient Drainage: Designed to effectively trap food debris while allowing water to flow freely, these strainers prevent food particles and debris from clogging your drains and keep your sink clear, maintaining optimal drainage and functionality.
  • Easy Installation: Installing these basket strainers is hassle-free, requiring minimal effort and providing immediate benefits in keeping your sink clean and tidy.
  • Durable Performance: Invest in quality and durability. These metal strainers are backed by Blanco's reputation for quality and craftsmanship built to withstand daily use, ensuring reliable functionality and longevity.
  • Effective Functionality: Keep your sink clear and free from debris with these efficient basket strainers, allowing water to flow while trapping unwanted food particles.
  • Easy Upgrade: Enhance your sink's performance and appearance effortlessly with these color-coordinated basket strainers that blend seamlessly into your kitchen design.
  • Easy to remove for rinsing, cleaning, and maintenance, and dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning
  • Practical open/close design creates a tight protective seal when in use

Enhance Your Kitchen's Elegance and Functionality with Blanco 203439 Color-Coordinated Metal Basket Strainers in Soft White. Order your Blanco 203439 today and enjoy the perfect combination of functionality and style!

title.en: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink
title.zh: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink
title.id: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink
title.th: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink
title.vi: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink
title.ar: Blanco 440148 Precis Super Single Bowl: Metallic Gray Undermount Kitchen Sink

description.en:
The PRECIS SUPER SINGLE UNDERMOUNT KITCHEN SINK offers clean lines and a spacious single bowl design. One of BLANCO's most popular sinks, the PRECIS SUPER SINGLE features an extra-large bowl, perfect for busy families. Large kitchen items such as baking sheets, pots and pans can be maneuvered easily within the SUPER SINGLE. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material. The PRECIS SUPER SINGLE easily conquers the demands of everyday life.

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • Optional accessories include grid (item #221206), floating grid (item #233535) and decorative drain cover (item #517666)
  • BLANCO is the only granite composite sink manufacturer that meets the composite stone IAPMO standards
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 36"
  • Bowl Length 1: 30"
  • Bowl Width 1: 17"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 9.5"
  • Installation Sheet

title.en: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black
title.zh: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black
title.id: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black
title.th: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black
title.vi: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black
title.ar: Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink - Coal Black

description.en:
Elevate Your Kitchen with the Blanco 442933: Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink in Coal Black

Blanco, a leader in kitchen fixtures, is known for quality, innovation, and design. The Blanco 442933 from the Precis Collection embodies these traits with excellent functionality and style. Renowned for excellence, Blanco ensures each kitchen upgrade is durable and sophisticated. The PRECIS 21" Undermount Single Bowl Kitchen Sink is perfect for small spaces, featuring clean lines and a compact build. Made from durable SILGRANIT, it resists heat, scratches, stains, and impacts, while its non-porous surface allows easy cleaning. Ideal for small kitchens or as a secondary sink, it combines practicality with style.

  • Brand: Blanco
  • MPN: 442933
  • Collection: Precis
  • Material: Silgranit
  • Finish: Coal Black
  • Number of Bowls: 1
  • Installation Type: Undermount
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 24"
  • Bowl Dimensions: 19.75 inches (L) x 15.75 inches (W) x 7.5 inches (D)
  • Faucet Holes: 0
  • Cut-out Depth: 16 inches
  • Cut-out Width: 19.937 inches
  • Certifications: IAMPO Listed, SCC Compliant, UPLR Compliant, UPC Listed, ANSI Z124.6,
  • Warranty: Limited Lifetime Manufacturer Warranty

Experience the unmatched durability of Blanco’s patented Silgranit material with our expertly crafted sink. Designed to resist scratches, stains, and heat, this sink stays pristine even with daily use. The heat, scratch, stain, chip, and impact resistance of Silgranit reflects Blanco's commitment to excellence, keeping your kitchen functional and stylish.

The sleek Coal Black finish brings a modern elegance to any kitchen decor. Not only is this visually striking, but it's also designed for easy cleaning and maintenance. Perfect for those who appreciate sophistication without compromising on practicality.

Featuring a generous 21" single bowl, this sink offers ample space for washing large pots, pans, and dishes. Its deep bowl design efficiently contains splashes, ensuring your kitchen counters remain clean and dry.

Silgranit's non-porous surface is perfect for a hygienic kitchen, combining modern design with functionality. Its smooth surface resists bacteria and dirt, making it easy to clean with a wipe—no harsh chemicals needed. Use baking soda and a sponge to keep it pristine. This material blocks liquids and dirt, reducing bacteria growth by up to 98%.

Discover the Precis Collection sink, designed for flexibility. With undermount and drop-in options, it fits any kitchen layout and countertop. Enjoy the quality and versatility of a product that enhances your kitchen with reliability and style.

The sink boasts sound-deadening properties, minimizing noise from running water and clattering dishes, making it perfect for creating a quieter kitchen environment. Designed for efficiency and tranquility, this sink is an ideal addition to any modern kitchen.

Blanco’s Precis Collection 21" Single Bowl Kitchen Sink in Coal Black is more than just a sink; it’s a statement piece that combines practicality with aesthetic appeal. Whether you’re renovating your kitchen or building a new home, this sink is a smart investment that promises to enhance your kitchen’s functionality and style for years to come.

Additional Features

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Food-safe surface protects against bacteria
  • Easy-to-clean low maintenance material has a non-porous, smooth stone surface
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Rear-positioned drain location for maximum usable bowl and cabinet storage
  • Optional accessories include grid, floating grid, basket strainer, colander, and installation clips
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Withstands heavy cookware, hot bakeware and scuff marks

title.ar: Blanco 235906: Quatrus Collection Ergon Sink Rails - Set of 2

description.en:
The multi-purpose QUATRUS R15 ERGON sink rails are made of stainless steel and capped in hard plastic to provide a secure point of contact on the interior ledge of the sink. Hang and dry cloths and sponges, suspend pots and colanders over the sink or use on your countertop as a trivet for hot pots. Neatly stack to one side and save space when not in use. Save highly-coveted counterspace and organize your kitchen workspace in style by adding accessories to your kitchen workspace.

  • Set of 2
  • Custom-designed to its QUATRUS R15 ERGON FARMHOUSE SINK model #525243
  • Ergonomic design reduces lower back pain when bending over the sink
  • Made of durable stainless steel
  • Made in Germany

title.ar: Blanco 442549 Valea 27" Single Undermount - Truffle

description.en:
Spacious and durable, the VALEA 27" UNDERMOUNT KITCHEN SINK is designed for hardworking kitchens. Beautifully designed with a gentle shape that is comfortable and practical, the VALEA brings long-lasting style into the kitchen. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material.

  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • Optional accessories include grid (item #235913) and decorative drain cover (item #517666)
  • BLANCO is the only granite composite sink manufacturer that meets the composite stone IAPMO standards
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 30"
  • Bowl Length 1: 25"
  • Bowl Width 1: 16"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 9.5"
  • Installation Sheet

title.ar: Blanco 442539 Precis 25" Single ADA Undermount - Cinder

description.en:
The PRECIS 25” SINGLE BOWL ADA KITCHEN SINK offers clean lines and a simple but spacious single bowl design. This ADA-compliant kitchen sink features a reduced bowl depth for wheelchair accessibility and a rear-positioned drain hole, which helps provide knee clearance when the sink is used from a seated position. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material.

  • ADA-compliant sink bowl depth is 5" for easy reach and access
  • Patented SILGRANIT material is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant
  • Hygienic+Plus Surface Technology acts as a protective shield against liquids and dirt
  • Undermount installation makes for easy clean-up without dirt or grime building up around the rim
  • Basket strainer and installation clips sold separately
  • BLANCO is the only granite composite sink manufacturer that meets the composite stone IAPMO standards
  • All BLANCO sinks feature a limited lifetime warranty
  • Minimum Cabinet Size: 27"
  • Bowl Length 1: 23"
  • Bowl Width 1: 18"
  • Bowl Depth 1: 5"
  • Installation Sheet

The PRECIS 27” SINGLE BOWL UNDERMOUNT KITCHEN SINK offers clean lines and a simple but spacious single bowl design. This kitchen sink is made of SILGRANIT, a patented, certified granite composite material that is engineered to take on the toughest kitchen tasks. SILGRANIT is heat, scratch, stain, chip and impact resistant, making it stronger and more durable than other sink materials. Beautiful and highly functional with its non-porous, hygienic surface, it pushes away liquids and residue resulting in a low maintenance, easy to clean, long-lasting material. The PRECIS 27" easily conquers the demands of everyday life.
